harrowing.info: Inflicts Harrowing on M1, which coats the enemy's posture, health, and armor bar in a nearly opaque purple and orange pattern, hiding how full or empty each bar is. While Harrowing is in effect, hovering over your bars will not display their percentages. In PvE, your M1s apply Confusion, making your opponent have a 5% chance to hit themselves instead whenever they attack you, applying a brief stun to the enemy and dealing their damage back to themselves in full. These effects last for 12 seconds and are refreshed upon landing another hit. Harrowing also procs on criticals with the M1 tag.
harrowing.name: Harrowing
harrowing.in_game_desc: Obscures your opponent's health, posture, and armor bars. Also causes PvE to get Confusion on successful hits.

heroism.info: When above 75% HP: gain +4% damage for every 5% HP above 75% HP. (20% more damage at 100% HP) When below 25% HP: gain +4% damage for every 5% HP below 25% HP. (20% more damage at 0% HP) In PVE the damage buff is 0.25x the damage buff in PVP (4% -> 1%, 20% -> 5%). Landing weapon attacks will reflect certain status effects that are affecting you back onto your attacker. These status effects include: elemental Status Effects (Burn, Chill, Suffocation, Winded, Shock, and Fear), Antiheal, and Taunt. Note: This does not clear the status effect from yourself. Additionally, the reflected status effects are applied as if they were your own (e.g. Burn scales on your Flamecharm investment, not your opponents).
heroism.name: Heroism
heroism.in_game_desc: When above 75% HP, gain 4% damage for every 5% HP above 75%. When below 25% HP, gain 4% damage for every 5% HP below 25% HP. You can reflect negative status effects with light attacks or criticals to your opponent.

joes.info: Landing M1s builds stacks for the critical attack. On critical attack, plunge your weapon into the ground and stop time in an AoE around you. The size of the AoE and the duration of the time stop scale on the amount of stacks you had. 1 hit = +1 second. Upon being guardbroken, negate the guardbreak stun.
joes.name: JOE's
joes.in_game_desc: It stands for Judicator's Original Enchantment. An enchant that was supposed to be only for the strongest of monster slayers. No one knows what happened to the original Judicator who made this enchant.

kyrsan_chill.info: On critical hits, apply a slow that increases with each crit. At 5 stacks fully encase your opponent in ice.
kyrsan_chill.name: Kyrsan Chill
kyrsan_chill.in_game_desc: On critical hits, apply a slow that increases with each crit. At 5 stacks fully encase your opponent in ice.

metal.info: On hit, drain the target's armor durability to restore your own. Metal can still restore your armor even if the target has no armor durability left. The armor drain and armor restoration effects are calculated separately. Metal's effects are calculated based on your weapon's scaled damage, and the maximum armor durability of the relevant party; your armor durability for the restoration, and your opponent's armor durability for the drain. Metal cannot drain more than 200 armor durability in one hit. Similarly, Metal cannot restore more than 150 armor in one hit.
metal.name: Metal

multiplicity.info: Upon taking damage from weapon attacks from a humanoid opponent, this has a 20% chance to proc. On proc, recover health, restore your sustenance meters, or gain an agility bonus, each of these effects have an equal chance to proc, meaning each individual effect has a 6.6% chance to be procced when you get hit. Multiplicity has a 5 second cooldown. On health recovery: Restore 1.5% of your maximum health. This is applied after Anti-Heal on the same attack (meaning it could be nullified entirely), but before damage is taken, possibly saving you from being knocked. On sustenance restoration: Restore 20% of your maximum blood and 11% of your maximum hunger & thirst. On agility bonus: Increase your climb height by 15% for 5 seconds.
multiplicity.name: Multiplicity
multiplicity.in_game_desc: Incoming hits may grant you a random boon of Recovery, Healing, or Agility. 5s CD.

nemesis.info: Your weapon critical changes to play the animation of the Katana critical. This does not have hitregistry unless a Nemesis Mark has been applied. On M1, a Nemesis Mark is placed on the enemy for 15 seconds. Using your critical while the marker is present teleports you to the enemy, dealing 25 flat damage, or 18 posture damage if blocked. Nemesis' critical does not benefit from damage modifiers. If multiple enemies have the red eye marker, using your critical will teleport you to each sequentially, rapidly using the critical on each. The critical can still trigger critical Talents like Bear Trap and Manipulator, but it will not benefit from any damage modifiers these Talents may grant. The teleportation has a range cap of 65-70 studs.
nemesis.name: Nemesis
nemesis.in_game_desc: Your critical attack is replaced with Nemesis. Basic attacks now mark your enemies allowing you to critical attack to teleport to them.

nightbringer.info: On weapon attack, steal Ether based on damage dealt. The damage dealt to Ether stolen conversion is affected by the opponent's resistances, but is not affected by damage modifiers. Additionally, your weapon attacks can proc certain Shadowcast Talents, such as Twisted Puppets' shadow burn or Sightless Still. This enchantment will do nothing if you have not completed The Gaunt Man's trial on your character.
nightbringer.name: Nightbringer

obfuscation.info: Gain (LHT: 15%, MED: 20%, HVY: 25%) chip damage. This is additive to other sources of Chip damage. Wyrmtooth counts as a medium weapon, only gaining 20% chip.
obfuscation.name: Obfuscation
obfuscation.in_game_desc: You gain some chip damage on m1 and crit.

parasols_blight.info: On weapon attack, apply the Parasol Blight status effect. This effect has no visual indicator and lasts for 60 seconds. This status effect will have its duration refreshed when landing subsequent hits. If a player who is affected by Parasol's Blight dies, their corpse will explode and an allied monster will spawn. Monsters you kill have a small chance of proccing Parasol's Blight and summoning allied monsters. The monster can be a Mudskipper Broodlord, Alpha Megalodaunt, Void Thresher, Nautilodaunt, or a Prime Megalodaunt. These monsters can be Corrupted if used in The Depths. This enchantment will do nothing if you have not completed The Gaunt Man's trial on your character.
parasols_blight.name: Parasol's Blight
parasols_blight.in_game_desc: Hitting a player infects their body with Parasol's Blight. If a player who is infected is killed, their corpse is turned into one of the Parasol's Minions. This also has a chance of proccing on PvE enemies you kill.

providences_thorns.info: PVE: Parrying an attack deals damage to the attacker after a delay. This deals 35% of the attack's damage you parried * your Power level, capping at 500 damage per proc. PVP: Parrying 3 attacks within 7 seconds deals damage to the attacker after a delay. This deals 4% of their maximum hp as damage. Providence's Thorns is parryable, but it does not grant autoparry frames. Certain bosses are entirely immune to Providence Thorns. These are: Maestro Evangarde Rest, Heart of Enmity, Parliament, Kyrsgarde Champion and Titus Fulminus Destellus.
providences_thorns.name: Providence's Thorns

rain.info: Upon taking damage, this has a chance to proc. On proc, create a rain cloud above your head. 45 second cooldown. This rain cloud functions as normal rain, debuffing Flamecharm abilities by 10%, increasing Thundercall (if you have the Stratoshock Talent) and Storm Enchantment's damage, and increasing the damage of your Frostdraw abilities if it's Winter. If you have the Chilling Enchantment on your weapon, or if it's Winter, create snow instead. If you have Stench on another equipment piece, or if you are in Upper Erisia, create an acid rain cloud instead. This will damage yourself and all players in its AoE, however you will become immune to the damage it deals if you have the Survivalist Boon. This enchantment will do nothing if you have not completed The Gaunt Man's trial on your character.
rain.name: Rain
rain.in_game_desc: Incoming hits may summon rain clouds above you.

sear.info: Your weapon gains 5% PEN. Landing hits with your weapon applies stacks of Cauterize, increasing the incoming PEN your opponent takes by (LHT: 5.45%, MED: 8%, HVY: 10%) per stack. Cauterized caps at +40% incoming PEN. Cauterize's PEN bonus is applied to all damage sources like Mantras. Sear does not bypass the 50% PEN cap. Additionally, drain your opponent's thirst equal to 20% of your weapon's scaled damage. Sear stacks lasts 15 seconds each. Applying a new stack does not refresh this timer.
sear.name: Sear
sear.in_game_desc: Weapon gains +5% PEN. Applies Cauterize on hit for 15s, as well as draining their Water. Cauterized foes take more PEN the more stacks are applied.

solar.info: Applies a Solar Mark on Critical, Uppercut, or Flourish. Solar Marks last 8 seconds and reduces the affected target's Tempo gain and Ether regeneration. If you hit a marked enemy with a Vent, steal their Tempo to refund your Vent's Tempo cost, removing the Solar Mark. If your opponent does not have enough Tempo to afford your Vent cost, you will pay the difference with your own Tempo. If a PvE enemy has the Solar Mark, your Vent damage against them is massively increased.
solar.name: Solar
solar.in_game_desc: Applies a Solar Mark on critical attack or flourish. Solar Marks last 8s and reduce Tempo gain and Ether regeneration. Your Vent drains the Tempo of those you've marked.

stench.info: Upon taking damage, this has a 20% chance to proc. On proc, release a cloud of blockable gas that deals damage to targets who stand in it. This deals 1% of your opponent's maximum health per tick, ticking 3 times for 3% total damage. Stench cannot deal more than 10 damage in a singular tick. This has a 40 second cooldown.
stench.name: Stench
stench.in_game_desc: Incoming hits may produce a Stench Cloud, gradually draining 3% of their maximum health (max. 30 damage) if not blocked.

stone.info: Adds 0.25 true damage to your weapon attacks that guardbreak for every 1 weapon investment you have. Wyrmtooth will prioritize its heavy investment over its medium investment.
stone.name: Stone
stone.in_game_desc: Do extra true damage whenever you guardbreak an opponent with a light attack or critical.

storm.info: On weapon hit, Storm deals 16.5% of your weapon damage as a separate instance of Thundercall damage. This is doubled to 33% in an AoE if it is raining. On proc, this also applies Shock or 1 Surge Rod. This effect has a 5 second cooldown. The damage this deals is based off your weapon's damage after resistances, and it cannot be enhanced with damage modifiers. Because Storm deals a percentage of your attack's damage after resistances, it can be double resisted.
storm.name: Storm
storm.in_game_desc: Shock your foes on hit every 5s. Rain will upgrade this shock into a lightning bolt called down from above.

stormbreaker.info: On M1, Stormbreaker deals 16.5% of your weapon damage as a separate instance of Thundercall damage. This is doubled to 33% in an AoE if it is raining. On proc, this also applies Shock or 1 Surge Rod. This effect has a 5 second cooldown. The damage this deals is based off your weapon's scaled damage, and it cannot be enhanced with damage modifiers. Stormbreaker replaces your weapon critical with a new one that throws your weapon towards your cursor, ragdolling and striking targets with thunder. Stormbreaker's critical damage is 40 flat typeless damage on throw and then 30 flat typeless damage on return. Stormbreaker can hit the same target twice on throw or recall and it deals less than 1 posture damage per hit. You are unable to attack until your weapon returns. Completely halts the user's movement while the weapon is being recalled.
stormbreaker.name: Stormbreaker
stormbreaker.in_game_desc: Your critical attack is replaced with Stormbreaker Hurl, allowing you to launch your weapon. Shock your foes on hit every 5s. Occasionally, a lightning bolt may be called down from above.

suffocated.info: On critical hit, uppercut, flourish, or offhand shot, apply suffocation for a short duration.
suffocated.name: Suffocated
suffocated.in_game_desc: Landing a critical, uppercut, flourish, or offhand attack procs suffocation.

tainted_sorrow.info: On hit, the critical attack is replaced with the ability to pull/fling the victim towards the user with a corresponding small pillar effect. Flourishing makes all subsequent attacks fling the target upward.
tainted_sorrow.name: Tainted Sorrow

tears_of_the_edenkite.info: On Flourish or Critical, create 5 bubbles around you that home onto an enemy, dealing damage and applying hitstun. This effect has a 20 second cooldown. The bubbles' damage scales with your weapon investment, dealing 11 damage at 100 weapon. Additionally they have 7.55x PvE scaling. The bubbles deal typeless damage, bypassing armor resistances. The bubbles are parryable, blockable, and dodgeable.
tears_of_the_edenkite.name: Tears of the Edenkite
tears_of_the_edenkite.in_game_desc: On critical attacks and flourishes, produce homing bubble projectiles. 20s CD

umbral_knight.info: On hit, a red slash will follow up after a 0.25s delay, dealing 20% of your weapon's scaled damage. This has a 5 second cooldown. Umbral Knight can be parried, blocked, and dodged.
umbral_knight.name: Umbral Knight
umbral_knight.in_game_desc: On hit, the Umbral Knight will strike your foes for 20% of your weapon's damage after a 0.25s delay. 5s CD.

unstable.info: Every hit has an individual 10% chance to proc any other enchantment in the game. Multiple enchantments can proc at once. If a hit count-based enchantment is procced, you will gain 1 stack for that enchantment.
unstable.name: Unstable

vampirism.info: Gain 20% of your weapon's scaled damage as Temporary Health on hit. Additionally restore blood when landing weapon attacks. Vampirism caps at 100 Temporary Health and cannot grant Temp HP past this threshold. This Enchantment is less effective against Chaser and Primadon, and almost entirely nullified against the Scion of Ethiron.
vampirism.name: Vampirism
vampirism.in_game_desc: Your weapon attacks drain health from your foes and replenish your blood.

viscosity.info: Incoming damage is instead applied as a damage over time effect, over 2.5 seconds. User takes 10% of the initial incoming damage every 0.25s, 10 times. Similarly to Deferred, the damage over time from this Enchantment snapshots all of the relevant resistances and damage modifiers when the attack landed, meaning newly applied resistances/damage modifiers will not be considered and effects that run out will still have their bonuses applied. This enchantment will be disabled if you are using Curse of the No Life King on your weapon or Immortal Helm.
viscosity.name: Viscosity
viscosity.in_game_desc: Incoming damage is converted into damage over time and applied for 2.5s.

wild.info: When landing weapon attacks, deal 85% of your scaled damage in an ~18.25 stud AoE as typeless damage. This does not hit the initial victim. You can only proc this effect once per weapon swing; hitting two targets will only create one AoE. Allies only take 50% of your scaled damage from the Wild procs instead of the full 85%.
wild.name: Wild
wild.in_game_desc: On hit, deal 85% of your weapon's damage in an AoE. This AoE cannot hit allies or the enemy originally hit. Reduces your damage against allies by 50%.

windswept.info: After landing (LHT: 3, MED: 2, HVY: 1) M1s, apply Winded to your opponent, lowering their swingspeed. The duration of this Winded effect scales on your weapon stat investment. This Enchant has a 5 second cooldown regardless of weapon investment, making it very weak on low invest. Windswept has a minimum of 0.5s duration and a maximum of 8 seconds, gaining 0.08s duration per weapon stat investment. When between 0 and 6 weapon investment, the duration will always be 0.5s, as the Enchant has a starting value of 0s, but the minimum duration this Enchant actually can be active is always 0.5s. In the case of Wyrmtooth, your Medium investment will take priority over your Heavy investment. Windswept's stacks do not decay over time. Criticals with the M1 tag can build up stacks for Windswept.
windswept.name: Windswept
windswept.in_game_desc: After landing enough stacks, proc winded on your opponent. The duration scales with your weapon investment.

aazels_horns.name: Aazel's Horns
aazels_horns.desc: An otherworldly set of faux horns. Faint scratches on the back spell something like 'Aazel', though the writing is weathered almost beyond recognition. Whoever wore these must have long since drowned. Strangely, they're warm to the touch.

aegis_of_enmity.name: Aegis of Enmity
aegis_of_enmity.desc: The Voice of Enmity's helm, few have lived to know it well. Now donned by you, the new self proclaimed arbiter of judgement...

akiras_ring.name: Akira's Ring
akiras_ring.desc: A ring once worn by a Black Diver. It seems he's since passed the need for such trinkets. +1.2 WLL scaling to all weapons.

amedan_pendant.name: Amedan Pendant
amedan_pendant.desc: A golden pendant in the likeness of the Kyrsan Suncross, known to them as Ameda. In the ruins of Old Kyrsa, the Amedan Temple is said to still stand, though there are no longer free souls to make pilgrimage to it, or to receives its impression.

aristocrat_coat.name: Aristocrat Coat
aristocrat_coat.desc: Any man worth his salt or indeed worth the salt of a hundred other men would have a coat like this, you're sure.

armorers_ring.name: Armorer's Ring
armorers_ring.desc: Ring imbued with self-fortifying Ironsing. Reduces Armor loss by 25%.

ascended_outlaw_boots.name: Ascended Outlaw Boots
ascended_outlaw_boots.desc: Tattered and unassuming, these rags serve as the perfect occlusion for any hidden weapons or stolen contraband.

ascended_outlaw_hat.name: Ascended Outlaw Hat
ascended_outlaw_hat.desc: Common Garb among western peons; this hat is perfect for beating the heat or disguising one's identity.

ascended_outlaw_mask.name: Ascended Outlaw Mask
ascended_outlaw_mask.desc: A mask to perfectly conceal one's entire face when paired with a hat, its also able to conceal one's true strength.

ascended_outlaw_robes.name: Ascended Outlaw Robes
ascended_outlaw_robes.desc: In the Hundred Legion's territory, stealing is considered worse than murder. To kill is to live by a code and fight with honor; but a thief has no place among soldiers.

authority_helm.name: Authority Helm
authority_helm.desc: The standard-issue helmet of the Central Authority. The bearer's identity is stripped away, leaving only a faceless soldier in service of the world's salvation under the guiding hand of Sovereign Drallis Ehr, Overseer of Epochs. None have ever seen the true face of Lumen's Savior, and so too are his proxy's faces shrouded. Truly, the world is only illuminated by the will and grace of the Sovereign of Ages. Within this dark a blazing light.

authority_prototype_mask.name: Authority Prototype Mask
authority_prototype_mask.desc: The latest innovation of the Citadel's top scientists, this mask can turn your reflexes into lightning; too bad its primitive state would turn your brain into paste.

authority_voltspark_mask.name: Authority Voltspark Mask
authority_voltspark_mask.desc: Originally a dangerous prototype that turned soldiers into lightning-fast lunatics. You think you managed to work out the kinks. Maybe.

azure_duelist_ring.name: Azure Duelist Ring
azure_duelist_ring.desc: Mantras cast immediately after you parry an attack an attack do 20% more damage

barrel_helm.name: Barrel Helm
barrel_helm.desc: A sturdy helmet shaped like a barrel.

bastions_of_enmity.name: Bastions of Enmity
bastions_of_enmity.desc: Holy Mackerel! That was a tough fight!

blacksteel_helm.name: Blacksteel Helm
blacksteel_helm.desc: An imposing helmet made from blackened steel.

blademasters_robe.name: Blademaster's Robe
blademasters_robe.desc: Often worn by those who seek to perfect their martial skill with the blade, these robes trace their origins to ancient Etrean tradition, offering their wearer both comfort and mobility. Fragmented historical records suggest that this style of robe was highly preferred by Etrean nobility. It is also said that the old Maestros - leaders of the Vigil of Winds, - would wear similar robes during ceremonial occasions, and displays of their martial mastery.

blindfold.name: Blindfold
blindfold.desc: A tightly wound blindfold to hide the horrors of the world from your waking eyes.

blindseers_ring.name: Blindseer's Ring
blindseers_ring.desc: Increase all healing you receive by 33%. Reduce all damage you deal by 15%.

blizzard_ring.name: Blizzard Ring
blizzard_ring.desc: Apply a very light slow on your opponent when landing a light attack and suffocate opponents when flourishing them. Gain extra ether when landing Galebreathe or Frostdraw attacks.

bloodiron_ring.name: Bloodiron Ring
bloodiron_ring.desc: A strange creature lurks within. When the life of another is taken, their blood is reconstituted into your armor.

bone_ring.name: Bone Ring
bone_ring.desc: A ring made purely of dense bone. Improve all bone related attacks you do.

browline_citadel_frames.name: Browline Citadel Frames
browline_citadel_frames.desc: Designed for the scholars of the Citadel, these frames are renowned for their simple yet striking style, and are traded and sought after across all Luminants. Unfortunately, they are not your prescription...

caster_earrings.name: Caster Earrings
caster_earrings.desc: A perfect conduit to help channel your energy into force.

celestial_boots.name: Celestial Boots
celestial_boots.desc: Using the finest boots in the land and the power of the heavens, you've managed to make something out of this world.

chained_ring.name: Chained Ring
chained_ring.desc: Reduces incoming knockback but removes your ability to Air Dash. Landing an uppercut with Chained Ring now disables your opponents' air dashes for 5 seconds and briefly makes them unable to roll.

champions_cape.name: Champion's Cape
champions_cape.desc: Time to write your own legends.

charged_ring.name: Charged Ring
charged_ring.desc: Reduces the charges required to proc Crystal Explosions and Surge Overloads, but also reduces the damage they deal.

confessors_charm.name: Confessor's Charm
confessors_charm.desc: An intricately bejewelled pendant, traditionally worn by academics and prestigious of the Lullaby Isles. Though you'll never really know its real symbolism, one can only assume it was some form of sacred item, something to be revered. It's surprisingly heavy, must've been annoyingly impractical. Who knows how it got into your hands.

corrupted_immortal_helm.name: Corrupted Immortal Helm
corrupted_immortal_helm.desc: Helm of an Immortal Guardian. The product of Ministry experimentation, it's thought that these helmets enthrall their wielders by means of a Mind Veil, causing immediate death should they ever be removed. It seems that in prying this helmet off that this functionality has been disabled. You hope.

corrupted_isshins_ring.name: Corrupted Isshin's Ring
corrupted_isshins_ring.desc: Dropped from a wandering swordsman who went insane. Take 2x damage and deal 2x damage when in close-quarters combat.

corrupted_vessels_boots.name: Corrupted Vessel's Boots
corrupted_vessels_boots.desc: You feel false-strengths fill your body and mind.

crawling_necktie.name: Crawling Necktie
crawling_necktie.desc:
It's showtime!
[*Note: Only obtainable through Goodie Bags.]

cryptwakers_ring.name: Cryptwaker's Ring
cryptwakers_ring.desc: Infuse your Parasol's Blight with the essence of bone. Buff the health of any mobs you spawn with Parasol's Blight. Bonekeepers also potentially spawn from your Parasol's Blight proc.

dark_pearls.name: Dark Pearls
dark_pearls.desc: A daring statement to the upper class, these earrings contain pearls taken from the clutches of enormous, vicious clams native to the southern seas before the Submergence. Their rarity has only deepened with time; not only were they perilously difficult to obtain, but the very creatures that produced them are now all but extinct.

dawnfists_ring.name: Dawnfist's Ring
dawnfists_ring.desc: Gives every weapon 1.2 strength scaling when equipped.

dazed_band.name: Dazed Band
dazed_band.desc: Flourishing an opponent has a chance to stun them automatically.

deaths_head_necktie.name: Death's-Head Necktie
deaths_head_necktie.desc:
You may think this world is a dream come true... but you're wrong.
[*Note: Only obtainable through Goodie Bags.]

deepfire_ring.name: Deepfire Ring
deepfire_ring.desc: Ring of Korilfiend. Burn status burns faster.

deepscorn_casque.name: Deepscorn Casque
deepscorn_casque.desc: An artifact of dark renown, convincing them they are already dead, instilling a strange reckless calm, Crafted from darksteel, its history is steeped in blood; its last owner met a grim fate during a forbidden Ministry Ritual to grow a murky, grotesque abomination. Grayhule failed his experiments and succumbed to his own shadows. Dare to don this helm at your own peril.

deepwoken_cloak.name: Deepwoken Cloak
deepwoken_cloak.desc: An ancient cloak of incredible power. Worn by a select few.

delver_boots.name: Delver Boots
delver_boots.desc: A pair of boots with special metal grips attached. The grips are capable of deploying and retracting when desired, making them any delver's lifeline.

depths_supercharger.name: Depth's Supercharger
depths_supercharger.desc: Limits you to 2 mantras but greatly empowers them and boosts your Ether and Tempo.

deranged_treasure.name: Deranged Treasure
deranged_treasure.desc: Gain extra defense when you are insane, with this effect scaling based on how insane you are

destroyman_chain.name: Destroyman Chain
destroyman_chain.desc: A chain for the strongest of pathfinders. Some would say the extra 0.1% physical armor on this makes it a spec. They would be right.

divers_ring.name: Diver's Ring
divers_ring.desc: Deal +5% damage to Monsters in the Depths.

divine_cast_ring.name: Divine Cast Ring
divine_cast_ring.desc: Your mantras always cost your entire ether bar but do 3x damage.

ember_scorch_earrings.name: Ember Scorch Earrings
ember_scorch_earrings.desc: Wearing these makes you feel a fire in your heart with every swing.

eternal_restraints.name: Eternal Restraints
eternal_restraints.desc: The world will never forgive you of your sins, Haske. And you will never be freed from them.

ether_refined_brim.name: Ether Refined Brim
ether_refined_brim.desc: A finely crafted hat worn by master wizards of the Northern Luminant, imbued with song woven into its fabric. It amplifies the wearer's power in battle.

ether_refined_mantle.name: Ether Refined Mantle
ether_refined_mantle.desc: A finely woven gown imbued with the artistry of master songsmiths from the Northern Luminant. Enchanted by melodies intricately woven into its fabric, this garment bestows supernatural properties, amplifying the wearer's prowess and performance in battle.

etrean_sashimono.name: Etrean Sashimono
etrean_sashimono.desc: Once traditionally carried to battle by Etrean warriors, the sashimono style of banner is now little more than a historic artefact or curiosity. Ever since the Lord Regent's ascension to the throne, such battle standards have fallen out of fashion. Curiously, although various designs have survived to this day, no written records of them appear to remain, contemporary or otherwise. The significance of these once-important symbols is all but lost on the modern day observer - with the sole exception of the recognisable standard of the Kingdom of Etrea.

evanspear_war_boots.name: Evanspear War Boots
evanspear_war_boots.desc: Built to bite into the ground when fighting, these boots can turn a heavy swing into an unforgiving smash.

evanspear_war_helmet.name: Evanspear War Helmet
evanspear_war_helmet.desc: Hell hath no fury like an Evanspear.

evanspear_war_plate.name: Evanspear War Plate
evanspear_war_plate.desc: Made light to protect only the essentials, Evanspear Centurions put all their strength into a single blow, believing the best defense is a brutal offense.

expert_practitioners_earrings.name: Expert Practitioner's Earrings
expert_practitioners_earrings.desc: Traditionally worn by erudite masters of the song.

extra_thick_overcoat.name: Extra Thick Overcoat
extra_thick_overcoat.desc: An essential winter coat to protect you against the cold.

familiar_heretics_helm.name: Familiar Heretic's Helm
familiar_heretics_helm.desc:
A familiar helm said to have been passed down by a wayward line of a distant land.
[*Note; Only obtainable through the Hallowtide Event or the Hallowtide '22 Medal.]

familiar_knights_helm.name: Familiar Knight's Helm
familiar_knights_helm.desc:
A familiar helm said to have been passed down by a wayward line of a distant land.
[*Note; Only obtainable through the Hallowtide Event or the Hallowtide '22 Medal.]

familiar_priests_helm.name: Familiar Priest's Helm
familiar_priests_helm.desc:
A familiar helm said to have been passed down by a wayward line of a distant land.
[*Note; Only obtainable through the Hallowtide Event or the Hallowtide '22 Medal.]

fauld_of_enmity.name: Fauld of Enmity
fauld_of_enmity.desc: The titanic fauld of Enmity, a grim relic said to be woven from human hair, like some kind of sick trophy, each strand steeped in the anguish and malice of its former owners.

ferrymans_ring.name: Ferryman's Ring
ferrymans_ring.desc: A ring of the deceptive Krulian known as the Ferryman. Increases the range of your Rhythm by 50%.

finishers_ring.name: Finisher's Ring
finishers_ring.desc: Extra PEN on attacks that flourish opponents.

flame_demon_horns.name: Flame Demon Horns
flame_demon_horns.desc: An otherworldly set of faux horns. Faint scratches on the back spell something like 'Aazel', though the writing is weathered almost beyond recognition. Whoever wore these must have long since drowned. Strangely, they're warm to the touch.

freestylers_band.name: Freestyler's Band
freestylers_band.desc: Swim like some famous swimmer. Just like Mikhael Felps.

frost_crystal_earrings.name: Frost Crystal Earrings
frost_crystal_earrings.desc: Though the setting and clasp have been dulled by wear and tear, the frost crystal remains completely untarnished.

frost_ring.name: Frost Ring
frost_ring.desc: Apply a very light slow on your opponent when landing a light attack. This effect stacks.

fur_parka.name: Fur Parka
fur_parka.desc: An essential winter coat to protect you against the cold.

gale_boots.name: Gale Boots
gale_boots.desc: A pair of worn leather boots. And they're your size!

gale_enhanced_earrings.name: Gale Enhanced Earrings
gale_enhanced_earrings.desc: Putting these on, you feel as if you are light as a cloud.

gale_enhanced_ring.name: Gale Enhanced Ring
gale_enhanced_ring.desc: Suffocate enemies you flourish for a few seconds.

gale_masters_earrings.name: Gale Master's Earrings
gale_masters_earrings.desc: Putting these on, you feel as if you are light as a cloud.

geta.name: Geta
geta.desc: A type of traditional Etrean footwear, these wooden sandals were once a mainstay of the Kingdom of Etris, although they have been falling out of fashion in recent decades. Relatively cheap and easy to make, the geta were the preferred footwear of many Etreans due to practical reasons - the elevation offered by the two 'teeth' under the sole tend to keep the wearers robes from brushing against the ground, and their feet from coming into contact with rainwater, snow, or mud.

gladiator_helm.name: Gladiator Helm
gladiator_helm.desc: The visage of a gladiator who has seen many battles.

grand_pathfinders_backpack.name: Grand Pathfinder's Backpack
grand_pathfinders_backpack.desc: A backpack with plenty of room for all of the supplies a Pathfinder might need on their travels.

guardian_helmet.name: Guardian Helmet
guardian_helmet.desc: The imposing helm of a guardian.

guardian_pauldrons.name: Guardian Pauldrons
guardian_pauldrons.desc: Often found adorning the shoulders of those who guard villages close to the shores, where cost-effective equipment is prized.

handlers_hood.name: Handler's Hood
handlers_hood.desc: A shroud worn proud by members of the Inquisition.

hardened_crystal_earrings.name: Hardened Crystal Earrings
hardened_crystal_earrings.desc: Though the setting and clasp have been dulled by wear and tear, the crystal remains completely untarnished.

headband.name: Headband
headband.desc: A stylish headband. Capable of hiding even the most dire of hairlines.

heavy_hands_ring.name: Heavy Hands Ring
heavy_hands_ring.desc: Makes your "M1" attack 10% slower but do 30% more posture damage.

heretics_moonseye_gauntlets.name: Heretic's Moonseye Gauntlets
heretics_moonseye_gauntlets.desc: Gauntlets fashioned with a Moonseye motif. The watchful eye of gloamdark sky, the Moonseye has long been associated with life, death, and rebirth. In the Southern Luminant, the Moonseye was thought of as a lens through which one's dearly departed ancestors might view them from the afterlife. Moonseye charms were often woven into clothing to remember the fallen. Some organised gangs in the City of Celtor would refrain from committing crimes in the view of the Moonseye, on the premise that their ancestors were watching. Of course, dark alleyways and warehouses are often free from its gaze.

high_inquisitors_hood.name: High Inquisitor's Hood
high_inquisitors_hood.desc: A shroud worn proud by members of the Inquisition.

hivelord_mask.name: Hivelord Mask
hivelord_mask.desc: An ancient mask of a lost Hivelord, now a relic.

immortal_helm.name: Immortal Helm
immortal_helm.desc: Helm of an Immortal Guardian. The product of Ministry experimentation, it's thought that these helmets enthrall their wielders by means of a Mind Veil, causing immediate death should they ever be removed. It seems that in prying this helmet off that this functionality has been disabled. You hope.

imperators_fury.name: Imperator's Fury
imperators_fury.desc: Certain legions among the Hundred, such as the Imperators of the 77th, include members who implant physiologically altering stakes into their bodies as a part of a sacred vow to enhance their physical abilities. By embedding such a stake, they willingly sacrifice a part of themselves in exchange for heightened strength and abilities. Though this concept isn't unilaterally accepted amongst the legions as an appropriate way to acquire strength.

inquisitors_hood.name: Inquisitor's Hood
inquisitors_hood.desc: A shroud worn proud by the members of the Inquisition.

inquisitors_visor.name: Inquisitor's Visor
inquisitors_visor.desc: A metal visor favoured by the Inquisitors of the Central Authority. The perfect facewear to steel your visage of the world around you - hide your identity and emotions while retaining a look that commands authority on the field.

iron_mask.name: Iron Mask
iron_mask.desc: A crude mask wrought from iron, often worn by political prisoners held captive by the Central Authority.

isshins_ring.name: Isshin's Ring
isshins_ring.desc: Ring of A wandering Swordsman. Take 1.2x damage and deal 1.15x damage when in close-quarters combat.

jadeite_megalodaunt.name: Jadeite Megalodaunt
jadeite_megalodaunt.desc: An effigy of a stylized Megalodaunt, cherished for its ability to boost morale and scare off bad juju.

jesters_beret.name: Jester's Beret
jesters_beret.desc: A beret with a sleek texture and fit, evidently the work of a skilled tailor - must've cost a pretty penny. Though to those which money has no meaning, the visual statement outweighs any price.

kongas_clutch_ring.name: Konga's Clutch Ring
kongas_clutch_ring.desc: Konga's Clutch Ring allows the user to slide with little delay.

kongas_parka.name: Konga's Parka
kongas_parka.desc: An essential winter coat to protect you against the cold.

kyrsan_necklace.name: Kyrsan Necklace
kyrsan_necklace.desc: Looking at the necklace you notice there is no possible chance a Kyrsgarde could wear this. Perhaps it belonged to someone else?

kyrsmas_hat.name: Kyrsmas Hat
kyrsmas_hat.wiki: This item is statistically unobtainable after the Kyrsmas event.
kyrsmas_hat.desc: A cheerful cozy hat donned by the most festive Kyrsgarde.

leather_boots.name: Leather Boots
leather_boots.desc: A pair of worn leather boots. And they're your size!

leather_gloves.name: Leather Gloves
leather_gloves.desc: A pair of leather gloves. One size fits all, I guess?

light_eater_ring.name: Light Eater Ring
light_eater_ring.desc: Taking damage from fire or lightning will cause you to regenerate ether.

lightkeepers_medallion.name: Lightkeeper's Medallion
lightkeepers_medallion.desc: A medallion said to be able to emit the frequencies of the Radiant Tones for a few moments. The keepsake of a longheld dream, though one doomed to failure. The Light produced is only sufficient enough to Illuminate the wielder briefly, having no effect on the surrounding Void. The Radiant Tones can only truly be utilized by the meagre few that bear the Gift, a blessing that is thought to be granted by the unique signature of their Soul Murmur.

maestros_ring.name: Maestro's Ring
maestros_ring.desc: A ring once worn by a Maestro of the Vigils. Passed down from mentor to student, it seems the line of succession was broken for it to end up in your hands. +1.2 AGL scaling to all weapons.

mantle_of_enmity.name: Mantle of Enmity
mantle_of_enmity.desc: The wings of the Heart of Enmity. As you don them, a seething dark essence courses through you, whispering forbidden truths into your mind. The corruption is subtle at first... but with each beat of these cursed wings, you feel your will slipping, weighing you down, surrendering to something far more sinister.

marrowmade_boots.name: Marrowmade Boots
marrowmade_boots.desc: A grotesque set of boots, manufactured from what appears too be the foot and head of a Bonekeeper. Calling these 'comfortable' feels charitable. And yet, holding them, you cannot help not feel your bones itch and the ground beneath you quiver...

moon_ring.name: Moon Ring
moon_ring.desc: A deceptive ring that conceals one's true age. Greatly sought after by vain misers.

moonseye_gauntlets.name: Moonseye Gauntlets
moonseye_gauntlets.desc: Gauntlets fashioned with a Moonseye motif. The watchful eye of gloamdark sky, the Moonseye has long been associated with life, death, and rebirth. In the Southern Luminant, the Moonseye was thought of as a lens through which one's dearly departed ancestors might view them from the afterlife. Moonseye charms were often woven into clothing to remember the fallen. Some organised gangs in the City of Celtor would refrain from committing crimes in the view of the Moonseye, on the premise that their ancestors were watching. Of course, dark alleyways and warehouses are often free from its gaze.

moonseye_pendant.name: Moonseye Pendant
moonseye_pendant.desc: A simple silver pendant in the likeness of the Moonseye. Wearing such a pendant is a sign of mourning in many cultures, a holdover from the Old World.

mushroom_costume.name: Mushroom Costume
mushroom_costume.desc:
A fullbody mushroom costume. You feel the strange urge to change your name to Fungbert, or perhaps Fungula.
[*Note; Only obtainable through the Hallowtide Event, or with the Hallowtide '23 Medal.]

necrotic_demon_horns.name: Necrotic Demon Horns
necrotic_demon_horns.desc: An otherworldly set of faux horns. Faint scratches on the back spell 'Aazel', though the writing is weathered almost beyond recognition. Whoever wore these must have long since drowned. Strangely, they're warm to the touch...

oni_mask.name: Oni Mask
oni_mask.desc: The demonic visage fills you with a mix of dread and glee.

ossified_barrel_helm.name: Ossified Barrel Helm
ossified_barrel_helm.desc: A sturdy helmet shaped like a barrel.

ossified_black_helm.name: Ossified Black Helm
ossified_black_helm.desc: An imposing helmet made from blackened steel.

ossified_simple_pauldrons.name: Ossified Simple Pauldrons
ossified_simple_pauldrons.desc: Either they're of low complexity or someone's in need of a punch.

parasol_planter.name: Parasol Planter
parasol_planter.desc: The remains of a Parasol that have been relentlessly butchered in the name of fashion. Believed to migrate between the regions of the Voidsea, the sight of a Parasol is more than enough to make many lose their lunch. It's thought that they act as a form of cross-pollinator for various creatures that make their way from the Depths to Lumen, exchanging the traits and properties between them and dismantling ecosystems by injecting them into a competing niche.

pariahs_keepsake.name: Pariah's Keepsake
pariahs_keepsake.desc: You deal +20% extra damage to factions who hate you.

party_hat.name: Party Hat
party_hat.wiki: This item is only obtainable through Blacksmiths for those who joined the game during the Festival of a Billion Souls mini-event.
party_hat.desc: Hooray! Worth your weight in gold on the exchange, for some reason.

pathfinder_lantern.name: Pathfinder Lantern
pathfinder_lantern.desc: A sturdy lantern used to illuminate the path forward. With light as our guide, we are never truly lost.

pathfinders_backpack.name: Pathfinder's Backpack
pathfinders_backpack.desc: A backpack with plenty of room for all of the supplies a Pathfinder might need on their travels.

pendant_of_order.name: Pendant of Order
pendant_of_order.wiki: This item is only obtainable through Shrine of Order on characters that used the shrine before the September 6th, 2025 update, or Blacksmiths if you have the Ordergeddon '25 Medal.
pendant_of_order.desc: My build got gutted and all I got was this lousy necklace?

phoenix_talon_ring.name: Phoenix Talon Ring
phoenix_talon_ring.desc: Gain 15 temporary HP when you land an aerial attack on an attacking opponent.

posers_ring.name: Poser's Ring
posers_ring.desc: Damage done with a Katana isn't received until the user sheathes their weapon.

prophets_ring.name: Prophet's Ring
prophets_ring.desc: Once worn by the fanatical followers of a self-proclaimed Prophet from the Southern Luminant. The Shocks Corps were called in to intervene to prevent catastrophe, but upon their arrival the Prophet was nowhere to be found. +1.2 CHA scaling to all weapons.

pumpkin_head.name: Pumpkin Head
pumpkin_head.desc:
Just make sure you still have a head after you take it off.
[*Note; Only obtainable through the Hallowtide Event or the Hallowtide '23 Medal.]

purifying_ring.name: Purifying Ring
purifying_ring.desc: A silver ring that eradicates the murk in the water surrounding it.

rebels_bandana.name: Rebel's Bandana
rebels_bandana.desc: A bandana paired with a headband. Perfect for hiding your mouth, nose, and hairline. These are known to be the most identifying features of any outlaw.

regenerative_earrings.name: Regenerative Earrings
regenerative_earrings.desc: Wearing these fills you with a newfound sense of vitality.

reinforced_war_boots.name: Reinforced War Boots
reinforced_war_boots.desc: Built to bite into the ground when fighting, these boots can turn a heavy swing into an unforgiving smash.

reinforced_war_helmet.name: Reinforced War Helmet
reinforced_war_helmet.desc: Hell hath no fury like an Evanspear.

reinforced_war_plate.name: Reinforced War Plate
reinforced_war_plate.desc: Made light to protect only the essentials, Evanspear Centurions put all their strength into a single blow, believing the best defense is a brutal offense.

ring_of_casters.name: Ring of Casters
ring_of_casters.desc: Mantra damage increased by 5% but reduces melee damage by 5%.

ring_of_curses.name: Ring of Curses
ring_of_curses.desc: You come across mortal encounters more frequently.

ring_of_the_primal_king.name: Ring of the Primal King
ring_of_the_primal_king.desc: All attacks that apply knockback automatically apply daze. All Roar/Yell moves cause damage to dazed targets.

ring_of_wisps.name: Ring of Wisps
ring_of_wisps.desc: These essence of the soul gathers around the gemstone of this ring, granting additional strength to bound wisps.

ringing_scholars_boots.name: Ringing Scholar's Boots
ringing_scholars_boots.desc: A small pair of boots, worn but carefully kept, their leather still holding their firm despite years of neglect.

ringing_scholars_capeline.name: Ringing Scholar's Capeline
ringing_scholars_capeline.desc: A wide-brimmed capeline hat, aged yet carefully maintained, its shape still holding after years of disuse. It seems that, when Knell was still himself, he held a keen fascination with ringing bells, perhaps sound itself, though whatever once drew him to it has long since twisted into madness.

ringing_scholars_necktie.name: Ringing Scholar's Necktie
ringing_scholars_necktie.desc: A simple necktie, clearly well loved in its time, its fabric still holding a crisp silhouette despite years of disuse. At the throat, a small bell serves as its clasp.

ringing_scholars_raiments.name: Ringing Scholar's Raiments
ringing_scholars_raiments.desc: An old, well worn jacket, its fabric softened by time yet kept in meticulous condition despite years of disuse. Along its lining, intricate lace and fine detailing remained intact, unmistakable hallmarks of Anansi fashion from the Old World.

rosens_ring.name: Rosen's Ring
rosens_ring.desc: A ring once worn by a genius inventor. Said to have been discarded once he turned to other methods of inspiration. +1.2 INT scaling to all weapons.

round_citadel_frames.name: Round Citadel Frames
round_citadel_frames.desc: Designed for the scholars of the Citadel, these frames are renowned for their simple yet striking style, and are traded and sought after across all Luminants. Unfortunately, they are not your prescription...

royal_etrean_ring.name: Royal Etrean Ring
royal_etrean_ring.desc: One handing a sword while wearing this ring turns your Critical Attack into the Twincleave mantra.

ruby_scorch_earrings.name: Ruby Scorch Earrings
ruby_scorch_earrings.desc: Wearing these makes you feel a fire in your heart with every swing.

sailors_fleece.name: Sailor's Fleece
sailors_fleece.desc: A thick woolen fleece, somewhat scratchy in texture, commonly worn by sailors in the East. When the Suncross falls into the voidfog, the seas of Lumen get surprisingly chilly.

shivas_finger.name: Shiva's Finger
shivas_finger.desc: Gain 3% damage for each player and 1% damage for each mob that has combat-tagged you, and at 5 stacks you may Vent to consume all stacks to reset your cooldowns, after which this effect enters cooldown. With each BR victory, this item grows in power capping out at 10 fingers. Activates at 3 or more combat tags.

shivas_pendant_earrings.name: Shiva's Pendant Earrings
shivas_pendant_earrings.desc: Donning these fills you with strength and fury.

shock_trooper_boots.name: Shock Trooper Boots
shock_trooper_boots.desc: The only thing that surpasses a Shock Trooper's Brutality is their speed.

shock_trooper_helmet.name: Shock Trooper Helmet
shock_trooper_helmet.desc: The Legion boast of honor in battle, but the victims of a Shock Trooper would tell a different story.

shock_trooper_plate.name: Shock Trooper Plate
shock_trooper_plate.desc: Armorers in the Hundred Legion dedicate their lives to these plates. The techniques used to attune them between Thunder and Gale demand complete expertise.

simmerbloom_diadem.name: Simmerbloom Diadem
simmerbloom_diadem.desc: Another relic of Aska's, this ancient artifact was once in the hands of the elusive pioneer of flame charm. Bestowed by flame worshippers and seldom seen, its precise origins are shrouded in mystery. The flame that flickers within its adorned flower suggests a hidden power, making it a priceless treasure for those who truly understand its significance.

simple_pauldrons.name: Simple Pauldrons
simple_pauldrons.desc: Either they're of low complexity or someone needs a punch.

sorcerers_brim.name: Sorcerer's Brim
sorcerers_brim.desc: A finely crafted hat worn by master wizards of the Northern Luminant, imbued with song woven into its fabric. It amplifies the wearer's power in battle.

specialist_boots.name: Specialist Boots
specialist_boots.desc: The only thing that surpasses a Shock Trooper's Brutality is their speed.

specialist_helmet.name: Specialist Helmet
specialist_helmet.desc: The Legion boast of honor in battle, but the victims of a Shock Trooper would tell a different story.

specialist_plate.name: Specialist Plate
specialist_plate.desc: Armorers in the Hundred Legion dedicate their lives to these plates. The techniques used to attune them between Thunder and Gale demand complete expertise.

star_boots.name: Star Boots
star_boots.desc: Formerly mass produced by the cobblers of Celtor, these boots have become quite the collector's item in recent years.

strapped_hat.name: Strapped Hat
strapped_hat.desc: A hat typically worn by those from the Central Luminant.

summer_nauticals.name: Summer Nauticals
summer_nauticals.desc: Timeless eyewear produced by the Summer Company. In this world, It's drip or drown. You have no way of knowing if these are genuine.

summer_scarf.name: Summer Scarf
summer_scarf.desc: A scarf adorned by the esteemed gunsmiths of the Summer Company- smells like gunpowder...

suncross_pendant.name: Suncross Pendant
suncross_pendant.desc: A simple golden pendant in the likeness of the Suncross. Revered as a bringer of life and warmth by both Man and Celestial.

super_simple_pauldrons.name: Super Simple Pauldrons
super_simple_pauldrons.desc: Either they're of low complexity or someone needs a punch.

thrall_of_enmity.name: Thrall of Enmity
thrall_of_enmity.desc: The mask of the fabled Angels of Enmity, infamous for barring the unworthy from the trial, instills dread in the hearts of the drowned.

thresher_charm.name: Thresher Charm
thresher_charm.desc: An old charm engraved by the ancient denizens of Aratel. Beneath the shifting sands, countless artifacts remain lost to time.

tillians_beret.name: Tillian's Beret
tillians_beret.desc: A beret with a sleek texture and fit, evidently the work of a skilled tailor - must've cost a pretty penny. Though to those which money has no meaning, the visual statement outweighs any price.

tiran_pendant.name: Tiran Pendant
tiran_pendant.desc: Worn by Tiran spiritual leaders, the wielder is safeguarded against the numerous sheer drops and falls of the Tiran homelands. Thought to have originated from a particularly gruesome succession crisis where a leader was shoved unceremoniously off a cliff following a sermon.

tituss_cape.name: Titus's Cape
tituss_cape.desc: The fabled cape of Titus Fulminus Destellus. Even for its size, it's heavier than it looks.

tophat.name: Tophat
tophat.desc: While wearing a hat like this you start feeling the urge to exploit the surplus labor of the working class.

transfusion_ring.name: Transfusion Ring
transfusion_ring.desc: Gain extra vitality at the cost of your ability to heal (receive 50% less healing).

tricksters_beret.name: Trickster's Beret
tricksters_beret.desc: A beret with a sleek texture and fit, evidently the work of a skilled tailor - must've cost a pretty penny. Though to those which money has no meaning, the visual statement outweighs any price.

trimmed_overcoat.name: Trimmed Overcoat
trimmed_overcoat.desc: A thick coat to protect you against the cold.

trueblood_earrings.name: Trueblood Earrings
trueblood_earrings.desc: Wearing these fills you with a newfound sense of vitality.

trunks_clutch_ring.name: Trunk's Clutch Ring
trunks_clutch_ring.desc: Gain 75% more damage when at 20% health or lower.

veteran_rangers_brace.name: Veteran Ranger's Brace
veteran_rangers_brace.desc: It's covered in sewn pockets and hidden compartments, filled with cooking and medical supplies.

void_ring.name: Void Ring
void_ring.desc: Corrupted by the void, it allows the user to resist the harsh effects of the Depths for longer.

vortex_accelerator.name: Vortex Accelerator
vortex_accelerator.desc: The less health you have, the lower your mantra cooldowns.

waning_ring.name: Waning Ring
waning_ring.desc: A deceptive ring that conceals one's true age. Sought after the conmen and crooks alike.

warden_pauldrons.name: Warden Pauldrons
warden_pauldrons.desc: Elegant and steadfast, these pauldrons are truly fit for one who protects the seas.

warlocks_brim.name: Warlock's Brim
warlocks_brim.desc: A finely crafted hat worn by master wizards of the Northern Luminant, imbued with song woven into its fabric. It amplifies the wearer's power in battle.

warlocks_mantle.name: Warlock's Mantle
warlocks_mantle.desc: A finely woven gown imbued with the artistry of master songsmiths from the Northern Luminant. Enchanted by melodies intricately woven into its fabric, this garment bestows supernatural properties, amplifying the wearer's prowess and performance in battle.

warmasters_medallion.name: Warmaster's Medallion
warmasters_medallion.desc: A Medallion thought to be gifted to trainee Warmaster adherents during the Canticlysm. Bolsters one's martial prowess in exchange for hampering the amplitude of one's Resonance.

warriors_pendant_earrings.name: Warrior's Pendant Earrings
warriors_pendant_earrings.desc: Donning these fills you with strength and fury.

wartreads_of_enmity.name: Wartreads of Enmity
wartreads_of_enmity.desc: Titanic boots, once forged to crush enemies into their graves, now anchor you firmly to the ground below.

western_outlaw_boots.name: Western Outlaw Boots
western_outlaw_boots.desc: Tattered and unassuming, these rags serve as the perfect occlusion for any hidden weapons or stolen contraband.

western_outlaw_mask.name: Western Outlaw Mask
western_outlaw_mask.desc: A mask to perfectly conceal one's entire face when paired with a hat, its also able to conceal one's true strength.

western_outlaw_robes.name: Western Outlaw Robes
western_outlaw_robes.desc: In the Hundred Legion's territory, stealing is considered worse than murder. To kill is to live by a code and fight with honor; but a thief has no place among soldiers.

whaler_scarf.name: Whaler Scarf
whaler_scarf.desc: The scarf of an elite Knife of Eylis. Signifies the bearer's mastery over the Void.

whistling_periapt.name: Whistling Periapt
whistling_periapt.desc: The favor of the winds is yours; landing three hits (five for light weapons) on an opponent without taking damage envelops you in a shield of wind

windmill_ring.name: Windmill Ring
windmill_ring.desc: Taking damage from ice or wind will cause you to regenerate ether.

winter_corps_parka.name: Winter Corps Parka
winter_corps_parka.desc: An essential part of the Authority Winter Corps' kit. Devised to be resilient against the often thorny passages of the drakethistle in the Northern Luminant.

wormwarder_lantern.name: Wormwarder Lantern
wormwarder_lantern.desc: A modified version of the lanterns found in sanctuary outposts across the explored Eternal Gale. This one is portable, though only generates enough charge for its user.

abyssal_ridge.name: Abyssal Ridge
abyssal_ridge.desc: Send a cascading eruption towards your foes, forcing them to react.

abyssal_tendrils.name: Abyssal Tendrils
abyssal_tendrils.desc: Create tentacles and pierce multiple opponents at once.

adrenaline_surge.name: Adrenaline Surge
adrenaline_surge.miscellaneous: Grants a speed boost while active.

alsins_aid.name: Alsin's Aid
alsins_aid.desc: Give your ally an aura that grants then more speed, and increases the amount of healing they receive for 10 seconds.

arc_beam.name: Arc Beam
arc_beam.desc: Fire plasma energy. Deals additional damage in PvE.

arc_suit.name: Arc Suit
arc_suit.desc: Conjure and equip your Arcwarder suit.

arc_wave.name: Arc Wave
arc_wave.miscellaneous: Clears 50% of your current posture if used in Arc Suit.
arc_wave.desc: Stomp the ground releasing a wave of Arc energy.

ardour_slicer.name: Ardour Slicer
ardour_slicer.desc: Close the distance and deliver a fast slash using your Ardour.

ascension.name: Ascension
ascension.desc: Take to the skies for a devastating strike.

ash_slam.name: Ash Slam
ash_slam.desc: Strike the ground, turning it to ash.

astral_wind.name: Astral Wind
astral_wind.desc: A rapid delivery of consecutive attacks.

blade_of_saints.name: Blade of Saints
blade_of_saints.desc: Perform an Attuned attack. This attack will change depending on your current Saint Stance.

blade_of_saints_flamecharm_saint_stance.name: Blade of Saints: Flamecharm Saint Stance
blade_of_saints_flamecharm_saint_stance.desc: Rise into the air, and slam down your Saintsblade to apply burn and knockdown to anyone hit.

blade_of_saints_frostdraw_saint_stance.name: Blade of Saints: Frostdraw Saint Stance
blade_of_saints_frostdraw_saint_stance.desc: Use your Saintsblade to shoot out 3 crescent-shaped ice projectiles, followed up by a lunge which applies heavy knockback.

blade_of_saints_galebreathe_saint_stance.name: Blade of Saints: Galebreathe Saint Stance
blade_of_saints_galebreathe_saint_stance.desc: You propel yourself forwards with the winds, uppercutting anyone in your wake.

blade_of_saints_shadowcast_saint_stance.name: Blade of Saints: Shadowcast Saint Stance
blade_of_saints_shadowcast_saint_stance.desc: The Saintsblade releases a horizontal mid-range slash of darkness that pulls enemies along with it, knocking them up at the end of its path.

blade_of_saints_thundercall_saint_stance.name: Blade of Saints: Thundercall Saint Stance
blade_of_saints_thundercall_saint_stance.desc: Slash twice with your Saintsblade, applying knockdown on the second hit, followed up by a devastating bolt of lightning that applies stun.

blinding_dawn.name: Blinding Dawn
blinding_dawn.desc: Spin rapidly to unleash powerful rays of light.

blood_orb.name: Blood Orb
blood_orb.desc: Release an amalgamation of your blood.

blood_stakes.name: Blood Stakes
blood_stakes.miscellaneous: All nearby blood pools spawn an additional stake.

bloodcurdle.name: Bloodcurdle
bloodcurdle.desc: Manipulate the blood within your target's body.

bloodedge.name: Bloodedge
bloodedge.desc: Conjure a scythe of blood and swing.

bloodtide_ritual.name: Bloodtide Ritual
bloodtide_ritual.desc: Summon the Bloodtide and perform a sacrificial judgement.

bone_wisp.name: Bone Wisp
bone_wisp.miscellaneous: Fires a bone projectile on flourish and uppercut. Has 3 charges, increased to 5 with Bone Ring.
bone_wisp.desc: A servant of bone, powered by the Eternal Gale.

brace.name: Brace
brace.miscellaneous: The hyperarmor will end early if you cast any Mantra.
brace.desc: Brace yourself against attacks and gain hyperarmour.

burning_servants.name: Burning Servants
burning_servants.desc: Summon a legion of flaming spearmen that lunge inwards.

ceaseless_slashes.name: Ceaseless Slashes
ceaseless_slashes.desc: Click to reveal yourself and deliver a rapid flurry of slashes that can chain together.

celestial_assault.name: Celestial Assault
celestial_assault.desc: Use your wings and deliver two critical blows.

chain_pull.name: Chain Pull
chain_pull.desc: Manifest chains to brutally pull enemies towards you.

champions_whirlthrow.name: Champion's Whirlthrow
champions_whirlthrow.desc: Grab your opponent and toss them with the power of gale. Pressing F will toss your opponent straight down.

close_shave.name: Close Shave
close_shave.desc: Close the distance and deliver a fast slash.

crimson_rain.name: Crimson Rain
crimson_rain.desc: Release blood daggers. Recast to call them.

crimson_surge.name: Crimson Surge
crimson_surge.desc: Slash upwards and launch slashes of blood.

crystal_impale.name: Crystal Impale
crystal_impale.miscellaneous: Deals reduced damage if you do not have Glass Path: Crystallization.
crystal_impale.desc: Impale your foes with a brutal ice barrage. Does +50% damage if enemy is airborne, or after a Crystal Knee.

crystal_knee.name: Crystal Knee
crystal_knee.miscellaneous: Deals reduced damage if you do not have Glass Path: Crystallization.
crystal_knee.desc: Knock your enemy skyward with a kick of crystal.

decimate.name: Decimate
decimate.miscellaneous: Teleports to nearby targets if in True Strength.

devouring_eye.name: Devouring Eye
devouring_eye.desc: Summons a fragile eye that consumes the Ether of those who try to cast Mantras within its gaze.

dread_whisper.name: Dread Whisper
dread_whisper.miscellaneous: Deals 50% more damage if landed within 10 seconds of the last Dead Whisper hit. Applies Charm for 7.5 seconds.
dread_whisper.desc: Grab your opponent and whisper a terrible truth in their ear. Further truths are unbearable. Deals increased damage to the insane.

electro_carve.name: Electro Carve
electro_carve.desc: Produce a highly potent field of electromagnetism, shocking all inside.

emotion_wave.name: Emotion Wave
emotion_wave.desc: Conjure up surging waves of lightning that travel along the ground.

encircle.name: Encircle
encircle.desc: Conjure shadows around your enemy before warp-striking to them.

equalizer.name: Equalizer
equalizer.desc: Whip forward a tendril. If it connects, it deals damage to the target, and gives the user a blue aura.

ether_barrage.name: Ether Barrage
ether_barrage.desc: Conjure concentrated orbs of Ether to launch at your enemy.

ether_flight.name: Ether Flight
ether_flight.desc: Take flight! Spacebar to ascend, CTRL to descend.

exhaustion_strike.name: Exhaustion Strike
exhaustion_strike.miscellaneous: Transfers a percentage of your current posture to your opponent on hit, scaling on Mantra level.
exhaustion_strike.desc: A melee strike that removes your posture's damage on hit.

fake_strike.name: Fake Strike
fake_strike.miscellaneous: Deals 20% more damage if used at max Momentum.
fake_strike.desc: Trick your opponent and quickly go behind them.

fire_gun.name: Fire Gun
fire_gun.desc: A bullet of flames shot through each hand.

fire_palm.name: Fire Palm
fire_palm.desc: Conjure a cone of flames in front of you. Pressing F during windup will release a wider but shorter flame.

firing_line.name: Firing Line
firing_line.desc: Create a firing line of metal to light up your target.

flame_assault.name: Flame Assault
flame_assault.desc: Dash forward in a spiral of flames.

flame_ballista.name: Flame Ballista
flame_ballista.desc: Conjure a flaming arrow and fire it at your target.

flame_blind.name: Flame Blind
flame_blind.desc: Shoot a projectile that explodes after a short delay and blinds those looking at it.

flame_grab.name: Flame Grab
flame_grab.desc: Jet forwards with flames and slam anyone you catch in your clutches.

flame_leap.name: Flame Leap
flame_leap.desc: Leap up leaving behind a burst of flames.

flame_of_denial.name: Flame of Denial
flame_of_denial.miscellaneous: Grants one instance of knock prevention for 25 seconds. If a knock is prevented, gain healing scaling on Mantra level. Extinguishes burn if at low health.

flame_repulsion.name: Flame Repulsion
flame_repulsion.desc: Charge up an exertion of flames that knocks opponents backwards. If you take damage while charging, you repulse it back.

flame_wisp.name: Flame Wisp
flame_wisp.miscellaneous: Reduces your burn damage, but turns the reduced damage into healing for you.

flare_volley.name: Flare Volley
flare_volley.desc: Conjure up to 3 fireballs to volley at your enemies.

flashdraw_strike.name: Flashdraw Strike
flashdraw_strike.desc: Swiftly unsheathe your blade and deliver an upwards strike.

flashfire_sweep.name: Flashfire Sweep
flashfire_sweep.desc: Sweep with flames and lightning before following into a devastating uppercut.

fleeting_sparks.name: Fleeting Sparks
fleeting_sparks.desc: Call forth motes of electricity that seek out your foes.

frost_wisp.name: Frost Wisp
frost_wisp.miscellaneous: Creates ice patches periodically, on flourish, and on Vent.

gale_punch.name: Gale Punch
gale_punch.desc: Form a punch of wind in your fist and release it.

gale_wisp.name: Gale Wisp
gale_wisp.desc: A servant of wind. Reduces fall damage by 20%. With Specter Path, makes your mantras give more Spectral Gauge. With Haunted Gale, increases the duration of your Phantoms by 3s.

glare.name: Glare
glare.desc: Opponents facing you are briefly rendered immobile.

glorious_charge.name: Glorious Charge
glorious_charge.desc: Yell with valor and courage, increasing the speed of those who are in your party by 20 seconds and making them unknockable for 10 seconds.

graceful_flame.name: Graceful Flame
graceful_flame.desc: Conjure an undying flame for the caster and their comrades to rest by.

grand_javelin.name: Grand Javelin
grand_javelin.desc: A javelin made out of lightning.

hells_judgement.name: Hell's Judgement
hells_judgement.desc: A vicious grasp of flames. Receive a damage buff if you land this attack.

hidden_blade.name: Hidden Blade
hidden_blade.miscellaneous: Deals percentage based damage. Those hit gain a Poison status effect, increasing their shaky block duration by 20% for 16 seconds. Also applies an extended hitstun for 2.5 seconds, preventing most actions.
hidden_blade.desc: Pull out a hidden blade and quickly stab your opponent, dealing a percentage of your opponents health while also applying a bonus poison.

ice_cubes.name: Ice Cubes
ice_cubes.desc: Manifest cubes of Ice to fire at your enemies. Cast the Mantra again to fire cubes.

ice_daggers.name: Ice Daggers
ice_daggers.desc: Form and toss daggers of ice at your aimed opponent.

ice_fissure.name: Ice Fissure
ice_fissure.desc: Send ice rippling out in a shockwave.

ice_flock.name: Ice Flock
ice_flock.desc: Send forth a flock of ice

ice_forge.name: Ice Forge
ice_forge.desc: Conjure and throw weapons of ice.

ice_lance.name: Ice Lance
ice_lance.desc: Form an ice spear and lunges forward.

ice_lasers.name: Ice Lasers
ice_lasers.miscellaneous: Deals reduced damage if you do not have Glass Path: Crystallization.

iceberg.name: Iceberg
iceberg.miscellaneous: Heals you in pulses and grants an autoparry frame. Restricts movement while active.

illusory_counter.name: Illusory Counter
illusory_counter.miscellaneous: Summons a clone of the user on successful counter. Damage is dependent on user's build.
illusory_counter.desc: Fool others into striking and retaliate.

illusory_servants.name: Illusory Servants
illusory_servants.miscellaneous: Summons a clone of the user. Damage is dependent on user's build.
illusory_servants.desc: Illusory servants to await your commands

impel.name: Impel
impel.miscellaneous: Enchains if the target is at least 15 studs away.
impel.desc: Blast through your opponent's guard and pull them towards you.

iron_hug.name: Iron Hug
iron_hug.desc: Crush your opponents bones with an iron infused grab.

iron_quills.name: Iron Quills
iron_quills.desc: Conjure metal from within, impaling surrounding entities.

iron_skin.name: Iron Skin
iron_skin.miscellaneous: Prevents movement while active and grants 90% damage reduction.
iron_skin.desc: Coat your skin with metal to reduce harm.

iron_slam.name: Iron Slam
iron_slam.desc: Conjure a giant rod of metal and slam it down.

iron_tether.name: Iron Tether
iron_tether.desc: Summon two cubes tethered by lightning, setting a trap for your enemies.

jet_kick.name: Jet Kick
jet_kick.miscellaneous: Deals 20% more damage if used at max Momentum.
jet_kick.desc: Rush forward with a jet kick. Requires a target if you're in combat.

judgement.name: Judgement
judgement.desc: Summon a black casting circle before enveloping a humanoid target in tendrils and tearing them apart. The target is unable to move or act during the animation.

karita_divebomb.name: Karita Divebomb
karita_divebomb.desc: Launch into the air and deliver a devastating divebomb kick. Chains from Karita Leap.

karita_leap.name: Karita Leap
karita_leap.desc: Launch yourself into a flying kick, backflipping into the air if you hit a wall.

karita_swap.name: Karita Swap
karita_swap.desc: Grab your ally and swap places in them while moving in with a swift kick to save them.

lethal_injection.name: Lethal Injection
lethal_injection.miscellaneous: Applies all potion effects from off-cooldown potions in the Distillery. Puts all Distillery potions on cooldown.
lethal_injection.desc: Lunge forward and inject the targeted person with all of your auto-brew potions.

lightning_clones.name: Lightning Clones
lightning_clones.miscellaneous: Damage dealt is based on your build.
lightning_clones.desc: Replicated forms of yourself conjured from electricity.

lightning_impact.name: Lightning Impact
lightning_impact.desc: Slam those under you with a lightning empowered kick.

lightning_strike.name: Lightning Strike
lightning_strike.desc: A strike of thunder at your desired location.

lords_slice.name: Lord's Slice
lords_slice.desc: The Hidden Tendril contracts, pulling both the contractor and target closer. They are flung in opposite directions.

masters_flourish.name: Master's Flourish
masters_flourish.desc: A powerful slash that chips through block and slashes through armor.

metal_armament.name: Metal Armament
metal_armament.miscellaneous: Enhances your M1s, striking with a metal sword after each swing.
metal_armament.desc: Summon a blade of metal to swing alongside you.

metal_ball.name: Metal Ball
metal_ball.desc: Create a metal ball and rush forward.

metal_fakeout.name: Metal Fakeout
metal_fakeout.desc: Create a metal clone and appear behind your target.

metal_gatling.name: Metal Gatling
metal_gatling.desc: A deadly rush of several metallic rods.

metal_kick.name: Metal Kick
metal_kick.desc: A powerful kick laced with metal.

metal_rain.name: Metal Rain
metal_rain.desc: Unleash a rain of metal rods down below.

metal_turret.name: Metal Turret
metal_turret.desc: An automated turret that fires at targets that that cross its sight.

metal_wisp.name: Metal Wisp
metal_wisp.miscellaneous: Passively restores your armor durability. Applies 1 Metal Rod on flourish.

mindsoothe.name: Mindsoothe
mindsoothe.miscellaneous: Heals 60 health. Hold block during the windup to heal non-allies.
mindsoothe.desc: Give comfort to your allies by sharing in their burden.

mirror_illusion.name: Mirror Illusion
mirror_illusion.miscellaneous: Summons a clone of the opponent. Damage is dependent on target's build.
mirror_illusion.desc: Mirror your opponents and use their arsenal to your advantage.

neural_pathway.name: Neural Pathway
neural_pathway.miscellaneous: Travels further if used while moving. Has omni-directional movement.
neural_pathway.desc: Using your mind's eye, you force your imagined position into reality, appearing to teleport a short distance. You alone know that the world moved, not you.

onslaught.name: Onslaught
onslaught.desc: Reel back and swing your weapon, unleashing an onslaught of blows if it hits.

oxidizing_rush.name: Oxidizing Rush
oxidizing_rush.desc: Conjure metal swords and rush forward with them.

palm_strike.name: Palm Strike
palm_strike.miscellaneous: Hits twice and uppercuts if in True Strength.
palm_strike.desc: Slice your opponent with your palm.

parasitic_leech.name: Parasitic Leech
parasitic_leech.desc: Activate when linked to an enemy to leech their own health for a short duration.

permafrost_prison.name: Permafrost Prison
permafrost_prison.desc: Imprison your enemies with shadows and impale them with pillars.

pillars_of_erisia.name: Pillars of Erisia
pillars_of_erisia.desc: Gaining inspiration from the Duke of Erisia, call forth a malicious gale from your stomp.

precision_cuts.name: Precision Cuts
precision_cuts.desc: Snip forward 3 times with your scissors!

prediction.name: Prediction
prediction.desc: Predict an opponent's attack and reflect it.

pressure_blast.name: Pressure Blast
pressure_blast.desc: Unleash a powerful pressure blast from the weight of your weapon.

prominence_draw.name: Prominence Draw
prominence_draw.desc: Close the distance and deliver a fast slash.

pumpkin_pitch.name: Pumpkin Pitch
pumpkin_pitch.miscellaneous: Only unlockable through the Hallowtide Event.

punishment.name: Punishment
punishment.miscellaneous: Stores a percentage of the stored attack's damage, scaling on Mantra level, and adds that to the damage and posture damage this Mantra deals.
punishment.desc: Absorb damage then return fury upon your foes.

radiant_dawn.name: Radiant Dawn
radiant_dawn.desc: Strike down your foes with your blinding light.

radiant_kick.name: Radiant Kick
radiant_kick.desc: Kick your foes at the speed of light.

rally.name: Rally
rally.miscellaneous: Restores posture on cast, scaling on Mantra level. All buffed allies have their posture damage taken shared with the caster and vice versa.
rally.desc: Absorb incoming posture damage for allies around you for a set duration. When you parry, you restore the posture of your allies. Restores some posture on cast.

rapid_punches.name: Rapid Punches
rapid_punches.desc: Unleash a barrage of blows against your foes.

rapid_slashes.name: Rapid Slashes
rapid_slashes.desc: Rush down your opponent cutting them apart.

razor_blitz.name: Razor Blitz
razor_blitz.desc: Create weapons on your arms and dash through.

reinforce.name: Reinforce
reinforce.miscellaneous: The damage buff will be halved if you fail to buff another player. Press block during the Mantra windup to buff non-allies in range.
reinforce.desc: Buff those around you with extra defense and damage.

relentless_flames.name: Relentless Flames
relentless_flames.desc: Bear down on your foes with repeated fiery slashes.

restrain.name: Restrain
restrain.miscellaneous: Damage increase is dependent on landing subsequent kicks. (+8 per Perpetual Wrath stack, max 55)
restrain.desc: Deliver a powerful kick that binds your opponent's soul to yours.

revenge.name: Revenge
revenge.miscellaneous: Deals increased damage if you are below 50% health, scaling with the amount of health lost. Caps at 50 damage.
revenge.desc: A vengeful rush. Deals additional damage the lower your health is below 50%.

rhythm_advance.name: Rhythm Advance
rhythm_advance.miscellaneous: Procs Heart Reverb on hit or block.
rhythm_advance.desc: Channel your Rhythm and track down your opponent.

rising_frost.name: Rising Frost
rising_frost.desc: Conjure a glaive of frost to launch your opponents skywards.

rising_thunder.name: Rising Thunder
rising_thunder.desc: Rise up with your opponent and crash down as a bolt of lightning.

rising_wind.name: Rising Wind
rising_wind.desc: Use wind to uppercut and propel yourself into the air. Press F after hitting an opponent to impale them

rocket_lance.name: Rocket Lance
rocket_lance.desc: Create a lance, impale your opponent, and send them flying.

rupture.name: Rupture
rupture.desc: Detonate your chained target, unleashing a powerful blast that shatters their restraints and inflicts significant damage.

sanguine_dive.name: Sanguine Dive
sanguine_dive.desc: Create or jump into a pool of blood.

searing_snare.name: Searing Snare
searing_snare.desc: Place a fiery snare at a chosen location. Enemies that stumble into it are scorched.

shade_bringer.name: Shade Bringer
shade_bringer.desc: Temporarily summon a shadow greatsword for a large slash.

shade_devour.name: Shade Devour
shade_devour.desc: Gorge on your own health for raw strength

shade_step.name: Shade Step
shade_step.desc: Submerge into your shadow. Click to launch an attack at any point while submerged.

shade_wisp.name: Shade Wisp
shade_wisp.miscellaneous: Obscures your character and restores Tempo on proc.

shadow_gun.name: Shadow Gun
shadow_gun.desc: An awful blast of dark energy.

shadow_seekers.name: Shadow Seekers
shadow_seekers.desc: Call forth the void to track your opponents.

shadow_vortex.name: Shadow Vortex
shadow_vortex.desc: Create a shadow vortex that pulls in everything in its surrounding.

shoulder_bash.name: Shoulder Bash
shoulder_bash.desc: Rush at your enemies with your full physical force.

sightless_beam.name: Sightless Beam
sightless_beam.desc: Turn insanity against your enemies, incredibly strong against depths creatures.

sing.name: Sing
sing.desc: Charm those around you with your powerful voice.

sinister_halo.name: Sinister Halo
sinister_halo.desc: Emit a spinning ring of celestial energy, trapping and shredding any who step before its wake.

skycrash.name: Skycrash
skycrash.desc: Leap towards your enemies and stomp knocking up enemies caught.

skyshatter_kick.name: Skyshatter Kick
skyshatter_kick.desc: Unleash two devastating kicks with your brute strength.

slice_n_dice.name: Slice 'n' Dice
slice_n_dice.desc: Step forward and slice through your enemies. Ability can be activated again on a successful hit.

soul_beam.name: Soul Beam
soul_beam.miscellaneous: You cannot use this Mantra if Chorus of Souls is not active.
soul_beam.desc: Harness your Chorus of Wisps to unleash a devastating blast.

soulflare_siphon.name: Soulflare Siphon
soulflare_siphon.desc: Grab and siphon blood out of your victim.

sovereign_drive.name: Sovereign Drive
sovereign_drive.desc: Dash forward in a blink, knocking down enemies in your path.

spark_swap.name: Spark Swap
spark_swap.desc: Swap places with a selected target.

storm_blades.name: Storm Blades
storm_blades.desc: Conjure weapons of thunder with your ether.

strong_leap.name: Strong Leap
strong_leap.desc: Kick off of the ground with your strength, sending you into the air.

summon_cauldron.name: Summon Cauldron
summon_cauldron.desc: Make a cauldron appear from your memories.

symbiotic_sustain.name: Symbiotic Sustain
symbiotic_sustain.desc: Activate when linked to an ally to sacrifice your own health to them.

table_flip.name: Table Flip
table_flip.desc: Toss the ground in front of you.

tacet_drop_kick.name: Tacet Drop Kick
tacet_drop_kick.miscellaneous: If you have any Attunement, this Mantra will have its Strength requirement increased to 20.
tacet_drop_kick.desc: Disguise yourself in tacet and drop kick your enemies.

tacet_kick.name: Tacet Kick
tacet_kick.desc: Slip out of perception and deliver a brutal kick.

taunt.name: Taunt
taunt.desc: Taunt those around you, causing them to be unable to jump and to take 20% more damage. However, they deal 10% more damage.

tempest_blitz.name: Tempest Blitz
tempest_blitz.desc: Sprint forward on the winds themselves and deliver a devastating thunder kick.

thunder_kick.name: Thunder Kick
thunder_kick.desc: An unrelenting kick like a clap of thunder.

thunder_wisp.name: Thunder Wisp
thunder_wisp.miscellaneous: Applies Sapped on uppercut and flourish.

tornado_kick.name: Tornado Kick
tornado_kick.desc: Kick a gust of wind forward, if it hits an enemy leap into the air and launch 3 more.

tranquil_circle.name: Tranquil Circle
tranquil_circle.desc: All within the ring cannot cast Mantras. Those who stand within the ring gain 10% Monster Armor and 10% Damage vs Monsters.

twincleave.name: Twincleave
twincleave.desc: Dart around the battlefield with devastating cleaves delivered in quick succession.

twinstrikes.name: Twinstrikes
twinstrikes.miscellaneous: Only levels off Agility. Does not have investment scaling.

twister_kicks.name: Twister Kicks
twister_kicks.desc: Go forth with spinning kicks infused with the wind

umbral_slash.name: Umbral Slash
umbral_slash.desc: A swift slash channelled with foul energy.

veinbreaker.name: Veinbreaker
veinbreaker.desc: Charge up a strong punch infused with your blood.

vicious_descent.name: Vicious Descent
vicious_descent.desc: Leap into the air and slam down with vengeance.

warp_kick.name: Warp Kick
warp_kick.desc: Perform a kick, then warp to your enemies for a second followup kick.

whirling_blade.name: Whirling Blade
whirling_blade.desc: A chitinous scythe to cut through your foes in a whirl.

wind_carve.name: Wind Carve
wind_carve.desc: A quick swirl of sharp winds.

wind_forge.name: Wind Forge
wind_forge.desc: Encircle your foes with blades of wind that halt their escape until they respond.
