authority_ensign.name: Authority Ensign
authority_ensign.desc: A bright-eyed recruit deployed to the Eastern Front. Three cheers for the cause!

castaway.name: Castaway
castaway.desc: Washed ashore in an unfamiliar place, you find hospitality within the Kingdom of Etrea.

deepbound.name: Deepbound
deepbound.desc: Your training is almost complete. Though you were raised in these halls, you must now venture out into the Wastes to prove your worth.

ignition_delver.name: Ignition Delver
ignition_delver.desc: Just another day on the job. The riches below ain't gonna extract themselves now, are they?

lone_warrior.name: Lone Warrior
lone_warrior.desc: You awake to find yourself in a hall of ivory white, your memories of all other than combat are hazy.

voidwalker.name: Voidwalker
voidwalker.desc: The contract is sealed, enlisting you into an otherworldly mercenary group, the Knives of Eylis. Despite the brutal training, it seems Eylis herself has a plan in mind for you.

11th_legion_plate.name: 11th Legion Plate
11th_legion_plate.desc: Armor of the 11th Scouting Legion. Akilles brought them here some time ago to observe the coming conflict in the East.

arachnids_weave.name: Arachnid's Weave
arachnids_weave.desc: Spun around the dantiest of spider silks, this silvery coordinate is punctuated by its iconic corset. Perhaps "laced" with poison?

authority_captain_uniform.name: Authority Captain Uniform
authority_captain_uniform.desc: The unmistakable banded coat of an Adretian Captain. Despite immediate appearances, the coat is wound with protective fibers that provide unparalleled durability.

authority_commander.name: Authority Commander
authority_commander.desc: The armored robes of an Authority Commander.

authority_peacekeeper_armor.name: Authority Peacekeeper Armor
authority_peacekeeper_armor.desc: The durable battle armour of an Adretian soldier. The armour is specially forged by techniques developed in the Central Luminant, creating an uncharacteristically versatile armour plate.

authority_peacekeeper_armour.name: Authority Peacekeeper Armour
authority_peacekeeper_armour.desc: The durable battle armour of an Adretian soldier. The armour is specially forged by techniques developed in the Central Luminant, creating an uncharacteristically versatile armour plate.

black_diver.name: Black Diver
black_diver.desc: Coat of an esteemed Black Diver, one of the few in many generations of Divers from the Markor Citadel.

blacksteel_attire.name: Blacksteel Attire
blacksteel_attire.desc: Attire wrought from forged blacksteel. Its weight hardens the wearer's stance.

cala_mariner.name: Cala-Mariner
cala_mariner.desc: The tattoo sprawling across your chest serves as a physical memory of the aquatic foes you have felled, and as a keen warning to those who would stand in your way.

cerulean_gown.name: Cerulean Gown
cerulean_gown.desc: A bodiced sky-blue dress, with various tassels attached for decoration. Despite its initial elegant appearance, the fastened layered skirt, tight-cuffed shirt sleeves, and sturdy boots suggest the outfit is both stylish and functional, fit for both formal and perilous occasions.

cindergarb.name: Cindergarb
cindergarb.desc: Forged from fabric tempered in flame. Cindergard gathers shed embers enhancing your flamecharm ability.

cutthroat_light_armor.name: Cutthroat Light Armor
cutthroat_light_armor.desc: Sturdy leather armor, fashioned for the hunters sent into the driftlands to deal with rival factions.

darkened_bastion.name: Darkened Bastion
darkened_bastion.desc: A noble's armor, shattered and reforged into a sleek and dark ensemble. The essence of Shadowcast courses through its fibers like a living entity embedded within the fabric. When you lay your hand upon it, a disquieting sensation washes over you.

darksteel_plate.name: Darksteel Plate
darksteel_plate.desc: The durable battle armour of an Adretian soldier. The armour is specially forged by techniques developed in the Central Luminant, creating an uncharacteristically versatile armour plate.

diver_apprentice_robes.name: Diver Apprentice Robes
diver_apprentice_robes.desc: Robes of an Apprentice Diver. A robe weaved through the power of the Song, grants passable elemental defenses and ether regeneration.

diver_journeyman_robes.name: Diver Journeyman Robes
diver_journeyman_robes.desc: Crafted for experienced Divers, these robes signify one who has experienced the horrors of the Deep.

duelists_attire.name: Duelist's Attire
duelists_attire.desc: The attire of a duelist for sport.

eager_tradesman.name: Eager Tradesman
eager_tradesman.desc: There's work to be done. In style.

etrean_guard.name: Etrean Guard
etrean_guard.desc: Serpentine armor of the Kingdom of Etrea. A lightweight piece of plate sits atop padded snakeskin leather.

etrean_rogue.name: Etrean Rogue
etrean_rogue.desc: Sturdy leather armor, fashioned for the hunters sent down into Etrea's forest.

familiar_demons_armor.name: Familiar Demon's Armor
familiar_demons_armor.desc: So ya want to become a bossraid Oni...?

familiar_knights_armor.name: Familiar Knight's Armor
familiar_knights_armor.desc: You don't know why but a certain Murmur is making you very angry.

familiar_occulists_armor.name: Familiar Occulist's Armor
familiar_occulists_armor.desc: The visage of a five-eyed hound enters your mind unsolicited. Brr.

familiar_occultists_armor.name: Familiar Occultist's Armor
familiar_occultists_armor.desc: The visage of a five-eyed hound enters your mind unsolicited. Brr.

ferrymans_coat.name: Ferryman's Coat
ferrymans_coat.desc: Coat of the Krulian horror known as the Ferryman.

flame_worshipper_armor.name: Flame Worshipper Armor
flame_worshipper_armor.desc: Coat of the Covenant of Flame, pioneered by the Drowned Diver Amorus Pleeksty.

grand_pathfinder_cloak.name: Grand Pathfinder Cloak
grand_pathfinder_cloak.desc: A long coat hiding reptilian-like armored scales beneath. A pathfinder's pride.

hired_mercenary.name: Hired Mercenary
hired_mercenary.desc: A basic set of armor perfect for taking on the world!... Uhhhh... yeah.

hive_drone.name: Hive Drone
hive_drone.desc: Uniform of the Hive, threaded for powerful soldiers and researchers alike.

hive_leaders_garment.name: Hive Leader's Garment
hive_leaders_garment.desc: The royal robes of the King of the Hive, layered in protective material and luxurious cloth alike, a one-of-a-kind garb that can only be produced every millenia.

hive_tactician_armor.name: Hive Tactician Armor
hive_tactician_armor.desc: A fine coat interwoven with steel using Ironsing.

icebringers_vestments.name: Icebringer's Vestments
icebringers_vestments.desc: An elegant outfit favoured by expert Frostdrawers. The weavers and seamsters who typically make outfits of this kind are known for their secret techniques, which they use to imbue elemental resistances into the very fabrics they manufacture.

ignition_deepdelver.name: Ignition Deepdelver
ignition_deepdelver.desc: Heavyweight armor devised for deepdelvers into the layers of the Depths.

ignition_trailblazer.name: Ignition Trailblazer
ignition_trailblazer.desc: Garb for those aspiring to become Deepdelvers

ignition_welder.name: Ignition Welder
ignition_welder.desc: Sturdy workwear designed for heavy duty labour. Just remember - personal protective equipment doesn't make you invincible!

jade_vigils_weave.name: Jade Vigil's Weave
jade_vigils_weave.desc: Masters of the ancient Fang and Coil technique wear this robe as a tribute to their rich heritage. Its verdant weave once served as subtle camouflage, blending seamlessly into the wilds of a forgotten era.

jesters_garb.name: Jester's Garb
jesters_garb.desc: A lovely three-piece suit reminiscent of opulence, yet suggestions of prankish intention linger, woven within the argyle. At least if you make a fool of yourself, you're dressed for the part!

justicar_neophyte.name: Justicar Neophyte
justicar_neophyte.desc: Robes given to those who have just joined the journey to help others in need. These are woven to prioritize quick movement if needed.

legion_centurion.name: Legion Centurion
legion_centurion.desc: Armor worn by the honorary centurion of the legion, who excel in the ways of Gale Kata.

merchant_robes.name: Merchant Robes
merchant_robes.desc: A set of merchant robes, great for selling things not so great for battle.

mod_skirt.name: Mod Skirt
mod_skirt.desc: Just another day at the office.

mod_suit.name: Mod Suit
mod_suit.desc: Just another day at the office.

navaen_nomad_robes.name: Navaen Nomad Robes
navaen_nomad_robes.desc: Outfit of the Eastern Navaen Nomads. The frigid prisms crafted into this armor have been blessed by Navae, giving them defense against darkness and the cold

pathfinder_arch_sorcerer.name: Pathfinder Arch-Sorcerer
pathfinder_arch_sorcerer.desc: Robes of a full fledged Pathfinder Sorcerer. Grants excellent elemental defense and Ether regen.

pathfinder_cloak.name: Pathfinder Cloak
pathfinder_cloak.desc: A long coat hiding reptilian-like armored scales. A new pathfinder's pride.

ringing_scholars_garb.name: Ringing Scholar's Garb
ringing_scholars_garb.desc: Knell's refrabricated garb hails from when he was still himself, its designs steeped in his studies of oscillatory sound. Though he was not a resonant soul and the science imperfect in its time, the Indichite infusion is capable of amplifying the soul's resonance- powerful, but increasingly unstable.

royal_etrean_guard.name: Royal Etrean Guard
royal_etrean_guard.desc: The armor of the Royal Etrean Guard.

sanguine_finery.name: Sanguine Finery
sanguine_finery.desc: An elegant outfit favoured by expert Bloodrenders. The weavers and seamsters who typically make outfits of this kind are known for their secret techniques, which they use to imbue elemental resistances into the very fabrics they manufacture.

scholar.name: Scholar
scholar.desc: Perhaps one of a few too many words, at least by the reckoning of others.

seamstresss_attire.name: Seamstress's Attire
seamstresss_attire.desc: A simple yet skillfully decorated set of clothes, including a gorgeous layered and frilled skirt, as well as a ruffled shirt, topped off with a functional waistcoat. A garb favoured by craftsfolk - the little frills and ruffles are usually personal touches, showcasing wearer's skill with needle and thread.

shadow_hunter.name: Shadow Hunter
shadow_hunter.desc: A garb commonly worn by shadowy thieves and assassins, excellent for sneaking up on enemies.

skeptic_pioneer.name: Skeptic Pioneer
skeptic_pioneer.desc: A durable coat to protect you against the wear of the world.

soren.name: Soren
soren.desc: The signature outfit of Wishmakers, a group of Lightborn sorcerers now lost to time.

steel_plate.name: Steel Plate
steel_plate.desc: The durable battle armour of an Adretian soldier. The armour is specially forged by techniques developed in the Central Luminant, creating an uncharacteristically versatile armour plate.

stormchanters_raiments.name: Stormchanter's Raiments
stormchanters_raiments.desc: An elegant outfit favoured by expert Thundercallers. The weavers and seamsters who typically make outfits of this kind are known for their secret techniques, which they use to imbue elemental resistances into the very fabrics they manufacture.

stranded.name: Stranded
stranded.desc: Some have a rougher start than others.

stratos_cloak.name: Stratos' Cloak
stratos_cloak.desc: An honorable gift given in recognition of your heroism. Donning these robes represents the highest anointment granted within the Blade Temple.

summer_company_uniform.name: Summer Company Uniform
summer_company_uniform.desc: An easy to reproduce armor for the summer company grunts.

tempestmakers_threads.name: Tempestmaker's Threads
tempestmakers_threads.desc: An elegant outfit favoured by expert Galebreathers. The weavers and seamsters who typically make outfits of this kind are known for their secret techniques, which is to imbue elemental resistances into the very fabrics they manufacture.

titanslayers_adornment.name: Titanslayer's Adornment
titanslayers_adornment.desc: Your very own rightful spoils of war, a gilded adornment made of the furs and skins of Primadon, the mighty Titan of the East. Although the beast is poorly understood, one thing is for certain - its might is overwhelming. This attire is a testament to your victory against it... until the Titan rises again.

traveler_jacket.name: Traveler Jacket
traveler_jacket.desc: A well-worn jacket suitable for travelling.

travellers_jacket.name: Traveller's Jacket
travellers_jacket.desc: A well-worn jacket suitable for travelling.

tricksters_habit.name: Trickster's Habit
tricksters_habit.desc: Threaded with detailed embroidery and carefully pleated ruffles, this technically impressive garment is sure to turn heads. Frustratingly, the ladder-laced details are especially hard to keep neat-fashion before function.

troublemakers_overcoat.name: Troublemaker's Overcoat
troublemakers_overcoat.desc: A sturdy closed overcoat covering a wholesale ankle-high frock dress, with leather-reinforced shoulderpads and bracers. Perfect for those days when you're willing to dish out a bruising, but don't want your favourite dress to be ruined in the scrapping.

varicosan_finery.name: Varicosan Finery
varicosan_finery.desc: A gorgeously fitted remnant of high Celtorian society. Fashion speaks louder than words - what more is there to say?

verdant_sniper.name: Verdant Sniper
verdant_sniper.desc: Armor once worn by a renowned master of the bow.

veteran_adventurer.name: Veteran Adventurer
veteran_adventurer.desc: With all this experience, how could you possibly be a bad guy?

vigil_initiate.name: Vigil Initiate
vigil_initiate.desc: Initiate of the Vigil. A warrior must walk the path before being granted the cloak of winds.

warders_attire.name: Warder's Attire
warders_attire.desc: Although Warders take a more passive approach to aiding those they wish to see walk the path, they still don armor in preparation for battle, should they need to step onto the front lines.

whaler_coat.name: Whaler Coat
whaler_coat.desc: Coat and pseudo-uniform of Eylis' gang of Assassins. The appearance of these men from the Central Luminant marks harsh times for Etrea.

whaler_initiate.name: Whaler Initiate
whaler_initiate.desc: Coat and pseudo-uniform of Eylis' gang of assassins. The appearance of these men from the Central Luminant marks harsh times for Etrea.

white_mod_suit.name: White Mod Suit
white_mod_suit.desc: Fashioned after the Dragon of Dojima.

windrunner_robes.name: Windrunner Robes
windrunner_robes.desc: The flowing robes of a Jetstriker, said to assist in attuning oneself to the Flow of the Song

wishmaker.name: Wishmaker
wishmaker.desc: The signature outfit of Wishmakers, a group of Lightborn sorcerers now lost to time.

chime.name: Chime
chime.opts:
Free:
# we should really get these
20; NEURO := 35r wll or 35r cha or 35r int

15; TO_THE_FINISH := 50 ftd
15; EXOSKELETON := 40 ftd

12; OLD_HABITS_DIE_HARD := 20 wll

12; PERFECT_FLASH := 25 int
12; TOUGH_LOVE := 25 cha

# really optional stuff
1; BATTLE_TENDENCY := 15 ftd, 15 wll
3; MAGICAL_RESOLVE := 15 ftd, 40 wll
1; EUREKA := 30 int
1; MASTER_CRAFTSMEN := 45 int
1; GOLDEN_TONGUE := 40 cha
3; CHAOTIC_CHARM := 55 cha
1; MANIPULATOR := 60 cha
1; THEATRICS := 75 cha

Post:

blood_scourge.name: Blood Scourge
blood_scourge.desc: Conjure a swirling mass of chaotic energy that will drain the life out of your foes.

chorus_divide.name: Chorus Divide
chorus_divide.desc: Using your bell to channel your energy into a high pressure beam.

dimensional_travel.name: Dimensional Travel
dimensional_travel.desc: Slip into an alternate dimension that exists alongside our own.

gravity_field.name: Gravity Field
gravity_field.desc: Conjure a gravity field that cripples your foes.

jar_of_souls.name: Jar of Souls
jar_of_souls.desc: Consume the souls of your enemies and unleash them in devastating attacks.

paralytic_dust.name: Paralytic Dust
paralytic_dust.desc: Throws a dust cloud that applies the Sleeping and Daze status effects.

payback.name: Payback
payback.desc: Pay back your enemies for the damage they deal to you.

portals.name: Portals
portals.desc: Dive into a portal and emerge from a different point a few seconds later.

preservation.name: Preservation
preservation.desc: Conjure a protective energy that will guide those fallen in battle towards you.

resurrection.name: Resurrection
resurrection.desc: Bless targeted allies on the battlefield that revives them when defeated.

run_it_back.name: Run It Back
run_it_back.desc: Set down a marker in space and time, returning to it after a duration.

sacred_field.name: Sacred Field
sacred_field.desc: Conjure a field of sacred light, protecting you and your allies from harm.

shard_bow.name: Shard Bow
shard_bow.desc: Conjure a mythical bow that hails down crystallized arrows.

skeleton_key.name: Skeleton Key
skeleton_key.desc: Summon skeletal barriers that trap opponents and launch them across the battlefield.

smite.name: Smite
smite.desc: Summon a halo of rotating orbs that will strike your foes automatically.

smokescreen.name: Smokescreen
smokescreen.desc: Create a smokescreen for a diversion!

wind_up.name: Wind-Up
wind_up.desc: Wind up your arm, and unleash the shattering power on your foes.

a_world_without_song.name: A World Without Song
a_world_without_song.additional_info: The hit count required to proc this Talent is increased to 4 if you have less than 75 Galebreathe, and increased to 5 if you have less than 40 Galebreathe.
a_world_without_song.desc: Every 3 hits with a Wind Mantra now procs Suffocating.

absolute_force.name: Absolute Force
absolute_force.desc: Evolve the technique of your Oppressive Force, letting both hits of your flourish deal 50% more posture damage.

absolute_pitch.name: Absolute Pitch
absolute_pitch.additional_info: If you have less than 100 Intelligence, this will instead halve the required Ritual Keys (rounded up).
absolute_pitch.desc: You can cast Ritual Mantras instantly.

absolute_radiance.name: Absolute Radiance
absolute_radiance.additional_info: All elemental status effects cannot be applied to you during Absolute Radiance.
absolute_radiance.desc: Dealing damage with Dawnwalker mantras briefly makes you immune to all elemental effects for a short period.

acceleration_points.name: Acceleration Points
acceleration_points.desc: Striking an opponent in the back with mobility mantras or Basic Attacks now steals and grants additional momentum.

action_surge.name: Action Surge
action_surge.additional_info: Both this and Vigil's Grace are applied before Lightning Cloak's swing speed multiplier.
action_surge.desc: Adrenaline Surge now increases your swing speed by 0.04 for its duration.

actions_speak_louder.name: Actions Speak Louder
actions_speak_louder.additional_info: In 1v1 Chime of Conflict, your critical cooldown is reduced by 10% instead.
actions_speak_louder.desc: Your Critical Attack cooldown is 20% shorter, but your Resonance cooldown is 20% longer. In areas where your Resonance is suppressed, reduce your cooldown by 10% instead.

acute_hearing.name: Acute Hearing
acute_hearing.additional_info: Your Echolocation now has a sound effect on proc.
acute_hearing.desc: After years of using Echolocation, you've trained your ears to sense danger from even further away. You are also able to sense when someone completes a job.

ad_astra.name: Ad Astra
ad_astra.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that allows you to travel to and from The Floating Keep.

adept_bloodrender.name: Adept Bloodrender
adept_bloodrender.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
adept_bloodrender.desc: You can now obtain 1-star Bloodrender mantras.

adept_flamecharmer.name: Adept Flamecharmer
adept_flamecharmer.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
adept_flamecharmer.desc: You can now obtain 1-Star Leveled Flamecharmer Mantras.

adept_frostdrawer.name: Adept Frostdrawer
adept_frostdrawer.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
adept_frostdrawer.desc: You can now obtain 1-Star Leveled Frostdrawer Mantras.

adept_galebreather.name: Adept Galebreather
adept_galebreather.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
adept_galebreather.desc: You can now obtain 1-Star Leveled Galebreathe mantras.

adept_ironsinger.name: Adept Ironsinger
adept_ironsinger.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
adept_ironsinger.desc: You can now obtain 1-star Ironsinger mantras.

adept_shadowcaster.name: Adept Shadowcaster
adept_shadowcaster.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
adept_shadowcaster.desc: You can now obtain 1-star Leveled Shadowcaster Mantras.

adept_thundercaller.name: Adept Thundercaller
adept_thundercaller.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
adept_thundercaller.desc: You can now obtain 1-star Thundercaller mantras.

aerogliding.name: Aerogliding
aerogliding.additional_info: When active, create an aura that reduces fall speed and stops fall damage. Automatically ends after 5 seconds.
aerogliding.desc: When falling from a high place, hold spacebar to generate wind currents until you hit the floor.

aeronade.name: Aeronade
aeronade.additional_info: Galetrap normally waits for contact with a target to begin its tornado, Galetrap now detonates once the trap stops moving.
aeronade.desc: Your Galetrap automatically detonates on contact with an object.

after_cut.name: After Cut
after_cut.additional_info: The damage After Cut deals is based on the attack's modified damage.
after_cut.desc: If an attack is physical and wind it will apply an after cut that does 10% of the damage you dealt. If an attack was a mantra, it does 5% damage instead.

against_all_odds.name: Against All Odds
against_all_odds.desc: For each combat tag you have on your character, increase your damage by 2% (max of 14%).

agility_unbounded.name: Agility Unbounded
agility_unbounded.additional_info: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Agility Attribute. The requirements to obtain this Talent will be increased to 77 or 78 if your Aspect has increased Agility on spawn, though this limitation will be removed if you have the Multifaceted Echo Unlock. The quest requirement for this Talent will be removed if you've obtained it previously on your account.
agility_unbounded.desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your agility to its fullest.

agitating_spark.name: Agitating Spark
agitating_spark.additional_info: On proc, a small orange particle will trail between the burning target you hit and other targets nearby, setting them on fire and granting Emperor Flame stacks. Agitating Spark bypasses block and parry. Agitating Spark procs from self damage do not apply burn. 1 second cooldown.
agitating_spark.desc: Applying Burning to enemies spreads to anyone nearby. Including yourself.

air_pressure.name: Air Pressure
air_pressure.desc: Dodging an attack or hitting an enemy's block will transform your next dash into a Gale Dash. Gale Dashes carry you further than regular dashes and have extended iframes, but will clear immediately should you initiate an attack.

all_above_gods_below.name: All Above, Gods Below
all_above_gods_below.additional_info: Only applies to "active" healing. The duration of this effect will be reduced if you do not meet the Talent's requirements. This will not proc if you are the one who applied the healing; you cannot heal yourself by healing your opponent.
all_above_gods_below.desc: Any healing your opponent were to receive while All The Dead Gods is active on them is stolen and given to you, increase your PvE Heal Boost to 15% as well.

all_knowing.name: All Knowing
all_knowing.desc: Your prediction now ignores the range requirement to reflect attacks.

all_seeing_eye.name: All-Seeing Eye
all_seeing_eye.additional_info: Invisible players, including yourself, and monsters are revealed by a Blindseer Eye icon showcasing their current position.
all_seeing_eye.desc: The mystic eye through which you now see the world can perceive the imperceptible. Invisible foes are highlighted.

all_the_dead_gods.name: All the Dead Gods
all_the_dead_gods.additional_info: Whenever you land a Basic Attack, the target has most healing forms reduced/disabled for 8 seconds. Your anti-heal potency scales on your Willpower + Intelligence investment, only having 100% anti-heal if your Intelligence and Willpower attributes add up to at least 105.
all_the_dead_gods.desc: Your Basic Attacks now apply anti-heal and 5% Heal Boost against PvE for 8s.

alloy_of_the_heavens.name: Alloy of the Heavens
alloy_of_the_heavens.additional_info: Reduces posture damage taken from mobs by 50%.
alloy_of_the_heavens.desc: Posture attack from mobs reduced by 50%

alloy_siphon.name: Alloy Siphon
alloy_siphon.desc: Iron Pull siphons armor from your foes, restoring your posture.

alloyblood.name: Alloyblood
alloyblood.additional_info: The effects of Alloyblood scale linearly with Ironsing investment, losing 0.3% bleed damage reduction and 0.75% blood loss damage reduction for every point in Ironsing below 100. Blood loss reduction is less effective if you are using the Curse of the No Life King Enchantment and stacks multiplicatively with Cauterized Wounds. The blood loss reduction does not affect blood drain effects like casting or being hit by Bloodrend Mantras, blood drain potions, and the blood loss Corrupt Resonance downside.
alloyblood.desc: You don't bleed like others do. Bleed damage reduced by 30%. Blood loss is reduced by 75%.

alloyed_soles.name: Alloyed Soles
alloyed_soles.desc: Reduces the duration of Knockdown applied to you.

already_dead.name: Already Dead
already_dead.additional_info: Removes the self damage from Deepspindle's running critical. Reduces the self damage from Shade Devour, Flame Within (on cast, NOT the burn ticks), Rush Hour, Shadow Travel, Electrify, and 'Poison' Corrupt Resonance downside. Reduces the self Wither gain from Symbiotic Link and the 'Wither' Corrupt Resonance downside.
already_dead.desc: You take reduced damage from abilities with a health cost.

ambush.name: Ambush
ambush.desc: When coming out of Tacet, gain a 30% damage boost for 5 seconds.

amp_overdrive.name: Amp Overdrive
amp_overdrive.additional_info: Deals 15 Thundercall damage. The Electrify status effect changes your opponent's damage type to Thundercall and gives you 10% damage reduction to their attacks.
amp_overdrive.desc: Guardbreaking an opponent causes them to take extra thunder damage and applies Electrify for 7 seconds.

amplified_rage.name: Amplified Rage
amplified_rage.additional_info: Increases Amped's damage buff from 10% to 20%.
amplified_rage.desc: Amped now grants you an additional +10% weapon damage.

amplified_reflexes.name: Amplified Reflexes
amplified_reflexes.additional_info: Increases the self damage from casting Electrify from 5% of your current health to 15% of your current health. Increases Electrify's cooldown to 2 minutes. While Amped, your walk speed will be increased by 50% and your climb height will be increased by 15%.
amplified_reflexes.desc: Amped now grants enhanced speed and parkour, but triples the self-damage on use and doubles its cooldown.

an_ironsingers_instinct.name: An Ironsinger's Instinct
an_ironsingers_instinct.additional_info: Grants 60% damage reduction for 2 seconds. Ends early if you take damage. 18 second cooldown.
an_ironsingers_instinct.desc: Successfully dodging an attack coats you in metal and reduces the damage of the next attack taken.

analyze.name: Analyze
analyze.desc: Marking enemies with your Callout analyzes them, making them take 20% more damage from all sources for 10 seconds.

anchor_shock.name: Anchor Shock
anchor_shock.additional_info: This puts your opponent's mobility slot Mantras on a 3 second cooldown whenever Blightshock is applied from a Blightsurger Mantra.
anchor_shock.desc: Your Blightshock prevents targets from using mobility mantras.

ancient_metalwork.name: Ancient Metalwork
ancient_metalwork.additional_info: Landing your weapon critical puts your opponent's Resonance on a 25 second cooldown.
ancient_metalwork.desc: Your critical hit can channel the effects of your Ironsing Rods and disrupt the resonances of others, disabling them for 25 seconds.

angels_guise.name: Angel's Guise
angels_guise.additional_info: Grants immunity to the Watcher's Watcher Gaze attack, preventing Sanity loss, vision distortion, and the spawning of Hollow Angel(s). Additionally grants unique dialogue with the Watchers.
angels_guise.desc: You resemble one of the Sworn Angels.

ankle_cutter.name: Ankle Cutter
ankle_cutter.additional_info: Deals 37.5 Oath damage. If in Flow State, this is increased to 52.5 and the windup is reduced. Has innate bleed. 6 second cooldown.
ankle_cutter.desc: You can now do a special ground slash while sliding, applying a temporary speed debuff to those hit, as well as preventing jumping.

another_mans_trash.name: Another Man's Trash
another_mans_trash.additional_info: If the player you are mugging doesn't have any Notes, you will still take any unequipped equipment. You cannot steal Soulbound or Enchanted items. Gain +0.001% damage for every 1 Weight you're carrying. Every 100 Weight = +1% damage.
another_mans_trash.desc: Take unequipped equipment when mugging a player. Gain a little more damage against PvE the more you are currently carrying.

antithetic_salts.name: Antithetic Salts
antithetic_salts.additional_info: Gives you a Talent tool-like ability that acts as a potion ingredient on use. When applied to your potions, it inverts the effects of the ingredients in the potion.
antithetic_salts.desc: Alter your brews to invert their effects. Does not count towards the ingredient limit.

apothecary.name: Apothecary
apothecary.additional_info: Additively increases potion Potency by 125%. Acts similarly to a potion ingredient, remaining active if you no longer have the Talent.
apothecary.desc: Potions you prepare will have amplified positive effects when consumed, and amplified negative effects when thrown.

apparitions.name: Apparitions
apparitions.additional_info: Apparitions can only spawn from Haunted Gale being procced on Galebreathe Mantras or by proccing effects that would normally apply Suffocation.
apparitions.desc: Your Haunted Phantoms become Apparitions that apply Winded on hit. Apparitions cannot be parried if you are in Phantom Step.

approaching_singularity.name: Approaching Singularity
approaching_singularity.additional_info: Gives 0.1% Mantra PEN per point in Intelligence.
approaching_singularity.desc: You now gain +1% Mantra PEN for every 10 point of Intelligence.

arc_module_dash.name: Arc Module: Dash
arc_module_dash.additional_info: Jet dashes go much further than regular dashes. Also allows the user to M1 while performing a dash, ending their dash early.
arc_module_dash.desc: [In Arc Suit] Your dashes become Jet Dashes, allowing you to attack while dashing.

arc_module_eject.name: Arc Module: Eject
arc_module_eject.additional_info: Your posture will be set to 50% on activation.
arc_module_eject.desc: [In Arc Suit] When blockbroken, eject from your suit.

arc_module_enhance.name: Arc Module: Enhance
arc_module_enhance.additional_info: Arc Beam's base dmg is increased by 50%, Arc Wave's base damage is increased by 25%.
arc_module_enhance.desc: [In Arc Suit] Your Arcwarder Mantras deal increased damage.

arc_module_guard.name: Arc Module: Guard
arc_module_guard.additional_info: Prevents "backhit" Talents from proccing and grants 360 block against all attacks.
arc_module_guard.desc: [In Arc Suit] You can block attacks from any direction and cannot be backstabbed.

arc_module_leap.name: Arc Module: Leap
arc_module_leap.additional_info: 10 second CD outside of combat, 15 second CD in combat.
arc_module_leap.desc: [In Arc Suit] Holding Spacebar after double jumping propels you up for a short duration.

arc_module_null.name: Arc Module: Null
arc_module_null.desc: [In Arc Suit] Outgoing and incoming enchant effects are nullified. Can be toggled with N.

ardour_scream.name: Ardour Scream
ardour_scream.additional_info: Consumes 100% of your Ether on use. Ardour Scream requires you to have a minimum of 100% Ether to be casted. Having the Soul Infusion Talent will reduce this to a minimum of 40% Ether.  Combat tags opponents hit. Notably, its damage and posture damage buffs are applied on-hit to incoming attacks rather than being a debuff that increases damage/posture damage taken, meaning Ardour Scream is affected by the damage and posture damage modifier caps. Also has a 95-Stud range (245 if Soulbreaker),
ardour_scream.desc: Amplify your shout into a scream using Ardour, dominating weaker foes, Victims take 12.5% more damage and 50% more posture damage for 10s.

armor_conserver.name: Armor Conserver
armor_conserver.additional_info: Does not affect Natural Armor from Exoskeleton and Chitin.
armor_conserver.desc: You lose 15% less armor when hit.

armor_piercing.name: Armor Piercing
armor_piercing.additional_info: This has heavy diminishing returns in effectiveness with the more PEN you have. Elemental guns may not benefit from this Talent at all depending on your opponent's resistances, as the highest resistance value is prioritized.
armor_piercing.desc: [Guns] Your gun attacks now ignore 10% of an opponent's blunt armor. Applied Multiplicatively before PEN is applied.

armored_plating.name: Armored Plating
armored_plating.desc: Put on extra plating on your armor, giving you 50 temp health whenever you are put in combat. Due to the weight of this additional plating, you have reduced speed at all times.

aromatic_salts.name: Aromatic Salts
aromatic_salts.additional_info: Gives you a Talent tool-like ability that acts as a potion ingredient on use. This changes your thrown potions to a lingering cloud that lasts for 10 seconds, applying the potion's effects on each hit.
aromatic_salts.desc: Alter your brews to create lingering clouds of mist on shattering. Does not count towards the ingredient limit.

art_of_the_deal.name: Art of the Deal
art_of_the_deal.additional_info: Reduces the purchase price of items by 10%.
art_of_the_deal.desc: Your rapport with merchants gives you lower prices!

artisan_chef.name: Artisan Chef
artisan_chef.additional_info: Increases food nutritional value by 25%. Increases the healing gained from using Fondant Splitter's critical.
artisan_chef.desc: The food you cook now becomes Artisan food, increasing its hunger and thirst gained by +25%.

artisans_blade.name: Artisan's Blade
artisans_blade.additional_info: Each Artisan Blade has 8 Base damage with 5 Ironsing scaling, gaining 0.04 damage per Ironsing investment. Artisan Rods deal 4.5 posture damage if blocked. Pulling rods normally also procs this Talent. "Metal infused attacks" refers to Ironsing legendary weapon attacks.
artisans_blade.desc: Activating Scrapsinger forges a metal blade behind you for every 2 rods you consume. Metal blades will fire at a target upon landing an ironsing or metal infused attack.

ascended_phoenix_flames.name: Ascended Phoenix Flames
ascended_phoenix_flames.desc: Once per fight, when an attack would down you immediately revive with 30% HP.

ash_ember.name: Ash Ember
ash_ember.reqs: ash_ember := 90r LHT OR 90r MED OR 90r HVY, 90s FLM
ash_ember.additional_info: At 90 FLM 90 WPN you gain a 0.0175 burn damage increase per 1 point of wither. This has very slight Flamecharm and Weapon scaling.
ash_ember.desc: The more wither your opponent has, the more damage your burn deals.

assassins_strike.name: Assassin's Strike
assassins_strike.additional_info: Doubles the base damage of Rapid Slashes.
assassins_strike.desc: Your Rapid Slashes now deals twice the amount of damage.

audacity.name: Audacity
audacity.additional_info: Applies true stun to nearby enemies when you start a manual execution on a humanoid target. 25 second cooldown. The buff duration will be reduced by 0.1 seconds for every point of Charisma and Strength you are below Audacity's requirements, capping at a minimum 35 second duration with 75 Charisma and 25 Strength.
audacity.desc: Once you've brought down your prey, instill fear into all those who would separate you from claiming it. Charmed or nearby enemies will fear for longer. Nearby allies gain a 10% damage buff (40s).

authority_ensign.name: Authority Ensign
authority_ensign.desc: You are a member of the Authority deployed to the Eastern Luminant. You may find trouble with the local factions and must become stronger through advancing the Authority's position.

authority_intimidation.name: Authority Intimidation
authority_intimidation.desc: Lightning moves slow your opponent more.

avaricious_blade.name: Avaricious Blade
avaricious_blade.additional_info: Dealing damage by any means gives 1 Note, with backhits giving 50 Notes instead. This can proc on self damage.
avaricious_blade.desc: Every strike landed lines your pockets.

azure_flames.name: Azure Flames
azure_flames.additional_info: Increases burn damage by 12.5%. Increases the radius and posture damage of Eruptions. Increases Flame of Denial's duration by 25%.
azure_flames.desc: Many of your flames turn blue, signifying their increased intensity.

backstabber.name: Backstabber
backstabber.additional_info: Has no range limit. Also procs on criticals with the M1 tag and Silentheart abilities. Applies daze and ragdolls.
backstabber.desc: Landing a backhit with a light attack causes you to grab your opponent and stab them again, dealing an extra 15 damage.

bane.name: Bane
bane.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that on use allows you to teleport to your opponent when you M1 for 20 seconds. The teleportation has a range limit of 25 studs. Additionally grants a speed boost for the full duration. 100 second cooldown.
bane.desc: Activate to make your light attacks teleport to the closest enemy nearby.

barbers_skillset.name: Barber's Skillset
barbers_skillset.additional_info: Gives a Talent tool that opens an outdated version of the Barber UI. When selecting others: Changes what haircut your Fadetrimmer Mantras apply on hit. When selecting yourself: Changes your own hair.
barbers_skillset.desc: What type of look are we going for today?

barrage_mastery.name: Barrage Mastery
barrage_mastery.additional_info: Increases the projectile count of Ether Barrage based on how many stacks of Ether Erudite you have.
barrage_mastery.desc: For every Ether Erudite stack you have, gain one extra orb whenever you fire your Ether Barrage.

battery_sapper.name: Battery Sapper
battery_sapper.desc: If your Human Battery targets have Ether, it will drain their Ether to help pay for your Mantras. 10s cooldown.

battle_frenzy.name: Battle Frenzy
battle_frenzy.additional_info: This reduces the posture damage of incoming Mantras by 1 per hit, per combat tag you have. If you have more combat tags than the Mantra does posture damage, this can go into the negatives and your posture will be restored instead.
battle_frenzy.desc: The grip on your weapon tightens, reduce the posture of all mantras you block with this effect scaling with the number of combat tags you have on your character.

battle_hardened.name: Battle-Hardened
battle_hardened.desc: Reduce how much damage you take from mantra guardbreaks by 20%.

battle_tendency.name: Battle Tendency
battle_tendency.additional_info: This only affects passive posture regeneration.
battle_tendency.desc: You can breathe more easily with +20% faster posture regen.

bear_trap.name: Bear Trap
bear_trap.additional_info: Affected targets cannot jump for 4 seconds. Targets gain 6 seconds of Bear Trap immunity.
bear_trap.desc: Landing a hit with your critical against an opponent makes your opponent unable to jump for a duration. Also slows your opponent.

beginners_luck.name: Beginner's Luck
beginners_luck.desc: Slightly increase the amount of loot you find in chests.

behind_you.name: Behind You
behind_you.additional_info: This deals a separate instance of physical damage, scaling on your weapon's damage and your current Ether%.
behind_you.desc: Landing a basic attack behind your enemy after feinting a mantra will apply an ether slash, dealing extra damage based on how much ether you have left.

beiruuls_vengeance.name: Beiruul's Vengeance
beiruuls_vengeance.desc: Deal 5% more damage to factions that despise you. Serves them right.

belief.name: Belief
belief.additional_info: All of your Medium Weapon Mantras gain a second damage instance that scales directly on your Willpower investment and deals physical damage. This deals 0.15 damage per 1 Willpower investment, up to 15 damage at 100 Willpower or 15.45 at 103 Willpower. This has no cooldown.
belief.desc: Your medium weapon mantras now deal extra damage based on how much Willpower you have.

benefactor.name: Benefactor
benefactor.additional_info: Grants faction reputation upon selling items to their respective Antiquarian.
benefactor.desc: Gain reputation for selling goods to Antiquarians within faction territories.

berserk.name: Berserk
berserk.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that nullifies your armor and natural armor on use. While active, your M1s nullify your opponent's armor, and your criticals gain +10% PEN. This procs effects that only activate if you or your opponent had no armor durability. Lasts 20 seconds, halved to 10 if you do not meet the Talent requirements.
berserk.desc: One with nothing to lose has everything to gain. Succumb to burning rage within and enter Berserk State.

biotic_salts.name: Biotic Salts
biotic_salts.additional_info: Gives you a Talent tool-like ability that acts as a potion ingredient on use. This halves the negative effects of your potion if used on allies (including yourself) and halves the positive effects of your potions if used on enemies.
biotic_salts.desc: Alter your brews to not provide their positive effects to your enemies. Does not count towards the ingredient limit.

blackhole.name: Blackhole
blackhole.additional_info: Pulls anyone nearby in a medium sized aoe to the closest opponent you hit with a shadow mantra.
blackhole.desc: Your singularity pulls everyone nearby in.

blade_dancer.name: Blade Dancer
blade_dancer.desc: Landing a Basic Attack removes your roll cooldown.

blade_scholar.name: Blade Scholar
blade_scholar.desc: Landing your fist critical attack switches your stance to that fist style. Retain the same swing speed and damage your Markor's Inheritor had. You gain more swingspeed the more Intelligence you have.

blade_threading.name: Blade Threading
blade_threading.desc: Your Metal Greatsword now has Metal Fakeout as its critical attack. Landing Critical attacks applies metal rod and slow.
blade_threading.additional_info: The Metal Fakeout critical will only be used while you are in targeting range. Additionally, this attack has innate Bleed and counts as a weapon attack, not a Mantra.

blades_edge.name: Blade's Edge
blades_edge.additional_info: The "tip of the spear" is the end of your weapon's range.
blades_edge.desc: [Spears] Damage dealt with the tip of the spear is increased by 10%

blend_in.name: Blend In
blend_in.additional_info: Most monsters in the Depths will be neutral you while you have this equipment on.
blend_in.desc: You resemble one of the Enforcers, become unnoticeable by regular depths mobs.

blessing_of_the_moonseye.name: Blessing of the Moonseye
blessing_of_the_moonseye.additional_info: Upon obtaining this Talent, you will lose all of your Sanity permanently. Defeating the three main progression bosses while having this Talent will unlock the Prince of the Moon Memento.
blessing_of_the_moonseye.desc: The Moonseye is not one eye, but many. All of them watch you. All of them know of your sins.

blight_pierce.name: Blight Pierce
blight_pierce.additional_info: Blightshock now works similar to regular Shock, canceling hyperarmor.
blight_pierce.desc: Your Blightshock attacks pierce through your enemies hyperarmor and gain more penetration.

blighted_song.name: Blighted Song
blighted_song.additional_info: Grants the user and the chained opponent 20% damage reduction against outside attacks.
blighted_song.desc: Attaching your Shadow Chains to enemies disables yours and the enemy's ability to cast mantras. You take reduced damage from enemies while this is applied.

blighted_touch.name: Blighted Touch
blighted_touch.additional_info: This allows your Sovereign Bangle to apply Wither on hit.
blighted_touch.desc: Landing Basic Attacks during Sovereign State now applies Blightshock.

blightlash.name: Blightlash
blightlash.additional_info: Increases the range of the Sovereign Bangle from 6 to 7.
blightlash.desc: Your swing range is enhanced during Sovereign State.

blind_spot.name: Blind Spot
blind_spot.desc: [Land Critical Attack or Hidden Blade] Apply Blinded for 5 seconds.

blinded.name: Blinded
blinded.additional_info: Makes everything darker and creates fog at long distances. Grants immunity to the Flame Blind and Gaze Mantras.
blinded.desc: Your vision is obscured by something. Somehow, you feel safer. You remember the warmth of your youth.

blinkstep.name: Blinkstep
blinkstep.additional_info: If you have 90% or more Ether, your regular dash will be replaced with a Blinkstep. This has much more distance than a regular dash. Consumes Ether on use.
blinkstep.desc: Your regular dash is enhanced into a Blinkstep above 90% ether but now has an ether cost.

blitz.name: Blitz
blitz.additional_info: Decreases Prominence Draw's windup by 0.1s (from 0.55s to 0.45s).
blitz.desc: Increase how quick you release your Prominence Draw.

blood_and_iron.name: Blood and Iron
blood_and_iron.desc: Pulling rods out of your opponent now replenishes an equivalent amount of blood.

blood_bag.name: Blood Bag
blood_bag.desc: You receive extra blood from knocking an enemy.

blood_bank.name: Blood Bank
blood_bank.additional_info: Grants 25 Temporary Health on proc. This Talent only procs via Donation Drive and Manipulator. Has an indirect 10 second cooldown due to it relying on Manipulator.
blood_bank.desc: Consuming 'Charm' now gives slight temporary health.

blood_convergence.name: Blood Convergence
blood_convergence.desc: Receive 10% more healing from all healing sources when you have temp health.

blood_drinker.name: Blood Drinker
blood_drinker.additional_info: Restores 4% of the user's maximum health upon landing M1 attacks. The "bleed" is a unique damage over time status effect that is not bleed. This deals 6 damage per tick and ticks 5 times over 5 seconds. This can proc on Motif-given critical attacks. If you are knocked during the duration of this "bleed" effect, you will be instantly gripped.
blood_drinker.desc: Recover health on hit. When landing a critical, deal 30 bleed damage over 5 seconds.

blood_necrosis.name: Blood Necrosis
blood_necrosis.additional_info: You will now need a scaled damage of 75 to hit the regular Bloodless Gem heal cap of 15.
blood_necrosis.desc: Your bloodless gems heal 33% less than usual.

blood_pact.name: Blood Pact
blood_pact.desc: Gain 50 bonus temporary health whenever you knock/kill an enemy.

blood_plague.name: Blood Plague
blood_plague.additional_info: M1s apply stacks of Blood Plague. On critical, all Blood Plague stacks will be consumed to grant Temporary Health if your critical attack lands, with the amount of Temporary Health given scaling on the stacks of Blood Plague. The stacks of Blood Plague will be consumed regardless of if your critical attack lands, however.
blood_plague.desc: For every light attack you land, add one Blood Plague stack on your opponent. Landing a Critical Attack converts all Blood Plague stacks into temporary health but missing the attack loses them.

blood_siphon.name: Blood Siphon
blood_siphon.desc: Your Critical Attack now siphons a bit of health, healing you 10% of the damage you dealt.

blood_thirsty.name: Blood Thirsty
blood_thirsty.desc: Gain a speed boost after causing an opponent heavy blood loss.

blood_transfusion.name: Blood Transfusion
blood_transfusion.desc: Successfully landing a critical attack while under a negative status effect will transfer the effect plus recover a small portion of your blood bar.

bloodiron_spirit.name: Bloodiron Spirit
bloodiron_spirit.additional_info: Restores 2.5% of your maximum armor upon executing an enemy.
bloodiron_spirit.desc: You regain some Armor upon killing enemies.

bloodless_overdrive.name: Bloodless Overdrive
bloodless_overdrive.desc: Gain bonus temp health every time you land a mantra with a Bloodless Gem.

bloodrend_unbounded.name: Bloodrend Unbounded
bloodrend_unbounded.additional_info: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Bloodrend Attribute. This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
bloodrend_unbounded.desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Bloodrend to its fullest.

bloodrender.name: Bloodrender
bloodrender.desc: Grants you the ability to command Blood as a Bloodrender. Your Bloodrend mantras replenish your blood, steal blood and apply 'Blood Poisoning'.

bloodwardens_sense.name: Bloodwarden's Sense
bloodwardens_sense.additional_info: Adds a red highlight to the player.
bloodwardens_sense.desc: Enemies you attack with a mantra above 60% Blood Poisoning are highlighted red briefly. Enemies who are highlighted red take 20% more blood poisoning.

blossoming_darkness.name: Blossoming Darkness
blossoming_darkness.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
blossoming_darkness.desc: The more Ether you drain during Shadow Roar, the bigger it gets.

bodkin_arrow.name: Bodkin Arrow
bodkin_arrow.desc: Your charged shots now do extra armor damage to armored enemies and extra damage to unarmored enemies.

boiling_point.name: Boiling Point
boiling_point.additional_info: Deals 10 typeless damage. This cannot be parried nor blocked. Procs when you hit the Steam cloud with your Flamecharm Mantra, meaning your opponent can parry your Mantra and this will still proc.
boiling_point.desc: Using a fire mantra near your own steam cloud detonates it.

both_ends.name: Both Ends
both_ends.additional_info: The followup attack has fast swing speed, but it only deals 45% of your weapon damage.
both_ends.desc: Pressing M2 after landing a light attack with the staff performs a follow-up swing from the opposite end.

bottom_freeze.name: Bottom Freeze
bottom_freeze.additional_info: Prevents you from rotating your character and moving around overall. Taking damage from any source will end Bottom Freeze early.
bottom_freeze.desc: Hitting chilled enemies with Ice Projectiles while they are on ice freezes them to the ground.

braced_collapse.name: Braced Collapse
braced_collapse.additional_info: After being block broken, reduce the next instance of damage by 20%. This has no cooldown.
braced_collapse.desc: After being block broken, the next attack to hit you deals reduced damage.

brain_death.name: Brain Death
brain_death.additional_info: Applies a new stack of suffocation on proc.
brain_death.desc: Enemies that are already suffocated will have their suffocation duration extended when hit by a bloodrend mantra.

brain_rattler.name: Brain Rattler
brain_rattler.desc: [Clubs] Guardbreaking an opponent with your Critical rattles their brain in its container, causing increased blood loss, applies Stagger to PvE enemies and blurs their vision.

brassneck.name: Brassneck
brassneck.additional_info: Works on non-humanoid monsters, applying the damage reduction after they die.
brassneck.desc: Knocking an enemy grants you 20% damage resistance for 15 seconds.

brazen_blow.name: Brazen Blow
brazen_blow.additional_info: Only procs on weapon attacks. Does not proc on uppercut. 20 second cooldown.
brazen_blow.desc: [Greataxes] Attacking an enemy slowed by your Greataxe grants you temporary hyperarmor.

breakthrough.name: Breakthrough
breakthrough.additional_info: Increases the posture damage of M1s by 10%.
breakthrough.desc: Posture damage on light attacks are increased by 10%.

breakthrough_drive.name: Breakthrough Drive
breakthrough_drive.desc: Knocking a player refreshes your Glorious Charge cooldown and extends both effects it has by 5 seconds. [90 second CD]

breathing_exercise.name: Breathing Exercise
breathing_exercise.additional_info: Your passive sanity regen is increased by 50%.
breathing_exercise.desc: Your sanity recovers more quickly once out of terrifying situations.

breathing_impact.name: Breathing Impact
breathing_impact.additional_info: The increased damage dealt is based on the attack's initial damage and your opponent's acceleration.
breathing_impact.desc: When knocked into objects by wind mantras enemies take additional blunt damage based off of how hard they are hit.

breeze.name: Breeze
breeze.additional_info: Increases your studs/s movement speed by +2 permanently. This is not counted as a speed buff.
breeze.desc: Gain a permanent +2 speed at all times.

brick_wall.name: Brick Wall
brick_wall.additional_info: Grants full immunity to ragdoll. The knockdown duration reduction scales on your combined Fortitude and Willpower investment, being fully negated if you have 100 points invested into each attribute.
brick_wall.desc: You refuse. You cannot be knocked off your feet until you are knocked completely Unconscious. Also reduces the duration of Knockdown.

broken_ankles.name: Broken Ankles
broken_ankles.additional_info: Broken Ankles' duration will be reduced by 0.15 seconds for every point in Strength below 70, capping at 8.25 seconds with 45 Strength. 30 second cooldown.
broken_ankles.desc: Blockbreaking an opponent puts their Mobility slot Mantras on CD for 12s.

broodlords_scream.name: Broodlord's Scream
broodlords_scream.desc: Using Sing, Taunt, or Ardour Scream applies anti heal for the duration of the move.
broodlords_scream.additional_info: Applies 100% Anti-Heal. These abilities will also gain the Broodlord Scream sound effect.

bruisers_mixup.name: Bruiser's Mixup
bruisers_mixup.desc: Switching your Fist Style mid-fight makes your basic Fist attacks inflict bleed temporarily.

brunt.name: Brunt
brunt.additional_info: Reduce posture damage taken by 10% while 2 handing a weapon.
brunt.desc: While 2-handing, you take less posture damage.

brutal_momentum.name: Brutal Momentum
brutal_momentum.desc: [Heavy Weapons] Successfully dodging will give you hyperarmour on your next swing.

brute_strength.name: Brute Strength
brute_strength.additional_info: Deals 35 Blunt damage with 20 Posture damage. This cannot be buffed through damage modifiers. Increases your Vent's windup from 0.25s to 0.5s.
brute_strength.desc: Your vent is replaced with a ground slam attack that knocks back enemies.

bulldozer.name: Bulldozer
bulldozer.desc: Enemies you flourish into a wall have a chance of breaking the wall and are guard broken on impact.

bulletproof.name: Bulletproof
bulletproof.reqs: bulletproof := 20r MED OR 20r LHT OR 20r FTD
bulletproof.additional_info: This has no effect on your natural armor or incoming PEN.
bulletproof.desc: You take no Armor damage from guns. You take 5% less Armor damage from other sources.

bulwark_breaker.name: Bulwark Breaker
bulwark_breaker.additional_info: Increases the AoE and range of your Pressure Blast. The final hit of your Pressure Blast deals 3x the posture damage (from 12 to 36), increasing the total posture damage of the Mantra from 36 to 60.
bulwark_breaker.desc: Increase the size of your Pressure Blast, with the last hit of it dealing increased posture damage.

burning_puppets.name: Burning Puppets
burning_puppets.additional_info: Grants your Puppets 5 Flameharm scaling, increasing their damage by 0.1 per Flamecharm investment. Your Puppets now apply 'Puppet Burn', allowing you to create more Puppets. Despite what the Talent description states, your Puppets don't proc any Flamecharm Talents.
burning_puppets.desc: Your puppets can now inflict burn and fire-based Talents when they explode.

burning_sacrifice.name: Burning Sacrifice
burning_sacrifice.additional_info: Puppets will turn purple if they've gone 15 seconds without hitting anything. You can sacrifice these purple Puppets with this Talent tool, granting a 4% damage buff per Puppet sacrificed (caps at 12%) and a small speed boost for 6 seconds. Additionally this grants 1 Emperor Flame stack per Puppet sacrificed. This has a 15 second cooldown if a Puppet is successfully sacrificed, and a 1 second cooldown if not.
burning_sacrifice.desc: Sacrifice puppets who have been alive for half of their lifetime and burn purple for Emperor Flame Stacks, a damage boost per puppet, and a slight speed boost.

buster_call.name: Buster Call
buster_call.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that lights a flare and highlights a large AoE on the ground. After a considerable delay, that location will be bombed several times, dealing very high damage. Cannot directly knock players. Applies burn on hit. 24 hour cooldown.
buster_call.desc: Radio in the Authority's navy for a buster call, sending out a barrage of bombardment wherever you see fit.

calamity_punch.name: Calamity Punch
calamity_punch.desc: Every successful Strong Left builds up stacks to perform a larger scale punch.

call_of_the_deep.name: Call of the Deep
call_of_the_deep.additional_info: When used in the overworld, play an animation and sink into the first layer. This does not count as a drown. When used in the Depths, teleport to Castle Light with a 20 minute cooldown.
call_of_the_deep.desc: Sink beneath the waves and return to the Depths

callout.name: Callout
callout.desc: You can mark objects or enemies by pressing Z, which will mark them for all nearby allies.

cap_artist.name: Cap Artist
cap_artist.additional_info: This can be deactivated by using the keybind again.
cap_artist.desc: Pressing [,] while crouching allows you to fake being dead. You also take a bit less damage from PvE while ragdolled as well.

captain_etrea.name: Captain Etrea
captain_etrea.desc: Fists Moving while blocking with a shield no longer slows you down.

captains_call.name: Captain's Call
captains_call.additional_info: On use, this summons two allied Blacksteel Pirates to assist you. 5 minute cooldown.
captains_call.desc: Call up two Blacksteel Pirates to aid you in battle.

careful_handling.name: Careful Handling
careful_handling.desc: Reduce your chances of dropping ingredients on death.

careful_stance.name: Careful Stance
careful_stance.desc: Gain a bit more autoparry frames on successful parries.

carnivore.name: Carnivore
carnivore.additional_info: Cannot be obtained if you have the Vegetarian Flaw.
carnivore.desc: In return for losing the ability to eat vegetation, satiate your hunger by gripping monsters and people alike.

catalytic_strike.name: Catalytic Strike
catalytic_strike.desc: Posture breaking an enemy will Overload their Surge stack.

cauterized_wounds.name: Cauterized Wounds
cauterized_wounds.additional_info: Does not reduce the blood damage of 'blood drain' effects, such as casting or being hit by Bloodrend Mantras, blood drain potions, and the blood loss Corrupt Resonance downside. Stacks multiplicatively with Alloyblood. The effectiveness of this Talent is reduced if you are using the Curse of the No Life King enchantment.
cauterized_wounds.desc: Blood loss from all sources is lowered.

celebrity.name: Celebrity
celebrity.desc: Your natural skill in mediating conflict makes people think more highly of you. Your base reputation with factions is higher and your reputation caps out higher.

centurions_resolve.name: Centurion's Resolve
centurions_resolve.desc: Your Legion Kata/Imperium Kata attacks deal 4% more damage.

chain_of_perfection.name: Chain of Perfection
chain_of_perfection.additional_info: Gain a 5% damage buff against PVE enemies per stack of Perfection above 5, capping at +100% damage at 25 stacks. This is treated as a final damage multiplier and it bypasses the damage modifier cap. All stacks of Perfection are lost upon taking any damage, excluding self damage.
chain_of_perfection.desc: You gain stacks of Perfection on hitting mobs with Weapon Attacks or Mantras. Mantras are only worth half a stack.

chain_reaction.name: Chain Reaction
chain_reaction.additional_info: Procs when a thrown potion replaces a different potion's effect, increasing your potion's effect by 40% multiplicatively.
chain_reaction.desc: When applying a potion effect to someone who already has one, the new effect is amplified. You have a 25% chance not to deplete potions when drinking them.

chainlash.name: Chainlash
chainlash.additional_info: Right clicking after a flourish will enchain your target and pull them towards you. M1ing after the pull will perform a Crushing Kick, dealing high damage.
chainlash.desc: On flourish, gain the ability to summon a chain on an enemy for 5 seconds by right clicking. This lets you whip your chain to seize and yank enemies towards you, setting them up for a crushing kick.

champions_regalia.name: Champion's Regalia
champions_regalia.desc: Flourishing an opponent grants you +50% posture damage on Basic Attacks for 10 seconds.

chaotic_charm.name: Chaotic Charm
chaotic_charm.additional_info: Applies Chaotic Charm for 15 seconds, granting an additional source of damage reduction. Chaotic Charm gains 0.15% damage reduction for every point in Charisma you have.
chaotic_charm.desc: Charm enemies nearby when attacked at low health. Enemies affected by this charm have their damage increased to anyone but you, and deal reduced damage towards you.

charged_return.name: Charged Return
charged_return.additional_info: Procs on Burn, Chill, Shock, Fear, Winded, and Suffocation.
charged_return.desc: Being under an elemental status effect causes your Basic Attacks and Criticals to do 10% more damage.

charisma_unbounded.name: Charisma Unbounded
charisma_unbounded.additional_info: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Charisma Attribute. The stat requirements to obtain this Talent will be increased to 77 or 78 if your Aspect has increased Charisma on spawn, though this limitation will be removed if you have the Multifaceted Echo Unlock. The quest requirement for this Talent will be removed if you've obtained it previously on your account.
charisma_unbounded.desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your charisma to its fullest.

charismatic_cast.name: Charismatic Cast
charismatic_cast.desc: Landing a hit with a mantra on an enemy applies Charmed. Allies recover from being knocked twice as quickly when Charmed by you.

cheap_shot.name: Cheap Shot
cheap_shot.additional_info: Multiplies your PEN by 1.1x at 65+ Agility. Cheap Shot's PEN multiplier will be reduced by 0.11% for every point in Agility below 65, having a minimum multiplier of +7.22% PEN (or 1.072x PEN) at 40 Agility.
cheap_shot.desc: Your attacks gain 10% PEN multiplicatively when you have an active speed boost.

cheap_trick.name: Cheap Trick
cheap_trick.additional_info: Being hit while under half HP grants I-frames and turns you invisible for a very short duration. 60s CD. Knocking an opponent turns you invisible for 2.5 seconds with no I-frames.
cheap_trick.desc: When hit below half health briefly disappear, leaving behind an illusion clone to keep your enemy occupied for a short duration. Briefly disappear after knocking an enemy.

chemistry_kit.name: Chemistry Kit
chemistry_kit.desc: You no longer drop potions on death. You have a 25% chance to brew an extra potion.

chemists_bag.name: Chemist's Bag
chemists_bag.desc: You no longer drop Potions on death.

chiefs_will.name: Chief's Will
chiefs_will.additional_info: Gives M1 attacks and criticals with the M1 tag +10% PEN if you are using the Way of Navae fist style.
chiefs_will.desc: Way of Navae light attacks have 10% additional penetration.

chilling_flourish.name: Chilling Flourish
chilling_flourish.additional_info: Leaves 3-4 ice patches on the ground.
chilling_flourish.desc: When flourishing an enemy, they leave behind a trail of ice in the direction you send them.

chitin.name: Chitin
chitin.additional_info: Grants 5% physical damage reduction in the form of Natural Armor. This stacks multiplicatively with Exoskeleton. Increases Exoskeleton's durability by 200.
chitin.desc: You have a layer of Natural Armor that replenishes when you rest

chorus_of_souls.name: Chorus of Souls
chorus_of_souls.reqs: oath_oathless => chorus_of_souls := 30s BLD, 30s SDW, 30s MTL, 30s WND, 30s LTN, 30s FLM, 30s ICE
chorus_of_souls.additional_info: Grants heavily increased health regeneration if you have all Wisps active. This Talent will not activate unless you have every Attunement's Wisp Mantra equipped and active. If one of your Wisps runs out, this Talent will deactivate until you recast the Wisp. This Talent will not work if you no longer have the Oathless Oath.
chorus_of_souls.desc: Alone, the Wisps lack a voice. But surrounded by so many, the frequencies overlap and you hear it true.

christmas_miracle.name: Christmas Miracle
christmas_miracle.desc: Christmas Mod Shop reward. Regens hunger and thirst. "Thank you so much K1!" Heh, no problem guys. All in a day's work.

chronostasis.name: Chronostasis
chronostasis.additional_info: On hit, apply a 13 second Resonance cooldown. This cannot proc if their Resonance is already on cooldown.
chronostasis.desc: Landing a Basic Attack or Critical puts the target's Resonance on cooldown for a short duration, while also applying Ether Sunder to PvE opponents.

circuit_breaker.name: Circuit Breaker
circuit_breaker.additional_info: Using this with the Deepscorn Casque will cause you to heal upon using Electrify.
circuit_breaker.desc: Electrify no longer deals self-damage on use.

closed_circuit.name: Closed Circuit
closed_circuit.additional_info: Adds 5 Thundercall damage with 5 Thundercall scaling to the Overload, gaining 0.025 damage per Thundercall damage. This is a flat value that does not depend on Rod count.
closed_circuit.desc: Surge Overloads that fail to arc to other opponents will deal additional damage to the Overloaded enemy.

clutch.name: Clutch
clutch.desc: For every combat tag you acquire, gain 4% more posture resistance.

clutch_recovery.name: Clutch Recovery
clutch_recovery.additional_info: If you are at or below 30% of your maximum health, heal 1% of your maximum health upon landing any weapon attack.
clutch_recovery.desc: When at 30% health or below, every time you land a light attack or critical hit heal 1%.

cold_blooded.name: Cold Blooded
cold_blooded.additional_info: Applies 12.5% blood poisoning over the duration of the chill or 25% blood poisoning on crystal explosion. Only crystal explosions applied through maximizing crystal stacks will proc this Talent.
cold_blooded.desc: Chilled enemies passively build up blood poison, alternatively when crystals explode it'll apply blood poison. (DOES NOT STACK)

cold_front.name: Cold Front
cold_front.additional_info: Venting creates an ice patch on the floor and applies Chill to any enemy hit by it. Increases your Vent damage by 40% and changes its damage type to Frostdraw.
cold_front.desc: Your vent is imbued with glacial frost.

coldseep_reactor.name: Coldseep Reactor
coldseep_reactor.additional_info: You can no longer gain parasites while in the Second Layer.
coldseep_reactor.desc: By cultivating the localized chemosynthetic microorganisms within the Depths and utilizing them as a power source, your helm thrums with a protective field of static electricity and heat.

collapsed_lung.name: Collapsed Lung
collapsed_lung.additional_info: This effect lasts 8 seconds and loses 0.04s for every investment point below 100 Strength. The Collapsed status effect reduces the posture damage affected enemies deal to you by 40%.
collapsed_lung.desc: Block breaking an opponent closes off their ability to Vent for 8s, with this duration scaling with Strength. PvE enemies instead get Collapsed.

comeback_kid.name: Comeback Kid
comeback_kid.desc: When waking up from being knocked you are unable to be knocked down for 5 seconds. (120 second cooldown)

command_live.name: Command: Live
command_live.additional_info: Fully heals your Servant if they are below 40% health. The cooldown of this Command scales on your Charisma investment.
command_live.desc: Once per hour, command a servant to defy all odds and obey your command - live.

command_phoenix.name: Command Phoenix
command_phoenix.additional_info: Summoning an adult Phoenix, then commanding it to take air will allow you to select a spot where it should Divebomb on the next usage of the Talent.
command_phoenix.desc: Command your Phoenix to scout, and dive into enemies.

command_summon.name: Command: Summon
command_summon.additional_info: Teleports the subject to the master regardless of distance. Teleportation takes 10 seconds to complete, and any hit will cancel it. 30 second cooldown for the Master, 2 minute cooldown for the Servant.
command_summon.desc: Command your servant to obey your summons and appear before you no matter the distance.

compelling_offer.name: Compelling Offer
compelling_offer.additional_info: Madness from this Talent procs when attacking charmed enemies who are below 50% health. Using Taunt as a counter displays Prediction's visual effects but with a dark purple color. This also plays a laughing sound effect and reduces Taunt's cooldown to 1 second. Taunt counter does not deal damage, but instead stacks Taunt's damage buff effect.
compelling_offer.desc: Any charmed enemy below 50% hit with your mantras or critical will mysteriously begin attacking everyone but you. [Madness] Your taunt also now functions as a counter that stacks damage multipliers with every successful taunt.

concussion.name: Concussion
concussion.desc: Enemies you flourish into walls have their vision altered for a short duration and are dazed longer than usual. Flourished PvE enemies get Stagger for a few seconds.

concussive_flash.name: Concussive Flash
concussive_flash.additional_info: People blinded by Flame Blind are Dazed for 2 seconds.
concussive_flash.desc: Your blinding light now concusses foes.

concussive_force.name: Concussive Force
concussive_force.additional_info: Enemies remain knocked for 15 seconds instead of 10.
concussive_force.desc: Enemies you knocked remain downed longer than usual.

condensation_drip.name: Condensation Drip
condensation_drip.additional_info: Reduces the passive thirst drain by 3x.
condensation_drip.desc: Passively collect condensation from the air, greatly reducing your thirst.

conditioned_runner.name: Conditioned Runner
conditioned_runner.additional_info: After 3 seconds of sprinting without taking damage, gain increased health regeneration.
conditioned_runner.desc: You regenerate health faster than normal when sprinting below 75% HP. The health amount scales with your agility stat.

conditioned_swimmer.name: Conditioned Swimmer
conditioned_swimmer.desc: You lose less hunger and thirst while swimming.

conditioning.name: Conditioning
conditioning.desc: Reduce all slows you receive by 40%.

conductors_cable.name: Conductor's Cable
conductors_cable.additional_info: Creating a Conductor Rod drains 10% of your opponent's maximum armor.
conductors_cable.desc: Applying Conductor rods on opponents steals some of their armor to you.

conquer_your_fears.name: Conquer your Fears
conquer_your_fears.additional_info: Recover Sanity when killing monsters in the Depths, with the Sanity restored depending on how strong the monster is. Gain Sanity whenever a nearby ally executes a humanoid target.
conquer_your_fears.desc: Killing the beings of the deep replenishes your sanity somewhat. When an Ally grips an enemy nearby to you, you regain Sanity.

continuous_bleed.name: Continuous Bleed
continuous_bleed.desc: Every time you land a crit, flourish, or uppercut, increase the amount of bleed damage you deal for 15 seconds. This is stackable.

controlled_combustion.name: Controlled Combustion
controlled_combustion.additional_info: Your Agitating Spark cannot spread to you either.
controlled_combustion.desc: Your Agitating Spark no longer spreads to your allies.

cooks_kit.name: Cook's Kit
cooks_kit.reqs: cooks_kit := 5r INT OR 5r WLL OR 5r CHA, 5s FTD
cooks_kit.desc: Each food item's max quantity is increased by 5. Your kit comes with a lighter.
cooks_kit.additional_info: You can light Campfires without a Flint.

cool_head.name: Cool Head
cool_head.desc: If set on fire while on ice, immediately put it out and gain the Cool Head status for 30s. During Cool Head, you cannot be lit on fire. 15s cooldown

cornered_fool.name: Cornered Fool
cornered_fool.additional_info: Despite what the description states, this applies Taunt for 6 seconds. Every point of Charisma below 85 will reduce the duration of this Taunt by 0.035 seconds, capping at a minimum of 5.12 seconds with 60 Charisma. The Taunt damage buff is also applied to the attack that guard broke. 15 second cooldown.
cornered_fool.desc: Blockbreaking a Charmed opponent procs Taunt for 5s, making them take and deal more damage.

corporeal_dissolution.name: Corporeal Dissolution
corporeal_dissolution.additional_info: Caps at 30 Wither damage per proc.
corporeal_dissolution.desc: Applies Wither on any weapon attack that drains Ether, and scales on the amount of Ether drain.

corpse_explosion.name: Corpse Explosion
corpse_explosion.additional_info: Burn grip unconscious targets, even yourself, in 3.5 seconds instead of 7. The explosion does not work.
corpse_explosion.desc: Your flames will incinerate unconscious Targets much faster and bodies that you burn to death immediately explode dealing massive damage

corrosive_touch.name: Corrosive Touch
corrosive_touch.additional_info: On proc, drain 5% of your opponent's armor. This has a 10 second cooldown.
corrosive_touch.desc: Landing a successful Critical Attack or Flourish will corrode a portion of your opponent's Armor.

cosmic_connection.name: Cosmic Connection
cosmic_connection.additional_info: Increases Astral's damage buff in PvE from +20% to +25%.
cosmic_connection.desc: All celestial and astral related abilities are buffed.

counter_spin.name: Counter Spin
counter_spin.additional_info: On proc, swiftly thrust your Staff forwards, dealing 45% of your weapon's damage on hit.
counter_spin.desc: After blocking an attack, press M2 to counter with your staff.

crimson_fountain.name: Crimson Fountain
crimson_fountain.desc: Blockbreaking or flourishing an enemy now spills a pool of blood below them.

crippling_comeuppance.name: Crippling Comeuppance
crippling_comeuppance.additional_info: 30 second cooldown. For every point of Agility below 100, Crippling Comeuppance's duration is reduced by 0.1 seconds, having a minimum duration of 12.5 seconds at 75 Agility.
crippling_comeuppance.desc: Landing Revenge puts your opponent's Mobility slot Mantras on CD and applies Sluggish to PvE enemies for 15s.

crippling_darkness.name: Crippling Darkness
crippling_darkness.additional_info: Grants +20% PEN to any non-weapon attack. This not only affects Mantras, but things like Bleed or Burn too.

crippling_impact.name: Crippling Impact
crippling_impact.additional_info: The duration of this effect scales on your Strength investment, being 2 seconds + 0.015 seconds per point of Strength. This lasts for 3.5 seconds at 100 Strength.
crippling_impact.desc: Landing a critical with someone while Wrath Gem is active disables their vent for a few seconds.

critical_engine.name: Critical Engine
critical_engine.reqs: critical_engine := 30r LHT OR 30r MED OR 30r HVY, 90s INT
critical_engine.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that applies the effects of your held Deep Gem to your weapon critical. This does not consume the Deep Gem on use. Blue Gems have a unique interaction with this Talent, granting Ether back based on scaled damage dealt.
critical_engine.desc: You gain the ability to use Deep Gems on your critical attack. Hold out the Deep Gem you wish to apply to your crit then use the tool to enhance your critical.

critical_heal.name: Critical Heal
critical_heal.desc: Every time you heal, you have a chance to proc a Critical Heal, healing you 30 health. [5 second CD]

crossguard.name: Crossguard
crossguard.additional_info: This is additive to weapon chip damage.
crossguard.desc: If you are using a sword, you gain 10% chip against other opponents wielding swords.

cruel_counter.name: Cruel Counter
cruel_counter.additional_info: If you interrupt someone's attack with the shock from your Krulian Charge critical, apply the Cruel Counter status effect to your opponent, increasing all damage taken by critical attacks for 20 seconds. This grants a 40% damage buff to all critical attacks (including those that aren't Krulian Knife's), bypassing the damage modifier caps.
cruel_counter.desc: When using your initial charge up on your Krulian Knife, if you interrupt someone's attack with it apply Cruel Counter on them, massively increasing the damage they take from your critical attacks.

cruentare.name: Cruentare
cruentare.desc: Increase the amount of all bleed damage you deal by 50%. Your Whirling Blade now now heals you when landing it.
cruentare.additional_info: You heal for 25% of the damage your Whirling blades deals.

cryonis.name: Cryonis
cryonis.additional_info: Reduces the Ether cost of Frostdraw Mantras by 40% when standing on ice.
cryonis.desc: All ice spells casted on top of ice cost less Ether.

crystal_shrapnel.name: Crystal Shrapnel
crystal_shrapnel.additional_info: Does not hit allies or the target you procced the Crystal explosion on. Scales off Frostdraw investment and amount of crystals present.
crystal_shrapnel.desc: Your crystal explosions now have an AoE that applies crystals to all hit.

cult_of_personality.name: Cult of Personality
cult_of_personality.additional_info: The PEN gain per target will be reduced if you do not meet Cult of Personality's Charisma requirement.
cult_of_personality.desc: You gain +3% PEN for each person Charmed, capping at +15% PEN.

cursed_immortality.name: Cursed Immortality
cursed_immortality.additional_info: Instead of being knocked, your health will be set to 75% of its maximum instead, with a 5 minute cooldown. Once this Talent procs, all future Depths trials will automatically be corrupted for the rest of your character's life. This Talent does not proc during the Zi'eer boss fight.
cursed_immortality.desc: Instead of getting knocked, get set to 75% health. When this effect occurs, this guarantees that you depths trial will become corrupted for the rest of your character's run.

curved_edge.name: Curved Edge
curved_edge.desc: Your light weapon mantras now gain 60% more chip.

cut_to_the_chase.name: Cut to the Chase
cut_to_the_chase.additional_info: Adds 10 True damage to your Air Counter. The damage bonus will be lessened if you do not meet the Talent's requirements.
cut_to_the_chase.desc: Air Counter damage scaling is largely increased. Landing an Air Counter now initiates an uppercut. Deal 5% more damage to PvE enemies in the air.

cutting_pace.name: Cutting Pace
cutting_pace.additional_info: Buffed attacks deal 15% more damage, have a slightly shorter windup, and are purple.
cutting_pace.desc: Dodging attacks will now grant 'Cutting Pace' stacks. Mantras and basic attacks consume a stack to shorten wind-up and increase damage, procs after dash.

cyclical_exsanguination.name: Cyclical Exsanguination
cyclical_exsanguination.desc: Whenever you deal more than 20 damage to an enemy in an instance, pause your temporary health decay for 3 seconds.

cyclone_blade.name: Cyclone Blade
