cyclone_blade.additional_info: Lasts for 3 seconds with no cooldown. Phantom Step dashes will also proc this effect. Despite stating "Light Attack", this Talent also procs on weapon criticals.
cyclone_blade.desc: After a successful Gale Dash you wrap your weapon in wind, causing your next Light attack to do +30% damage as bleed and have +10% chip damage.

dancers_beat.name: Dancer's Beat
dancers_beat.additional_info: Your Vent can no longer be used defensively, unless it is used to escape an otherwise inescapable move, but does not cost Tempo to use. You need to have at least 20 Tempo to use Dancer's Beat. Your next M1 used within 1 second of using Dancer's Beat will deal higher damage, more stun, and have a higher swing speed. If you are hit before you use your next attack, wait out the 1 second proc window, or if your next attack does not land (including if it was blocked, parried, or dodged), you will lose 60 Tempo and will be stunned for 0.5 seconds. 2.5 second cooldown.
dancers_beat.desc: Your Vent is replaced with Dancer's Beat. You increase the speed, damage, and stun of your next Basic Attack. However, should your attack fail to land, you'll be stunned and your Tempo will be greatly reduced.

dancers_geas.name: Dancer's Geas
dancers_geas.additional_info: Also procs on weapon criticals. When you land an attack from the tip of your weapon, an icon of a pair of hands clapping will appear, signifying that you've activated the buff. When you land an attack from half or less than half of your weapon's range, an icon of a thumbs down will appear, signifying that you were debuffed.
dancers_geas.desc: You deal +30% damage when striking with the tip of your weapon, but deal 15% less damage when striking below half of its range.

dancers_impale.name: Dancer's Impale
dancers_impale.desc: Hitting an enemy after a perfect dodge makes your next attack deal 30% bleed damage. If that attack would already bleed, it adds +10% chip damage instead.

dancers_sting.name: Dancer's Sting
dancers_sting.desc: Striking with the tip of your weapon applies +25% PEN and +25% Chip Damage.

dancing_guard.name: Dancing Guard
dancing_guard.additional_info: Dancing Guard's duration will be reduced by 0.086s for every point in Fortitude below its requirements, having a minimum duration of 4.86s at 30 Fortitude.
dancing_guard.desc: Parrying an opponent and then parrying another enemy in quick succession applies slow for 7s.

dancing_steps.name: Dancing Steps
dancing_steps.additional_info: Casting a Flamecharm Mantra will give you a moderate boost of horizontal movement in the direction your character is facing. This will still proc even if the Mantra is feinted. 5 second cooldown.
dancing_steps.desc: Fire mantras now move you in the direction you're facing.

dancing_steps_of_war.name: Dancing Steps Of War
dancing_steps_of_war.desc: When landing a flourish, gain a speed boost and massively reduce the cooldown of your dodges for 2 seconds.

dark_god.name: Dark God
dark_god.desc: If a Shadowcast mantra would drain your opponent's Ether to 0, drain from their Tempo instead and increase your Tempo.

dark_harvest.name: Dark Harvest
dark_harvest.desc: Steal all of the hunger of enemies caught in your Shadow Vortex. Knocking a player also greatly enhances your next Shadow Vortex.

dark_hours.name: Dark Hours
dark_hours.additional_info: Night cycle is XX:50 to XX:10 in real-time.
dark_hours.desc: Your Shadowcast Mantras deal 15% more damage at night and in realms the Sun does not reach.

dark_receiver.name: Dark Receiver
dark_receiver.desc: Shadow moves will also steal Ether from those you are Static Linked tethered to.

dark_replenishment.name: Dark Replenishment
dark_replenishment.desc: Knocking out an enemy in combat restores a portion of your ether.

dark_rift.name: Dark Rift
dark_rift.additional_info: Lasts 1.8 seconds with a 20 second cooldown that starts on proc. Blocking, parrying, dodging, or sliding will also cancel the effect. You cannot use Mantras during Dark Rift.
dark_rift.desc: Enter a rifted state when you successfully dodge, where you can't be damaged until its duration ends. Can be cancelled with feinting or attacking.

dark_synergy.name: Dark Synergy
dark_synergy.desc: Engulf your enemy in shadows when flourishing them.

dark_waltz.name: Dark Waltz
dark_waltz.reqs: dark_waltz := 90r LHT OR 90r MED OR 90r HVY, 90s SDW
dark_waltz.desc: Anytime you guardbreak your opponent with a light attack or critical, steal half of your opponent's current tempo. Also apply Ether Sunder to PvE enemies.

dazing_finisher.name: Dazing Finisher
dazing_finisher.reqs: chaotic_charm, charismatic_cast, lasting_charisma, tough_love => dazing_finisher := 55s CHA
dazing_finisher.additional_info: The duration of this Daze scales on your Charisma investment.
dazing_finisher.desc: Flourishing enemies that are charmed by you cause them to not be knocked back and dazed instead.

deal_maker.name: Deal Maker
deal_maker.additional_info: This is unaffected by Snake Oil.
deal_maker.desc: Your rapport with merchants allows you to attach a flat fee of 20 notes to all your sales.

death_from_above.name: Death From Above
death_from_above.additional_info: Air dash canceling with your weapon equipped grants your Starnkindred Wings. Air dash canceling with your weapon equipped and your wings out performs a three hit slashing attack that deals 25 Oath/Slash damage per hit.
death_from_above.desc: Upon cancelling your Air Dash, reveal your wings and strike your enemy.

decisive_blow.name: Decisive Blow
decisive_blow.desc: Hitting an enemy with your Critical Attack immediately after they dodge (or any time against mobs) now procs Knife's Journey. Your Knife's Journey procs do 2x Armor damage.

decisive_winds.name: Decisive Winds
decisive_winds.additional_info: The Decisive Winds status effect grants a 25% speed boost as long as you are within 20 studs of the target who initiated this effect. This procs through block, parry, and dodge, but not on self damage. 30 second cooldown.
decisive_winds.desc: When damage below 50% health, don an aura of Decisive Winds for 10s.

deep_wound.name: Deep Wound
deep_wound.desc: Assassinating a target applies anti-heal for 20s and gives you a speed boost for 6s. Assassination damage now scales with level against mobs.

deepbound_contract.name: Deepbound Contract
deepbound_contract.additional_info: You can always enter Castle Light, even if you've drowned. Your Depths trial will always be an Enforcer or harder.
deepbound_contract.desc: You progress much faster in the Depths, and slower on the overworld. You can regain sanity at Castle Light, but will always face the strongest foes in your Trial.

deepfolk.name: Deepfolk
deepfolk.additional_info: Increases Sanity gain by 1.2x. Deep Shrine Knowledge cost is reduced by 1 (this cannot go below 1).
deepfolk.desc: The secrets of the Deep are easier for you to unravel. Your mind is sturdier against its effects, as well as using less Knowledge in Knowledge exchanges.

defensive_reprisal.name: Defensive Reprisal
defensive_reprisal.additional_info: Defensive Reprisal's duration will be reduced by 0.177s for every point in Fortitude below its requirements, having a minimum duration of 15.55s duration with 40 Fortitude.
defensive_reprisal.desc: Being flourished grants you 10% posture resistance for 20s.

defensive_stance.name: Defensive Stance
defensive_stance.desc: [Rapier] Gain more parry frames the lower your health is.

defensive_sweep.name: Defensive Sweep
defensive_sweep.additional_info: This does not bypass the PEN cap. 14 second cooldown.
defensive_sweep.desc: [Spears] Posture breaking an opponent grants you +50% PEN for 3 seconds.

defiance.name: Defiance
defiance.additional_info: The Effectiveness of Defiance will be lessened if you do not meet its Willpower requirement. Works on: Burn damage, the duration of Chill, Winded, Suffocation, time knocked, Ring of Pestilence, and Sightless Still, Crystal and Surge Rod gain, Blood Poisoning gain and Wither gain.
defiance.desc: Negative status effects are half as effective when you are below 35% HP.

defiant_until_the_end.name: Defiant until the End
defiant_until_the_end.desc: Slow the enemy trying to execute you down with one last shout of your determination.

demon_step.name: Demon Step
demon_step.additional_info: On use, lose 50 Ether to travel a short distance forwards in iframes. Additionally, 20% of your current posture will be dealt to you as self-posture damage.
demon_step.desc: Activate to gain brief iframes while moving forward. This requires 50 ether to activate and increases your posture by 20% each use.

denial_repulse.name: Denial Repulse
denial_repulse.additional_info: When Flame of Denial activates, release an explosion around you. This deals 20 Flamecharm damage with 5 Flamecharm scaling, meaning it gains 0.1 damage per Flamecharm investment for a total damage of 30 at 100 Flamecharm. This cannot be parried nor dodged, but can be blocked, dealing 5 posture damage. Has a windup of 0.6s.
denial_repulse.desc: You now emit a delayed burst of flames after coming close to death.

depths_denizen.name: Depths Denizen
depths_denizen.desc: The city you once called home is now your only way out of the depths, perhaps you can use this to your advantage. Gain extra leeway when attempting to escape the depths.

destructive_recovery.name: Destructive Recovery
destructive_recovery.desc: [Greatsword] Enemies recover 20% less Posture when parrying.

destructive_yell.name: Destructive Yell
destructive_yell.additional_info: Your Ardour Scream destroys all campfires within its range.
destructive_yell.desc: Your Ardour Screams now break campfires around you, while increasing its range by 2x.

devastating_power.name: Devastating Power
devastating_power.additional_info: Gain 10 maximum Ether for every Mantra you have equipped.
devastating_power.desc: Gain extra Ether for every Mantra in your arsenal.

devastating_recovery.name: Devastating Recovery
devastating_recovery.desc: Enemies recover 30% less posture when parrying your Zweihander light attacks.

dirty_boxing.name: Dirty Boxing
dirty_boxing.desc: Hitting an enemy with a Basic Attack after feinting applies bleed, obscures their vision slightly and makes PvE enemies Sluggish.

disbelief.name: Disbelief
disbelief.additional_info: Halves the duration of the Charmed status effect. Additionally halves the duration of Illusory Servants if they are casted on you.
disbelief.desc: You're resistant to the effects of Illusion magic. You are resistant to charms and tricks.

discharge.name: Discharge
discharge.additional_info: Deals 5 Thundercall damage with 5 Thundercall scaling, gaining 0.025 damage per point in Thundercall. Applies Shock or 1 Surge Rod on proc.
discharge.desc: [Light Weapons] On 5th successful attack you will discharge static dealing lightning damage to those nearby.

discovery_of_fire.name: Discovery of Fire
discovery_of_fire.additional_info: Grants the Discovery of Fire Talent tool that consumes 20 Ether to cause a lightning strike after a 1 second delay. On hit, this deals 3 Thundercall damage and lights all nearby entities and campfires on fire.
discovery_of_fire.desc: Flints and Flamecharm are for simpletons.

dispatch.name: Dispatch
dispatch.desc: [Clubs] Bear Trapped targets deal 20% less posture. Dazed targets deal 20% less posture. This can stack.

divers_resilience.name: Diver's Resilience
divers_resilience.additional_info: You can now parry certain NPC attacks that are normally unparryable. 10 second cooldown.
divers_resilience.desc: You can parry unparryable attacks from giant monsters, but due to the heft of the plate, you have slightly reduced speed.

donation_drive.name: Donation Drive
donation_drive.additional_info: Donation Drive's cooldown scales on your Charisma investment, having an 8 second cooldown at 60 Charisma and gaining 0.1s for every point in Charisma below 60. Donation Drive has a 8.5 second cooldown at 55 Charisma, and a maximum cooldown of 10.5 seconds at 35 Charisma.
donation_drive.desc: Consuming 'Charm' on an opponent replenishes some blood. Additionally, you can also activate this effect and Manipulator through blockbreaking with a Bloodrend mantra.

dormant_strength.name: Dormant Strength
dormant_strength.additional_info: Increases your Strong Left's damage and posture damage if you are at max Calamity Punch stacks.
dormant_strength.desc: At max Calamity Punch stacks increased posture damage & physical damage.

double_jump.name: Double Jump
double_jump.additional_info: Reduces Wind Step's cooldown to 5 seconds and lowers the Ether cost. You will need to equip Gale Boots to gain the Wind Step Talent.
double_jump.desc: Take the Wind Step and refine it into your own technique, reducing the cooldown and improving its efficiency.

down_comes_the_claw.name: Down Comes the Claw
down_comes_the_claw.additional_info: Lasts 6.5 seconds despite what the description states. You cannot reapply this effect if it is currently active. For every point in Agility under 75, Down Comes the Claw loses 0.055 seconds of duration, capping at a minimum of 5.11 seconds with 50 Agility.
down_comes_the_claw.desc: Landing a Critical while you have a speed boost prevents your opponent from being able to dodge twice in a row for 5s.

down_to_your_level.name: Down to your Level
down_to_your_level.additional_info: Down to your Level's duration will be reduced by 0.05s for every point in Fortitude below 60, capping at a minimum of 3.75s with 35 Fortitude. The slow only procs on M1s or critical attacks with the M1 tag. Procs from Entanglement, Daze, Chill and most other things that slow you down.
down_to_your_level.desc: While you have a speed debuff, your Basic Attacks slow your enemies for 5s.

dragons_song.name: Dragon's Song
dragons_song.additional_info: Grants +20 Ether on proc. 2 second cooldown.
dragons_song.desc: Using a mantra after an uppercut grants ether.

dread_fighter.name: Dread Fighter
dread_fighter.additional_info: Each stack of Dread Fighter grants 5% Mantra damage reduction, capping at 5 stacks for 25% Mantra damage reduction.
dread_fighter.desc: Parrying and getting hit by mantras now give you stacks of Dread. Each stack increases your mantra resistance, up to 25%. Each stack lasts for 15 seconds.

drift.name: Drift
drift.additional_info: Your parry is replaced with a low distance dodge if you successfully parry an attack.
drift.desc: You're no longer slow enough to have to rely on parries. Dodge instead.

drifting_cloud.name: Drifting Cloud
drifting_cloud.additional_info: Proccing Cutting Pace now unsheathes your Purple Cloud, giving it new animations and changing the damage type to Slash.
drifting_cloud.desc: Cutting Pace now unsheathes the full potential of your Purple Cloud.

driving_impact.name: Driving Impact
driving_impact.additional_info: The first hit of your default spear critical will deal double the posture damage. The second hit of your default spear critical will not deal posture damage.
driving_impact.desc: [Spears] The first hit of your Spear's Critical Attack will deal greatly increased posture damage. Subsequent hits will do reduced posture damage.

drop_dead.name: Drop Dead
drop_dead.desc: Take less damage when you are crouching.

duelists_lunge.name: Duelist's Lunge
duelists_lunge.additional_info: Running attacks with rapiers deal 35% more posture damage. After landing a Critical, the next rapier running attack gains 2 range.
duelists_lunge.desc: [Rapier] Running attacks deal increased posture damage. Upon landing your Critical, your next running attack will have increased range.

dustlunge.name: Dustlunge
dustlunge.reqs: deep_wound, lights_out, lowstride, unseen_threat => dustlunge := 90s AGL
dustlunge.desc: You can now assassinate your enemies from much farther, shadestepping to their location if they're too far. Assassinating an enemy will automatically assassinate other nearby enemies.

ebb_and_flow.name: Ebb and Flow
ebb_and_flow.desc: Landing a medium mantra increases your heavy mantra's level by 1 and vice versa. This is stackable and can increased to a max of +5 levels. All stacks are removed if your medium/heavy mantra is defended against.

echoing_lunatic.name: Echoing Lunatic
echoing_lunatic.desc: Your Ardour Scream now applies a bit of insanity.

echolocator.name: Echolocator
echolocator.additional_info: Pings the location of nearby players who unsheathe their weapons (even through Tacet and Lowstride) and event spawns.
echolocator.desc: Your highly tuned hearing helps you navigate, seeing better in the dark and sensing potential threats.

electrical_accumulation.name: Electrical Accumulation
electrical_accumulation.additional_info: Passively gain 4 stacks of Static Blade if you have 4 or more orbs.
electrical_accumulation.desc: While having 4 or more orbs, automatically gain 4 charges of Static Blade whilst you have 4 orbs.

electrify.name: Electrify
electrify.additional_info: If used while not being carried, this deals 5% of your current health as self damage on proc. Additionally, you will gain the Amped status effect for 15 seconds, increasing your weapon damage by 10% and allowing your weapon attacks to apply Shock on hit. However, incoming damage will be increased by 10%. 1 minute cooldown.
electrify.desc: Shock yourself and apply Amped for 15s. Can be used while Carried to escape.

electrolyte.name: Electrolyte
electrolyte.additional_info: Applies a Surge Rod instead if you have Surge Path. Consumes 4 Temporary Health on proc.
electrolyte.desc: Hitting Bloodrend mantras while having temporary health applies Shocked while removing a portion of temporary health.

elegy_of_light.name: Elegy of Light
elegy_of_light.additional_info: On use, Deep Gems cannot have their effects proc on you and your Deem Gems have increased effectiveness in PvE for 3 minutes. This ability requires you to kill a player of equal or higher level or a boss to recharge its effect.
elegy_of_light.desc: The Unspoken Vow of the Waking God resonates through you, if briefly. Protects you from the effects of Deep Gems for 3 minutes and provides you Gem Enhancement. Remains dormant until you take the life of an equal.

embolism.name: Embolism
embolism.desc: If an enemy is guardbroken while you have temporary health, convert your temporary health into additional damage.

emergency_mark.name: Emergency Mark
emergency_mark.additional_info: Applying a Justicar's Mark on an ally who has 20% or less current health health them for 10% of their maximum health.
emergency_mark.desc: Applying a mark on someone who has less than 20% health heals them for 10% of their health.

emergency_rations.name: Emergency Rations
emergency_rations.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool with 3 charges. Using the Talent tool consumes one of the charges to heal you for 20 flat health. This has a 15 second cooldown. Resting at a campfire, while not in combat, restores all charges
emergency_rations.desc: Eat some of your emergency rations, healing you for 20 health. You can only use this 3 times before having to sit at a campfire outside of combat again.

emergency_reserves.name: Emergency Reserves
emergency_reserves.desc: When you get hit below 20% health, gain 20% tempo immediately.

emperor_flame.name: Emperor Flame
emperor_flame.additional_info: Agitating Spark procs grant Emperor Flame stacks. At 5 stacks, gain the Emperor Flame status effect for 10 seconds, causing your next M1 to instantly proc Explosive Finish, dealing 15 Flamecharm damage. On top of this, this will deal an additional 25 Wither damage and apply burn. Emperor Flame also extinguishes self-applied burn through Agitating Spark. While Emperor Flame is on cooldown, the burn will not be extinguished and you cannot gain additional stacks. 30 second cooldown.
emperor_flame.desc: Absorb fire produced by you, once you reach 5 stacks your next attack will be an automatic Explosive Finish flourish. This flourish will deal additional damage and proc Wither, reducing your opponent's maximum health temporarily.

empowered_eruption.name: Empowered Eruption
empowered_eruption.desc: Your next Eruption after landing a critical is Empowered with +50% range and damage. 10s cooldown.

encore.name: Encore
encore.additional_info: Applies 0.4s of true stun. Doesn't affect allies.
encore.desc: Your Sing will stun opponents who are already charmed.

endurance_runner.name: Endurance Runner
endurance_runner.desc: Your speed is decreased less by low health.

energy_siphon.name: Energy Siphon
energy_siphon.additional_info: Takes 15 Ether from the affected opponent on proc.
energy_siphon.desc: Your singularity now pulls ether from the extra players affected.

enforcers_pull.name: Enforcer's Pull
enforcers_pull.desc: Your Enforcer's Pull is improved. Land a flourish to make it even stronger.

enforcers_strength.name: Enforcer's Strength
enforcers_strength.desc: Your enemies recover 20% less posture on parry.

enhanced_flow.name: Enhanced Flow
enhanced_flow.reqs: enhanced_flow := 90s BLD, 90r LHT OR 90r MED OR 90r HVY
enhanced_flow.additional_info: When you land basic attacks during Rush Hour, gain Temporary Health equal to 30% of your weapon's scaled damage. This cannot give more than 50 Temporary Health in a singular instance. Reduces Rush Hour's self damage by 22%, from 4.5 damage per tick to 3.5 damage per tick. Despite what the description states, this Talent still procs when hitting monsters or other non-player enemies.
enhanced_flow.desc: Refine your Rush Hour, allowing you to now also gain temp health whenever you hit a player while using Rush Hour. You now also take less damage from Rush Hour.

enrage.name: Enrage
enrage.desc: Whenever you stun an opponent who's taunted with Encore, enrage them.

entropy_link.name: Entropy Link
entropy_link.additional_info: You are able to fast travel to certain places while resting at a campfire. Locations are unlocked by interacting with special meteorites that are scattered around the map. By sitting at a campfire and typing out the name of the desired meteorite, you will be transported directly to it.
entropy_link.desc: The world is broken, linked by fragile webs. Traverse the path by stating your destination amidst the flame.

erupting_shade.name: Erupting Shade
erupting_shade.desc: The size of your shadow eruption increases with how much siphoned health you have gained from wiping players.

eruption_path_lava_serpent.name: Eruption Path: Lava Serpent
eruption_path_lava_serpent.additional_info: Eruptions have a base damage of 15 with 5 Flamecharm scaling. Eruptions have a 3s proc cooldown. You can still apply burn via Immolation, Flash Point, and Agitating Spark.
eruption_path_lava_serpent.desc: Your fire abilities no longer proc burn and instead proc an eruption under the enemies feet.

ether_absorption.name: Ether Absorption
ether_absorption.desc: Receive Ether back when inflicted with damage from Mantras.

ether_adeptness.name: Ether Adeptness
ether_adeptness.desc: Your mantras now deal extra chip.

ether_amplification.name: Ether Amplification
ether_amplification.desc: For every Ether Erudite Stack you have, increase the size and damage of your Pressure Blast.

ether_blade.name: Ether Blade
ether_blade.desc: Draw your foes ether into your weapon when you parry ether-based attacks. Gain Ether when you parry mantras.

ether_blitz.name: Ether Blitz
ether_blitz.desc: For every Ether Erudite Stack you have, reduce the windup of your enhanced Master's Flourish. This consumes your Ether Erudite stacks on use.

ether_burst.name: Ether Burst
ether_burst.additional_info: Consumes your Ether Erudite Stacks. Turns your Rapid Slashes light blue.
ether_burst.desc: Landing Rapid Slashes on your opponent gives them an overflow of Ether, causing them to take bursts of damage based on how many Ether Erudite stacks you had.

ether_efficiency.name: Ether Efficiency
ether_efficiency.desc: All mantras you cast now have a reduced cost of 30 ether.

ether_emergency.name: Ether Emergency
ether_emergency.additional_info: On proc, restore health equal to 15% of your maximum Ether. 5 minute cooldown.
ether_emergency.desc: When you get hit below 25% health, exhaust all of your ether to gain a flat health boost (healing scales of total max ether). You are briefly unable to cast Mantras.

ether_erudite.name: Ether Erudite
ether_erudite.desc: The more total Ether you have, the more damage you deal. Gain Ether Erudite Stacks to improve your combat abilities. The max amount you can hold is 6.

ether_overdrive.name: Ether Overdrive
ether_overdrive.reqs: ether_overdrive := 90s INT, 20r ICE OR 20r FLM OR 20r WND OR 20r SDW OR 20r LTN OR 20r MTL OR 20r BLD
ether_overdrive.additional_info: Removes both the melee and Mantra PEN cap.
ether_overdrive.desc: Gain 5% extra PEN and remove the cap on your PEN. Go beyond your limits.

ether_pinpoint.name: Ether Pinpoint
ether_pinpoint.desc: Mantras that have Might Gem on them now ignore fully ignore the posture bonus from shields.

ether_proselyte.name: Ether Proselyte
ether_proselyte.additional_info: Increases the level of all Attuned Mantras by 1 unless they are already level 5. This is not displayed on the Mantra's tooltip. Allows your non-Ironsing/Bloodrend Attuned Mantras to proc the Attunement Talents of your current Saint Stance. (E.g. Clutching Shadow in the Flamecharm Stance can proc Scorched Peak). Not all Attuned Talents are compatible with Ether Proselyte.
ether_proselyte.desc: All of your Elemental Mantras below Lv. 5 are now 1 level higher. Your Mantras are now converted to the element of your current stance.

ether_quell.name: Ether Quell
ether_quell.desc: Landing a Critical Attack or Guardbreaking an opponent gives you 1 Ether Erudite Stack.

ether_reflux.name: Ether Reflux
ether_reflux.desc: Successfully countering an opponent with Prediction gives you 2 Ether Erudite stacks.

ether_repletion.name: Ether Repletion
ether_repletion.additional_info: Hunger stolen from players through any means will proc this Talent.
ether_repletion.desc: Hunger stolen from other players now grants you ether as well.

ether_tension.name: Ether Tension
ether_tension.desc: Deal bonus true damage whenever you guardbreak an opponent with a mantra.

ether_upgrade.name: Ether Upgrade
ether_upgrade.desc: All mantras you cast now get one bonus level on top of their current level.

etherguard.name: Etherguard
etherguard.additional_info: When landing a Mantra with a Warped Blue Gem equipped, gain the Etherguard status effect, granting you damage reduction to Mantras and elemental resistance in PvE. The damage reduction for Mantras scales on the Ether cost of the Mantra you got hit by.
etherguard.desc: Warped Blue Gems now provide a bonus effect when landed using a mantra, Etherguard. This effect gives extra resistances to mantras based on how much ether they cost to cast + gain elemental protection against PvE.

ethirons_gaze.name: Ethiron's Gaze
ethirons_gaze.additional_info: The snow in the Second Layer no longer affects your ability to see. Also reduces the visual clutter of snow in the overworld.
ethirons_gaze.desc: Your eyes have been opened to the wasteland. You can see through the harsh fog of the storm of the Eternal Gale more clearly now.

eureka.name: Eureka
eureka.additional_info: Landing and parrying Mantras grants Inspiration stacks. Mantras cap at giving 1 stack per, and you do not gain stacks from autoparry frames.
eureka.desc: Gain a stack of Inspiration every time you land or parry a Mantra. Whiffing a Mantra removes a stack of Inspiration. Reaching 3 stacks grants +10% Mantra Damage to your next Mantra attack.

evasive_expert.name: Evasive Expert
evasive_expert.desc: Your speed boost granted from dodging is increased.

everchanging_aegis.name: Everchanging Aegis
everchanging_aegis.additional_info: Your Aegis type can swap on block, dodge, and parry.
everchanging_aegis.desc: You take 20% less from attacks the same element as the last element you were hit with, but 10% more damage from attacks from different element.

excavator.name: Excavator
excavator.desc: Chance to receive two sets of ore when mining, mine ores a lot faster.

execution.name: Execution
execution.additional_info: Deals true damage. Only works if you do not have bullets in your inventory. Also procs on the offhand shots of Dual Gun attacks, but it deals 5 true damage instead if used on Dual Guns.
execution.desc: Your offhand gun attacks now count as flourishes and do a flat 20 extra damage when used with no bullets.

executioners_frenzy.name: Executioner's Frenzy
executioners_frenzy.additional_info: This works on Paused Posture caused from Stature Break or Maiming Claws.
executioners_frenzy.desc: Landing a light attack while their posture is paused reduces their assassination cooldown by 5 seconds.

exoskeleton.name: Exoskeleton
exoskeleton.additional_info: Exoskeleton's resistance will be less effective if you do not meet its Fortitude requirement, losing 0.125% resistance for every point under 40 Fortitude, capping at 6.875% resistance with 15 Fortitude. Chitin's resistances stack multiplicatively with Exoskeleton.
exoskeleton.desc: You have a layer of fortified Natural Armor that replenishes when you rest. Your Natural Armor will resist 10% Physical Damage when active.

expeditionary_evasiveness.name: Expeditionary Evasiveness
expeditionary_evasiveness.additional_info: Your Agility Mantras gain 3 Mantra levels, bypassing the level 5 cap. This is not displayed on the Mantra tooltip. Jetstriker Mantras are unaffected by this.
expeditionary_evasiveness.desc: The design of this rapier allows you to much more swiftly attack in tandem with your mantras, giving Agility mantras you use +3 levels in all stats, even bypassing the level cap.

expeditious_combo.name: Expeditious Combo
expeditious_combo.additional_info: Passively increases the speed of your Onslaught. After landing a basic attack uppercut, gain the Expeditious Combo status effect for 15 seconds, displayed on the cooldown indicator. Casting Onslaught while you have this status effect will massively increase its speed, consuming the status effect in the process. This has no cooldown, but must be manually refreshed every time you use it.
expeditious_combo.desc: Landing an uppercut will grant a buff to your Onslaught for 15 seconds, using Onslaught during this time will massively increase the speed of it.

experienced_healer.name: Experienced Healer
experienced_healer.desc: Every time you heal yourself, gain 5 extra health on top of that.

expert_bloodrender.name: Expert Bloodrender
expert_bloodrender.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
expert_bloodrender.desc: You can now obtain 2-star Bloodrender mantras.

expert_flamecharmer.name: Expert Flamecharmer
expert_flamecharmer.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
expert_flamecharmer.desc: You can now obtain 2-Star Leveled Flamecharmer Mantras.

expert_frostdrawer.name: Expert Frostdrawer
expert_frostdrawer.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
expert_frostdrawer.desc: You can now obtain 2-Star Leveled Frostdraw Mantras.

expert_galebreather.name: Expert Galebreather
expert_galebreather.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
expert_galebreather.desc: You can now obtain 2-Star Leveled Galebreathe mantras.

expert_ironsinger.name: Expert Ironsinger
expert_ironsinger.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
expert_ironsinger.desc: You can now obtain 2-star Ironsinger mantras.

expert_shadowcaster.name: Expert Shadowcaster
expert_shadowcaster.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
expert_shadowcaster.desc: You can now obtain 2-star Leveled Shadowcaster Mantras.

expert_thundercaller.name: Expert Thundercaller
expert_thundercaller.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
expert_thundercaller.desc: You can now obtain 2-star Thundercaller mantras.

explosive_efficiency.name: Explosive Efficiency
explosive_efficiency.desc: Crafting a bomb will yield two bombs. Chance to make three.

explosive_finish.name: Explosive Finish
explosive_finish.additional_info: Deals 5 Flamecharm damage. Upon proccing Emperor Flame, this Talent will be put on a 3s cd.
explosive_finish.desc: If an enemy is on fire when you flourish, blast them away with a fire blast.

explosive_ignition.name: Explosive Ignition
explosive_ignition.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool, that when used while standing inside of a steam cloud causes a very large explosion after a delay, dealing high damage and consuming the Steam cloud.
explosive_ignition.desc: Ignite nearby steam, causing a large explosion.

explosive_rage.name: Explosive Rage
explosive_rage.additional_info: While buffed, your Puppets will gain an orange swirling aura. On proc, this buffs all currently alive Puppets and all Puppets that spawn within the next 10 seconds. The following abilities and Talents proc Explosive Rage: Explosive Finish, Emperor Flame, The Final Act, and the Detonation enchant.
explosive_rage.desc: Causing explosion will make your puppets go into a frenzy - speeding up and dealing 50% more damage.

explosive_rounds.name: Explosive Rounds
explosive_rounds.desc: Every bullet that lands now detonates on your opponent.

exposed_durability.name: Exposed Durability
exposed_durability.additional_info: Procs against Berserk users and while Berserk is active.
exposed_durability.desc: Deal 10% more damage to opponents with no armor durability left.

extended_trauma.name: Extended Trauma
extended_trauma.additional_info: Deals 3 posture damage to non-blocking opponents on M1, and 10 posture damage on critical. This cannot posture break, and this does not benefit from posture damage modifiers.
extended_trauma.desc: Successful light attacks and criticals on your opponent now also gives them a bit of posture.

face_cutter.name: Face Cutter
face_cutter.additional_info: Grants an additional hit to your Spine Cutter that deals 50% of your weapon's scaled damage. Similarly to Spine Cutter, the damage of this attack cannot be buffed and it has no PEN.
face_cutter.desc: Your Spine Cutter now deals an additional hit.

family_recipe.name: Family Recipe
family_recipe.additional_info: Bombs are crafted with 2 Iron and 1 Coal. Pressing E while holding a bomb will throw it, while pressing M1 while holding a bomb will drop it at your feet. Bombs have a 5 second cooldown on throw. Bombs do not deal self damage. Bomb damage scales on your Intelligence attribute, dealing 10 damage at 0 Intelligence and scaling up to 45.5 damage at 100 Intelligence. Bombs deal typeless damage, ignoring armor.
family_recipe.desc: You can now craft bombs at a crafting bench.

fan_the_flames.name: Fan the Flames
fan_the_flames.additional_info: The benefits of Inhale can now be applied to your Flamecharm Mantras.
fan_the_flames.desc: Your stored Wind mantras can now empower your Fire mantras.

fang_and_coil.name: Fang and Coil
fang_and_coil.additional_info: Allows you to use the Fang and Coil fist style.
fang_and_coil.desc: Adopt the path of the serpent.

fast_blade.name: Fast Blade
fast_blade.additional_info: Increases the speed boost duration from parrying by 3 seconds.
fast_blade.desc: Extend the speed boost you get from successfully parrying an attack.

faster_blade.name: Faster Blade
faster_blade.desc: A successful "Drift" now grants a speed boost.

fatal_backstab.name: Fatal Backstab
fatal_backstab.desc: Weapon backstabs deal an extra 5 true damage on your opponent (20 extra damage if done to PvE).

fatal_stealth.name: Fatal Stealth
fatal_stealth.additional_info: Grants a 0.2% damage buff to attacks that hit your opponent's back for every 1% stealth you have. This only works on stealth gained from Equipment or Outfit sources. Felinor's innate stealth multiplier has no effect on this. This does not work on assassinations.
fatal_stealth.desc: You deal increased backstab damage to opponents based on how high your stealth stat currently is.

fatal_strike.name: Fatal Strike
fatal_strike.additional_info: Adds a +20% damage modifier to your Strength Mantras on guard break if they have a Wrath Gem equipped. Applies a 50% slow for 5.5 seconds. 10 second cooldown.
fatal_strike.desc: Landing a guard break with a strength mantra that has a Wrath Gem on it devastates your opponent, dealing extra damage and slowing them down.

fear_the_dark.name: Fear the Dark
fear_the_dark.additional_info: After you land a Shadowcast Mantra, if your opponent attempts to distance themselves from you, they will be locked in place for 1.5 seconds.
fear_the_dark.desc: Enemies will briefly hang in place when they run from you.

feathered_glider.name: Feathered Glider
feathered_glider.additional_info: Provides a Glider with infinite durability. The color of this Glider is dependent on your aspect variant, but it can be dyed.
feathered_glider.desc: As a show of independence when they come of age, Tirans will strike out on their own with just their hand-crafted glider, gliding down from the mountain peaks where they make their homes. You take 10% less fall damage.

featherfall.name: Featherfall
featherfall.additional_info: Nullifies fall damage. Once 255 fall damage has been nullified, this will go on a 2 minute cooldown, disabling its benefits.
featherfall.desc: Prevents falls from damaging you. After sufficient damage has been resisted, the pendant will go inactive and require time to recharge.

ferrymans_curse.name: Ferryman's Curse
ferrymans_curse.desc: Wearing this gives you a 20% chance to convert incoming elemental damage into Lightning damage.

fictitious_force.name: Fictitious Force
fictitious_force.additional_info: Halves the effectiveness of all speed boosts. Adds true damage to your attacks, with the true damage scaling on your speed boosts and momentum.
fictitious_force.desc: Reduce the power of all speed boosts you gain by 50%. Deal extra true damage based on how fast you are.

finishing_slay.name: Finishing Slay
finishing_slay.additional_info: Consumes all of your Chains of Perfection stacks for a secondary instance of damage on your critical. This deals 7 typeless damage per Chain of Perfection stack in PvP, or 166 typeless damage per stack in PvE. The first 5 hits that normally do not grant stacks will contribute to this, allowing you to deal 150 PvP damage or 3.5k PvE damage at maximum Chain stacks. This can be buffed, but it is not considered as a weapon attack, limiting buffing options. Finishing Slay has no cooldown, allowing multi-hit criticals to deal massive damage in PvE.
finishing_slay.desc: If you land a critical attack while also having stacks from the Chain of Perfection talent, consume all those for a massive damaging attack. This works on other players as well.

finishing_touch.name: Finishing Touch
finishing_touch.additional_info: Your critical must knock the opponent for this Talent to proc.
finishing_touch.desc: [Dagger] Instantly execute enemies finished with the critical attack of your dagger.

first_blood.name: First Blood
first_blood.desc: Your first blood mantra you use in combat has no blood cost.

first_interrogation.name: First Interrogation
first_interrogation.additional_info: Only procs on weapon attacks from Electrified opponents. Ether given is half of their scaled damage.
first_interrogation.desc: Attacks from opponents who are Electrified will give you ether proportional to their initial damage.

fishers_lure.name: Fisher's Lure
fishers_lure.additional_info: Slightly increases the chance of hooking something while fishing.
fishers_lure.desc: Fish are drawn to your line more quickly.

fishman.name: Fishman
fishman.desc: When your Blood is over 50%, you won't drown when Unconscious in water. Gain additional healing from knocking others Unconscious in water.

fists_of_fortitude.name: Fists of Fortitude
fists_of_fortitude.additional_info: Lasts 10 seconds then goes on cooldown once the buff ends. You can only gain stacks from M1s or criticals with the M1 tag.
fists_of_fortitude.desc: Fists Every 6 hits with your fists builds up a shield of endurance reducing incoming damage by 15%. 70s CD

fists_of_navae.name: Fists of Navae
fists_of_navae.desc: Double the amount of ether you gain on successful light attacks.

flame_within.name: Flame Within
flame_within.additional_info: 8 second cooldown on cast. The self burn can only be dispelled by using the tool again or through the rain/sea.
flame_within.desc: An application of Pleeksty's concept of the inner flame, also known as the soul of man. Set yourself ablaze to gain more move speed and 10% extra damage.

flamecharm_unbounded.name: Flamecharm Unbounded
flamecharm_unbounded.additional_info: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Flamecharm Attribute. This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
flamecharm_unbounded.desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Flamecharm to its fullest.

flamecharmer.name: Flamecharmer
flamecharmer.desc: Grants you the ability to command Fire as a Flamecharmer.

flames_of_the_past.name: Flames of the Past
flames_of_the_past.additional_info: Your Flamecharm Mantras now spawn Twisted Puppets' Puppets on hit.
flames_of_the_past.desc: Your flamecharm mantras now call forth fiery homing spirits.

flamewalker.name: Flamewalker
flamewalker.desc: When Warding Radiance is active you leave trails of flame when you slide.

flaming_flourish.name: Flaming Flourish
flaming_flourish.desc: Set enemies on fire when you flourish or uppercut them.

flanking_maneuvers.name: Flanking Maneuvers
flanking_maneuvers.desc: Enemies you assassinate take more PEN from your squadmates in your party.

flare_drop.name: Flare Drop
flare_drop.additional_info: Applies burn when you land a Mantra with a 5 second cooldown.
flare_drop.desc: Landing mantras sets your opponent on fire.

flash_point.name: Flash Point
flash_point.additional_info: 45 second cooldown on the Empowered Eruption effect.
flash_point.desc: Block breaking an opponent causes your Eruptions to be Empowered for the next 10s. Block breaking an opponent with a Fire Mantra procs Burning.

flashboil.name: Flashboil
flashboil.additional_info: Steam deals 2 typeless damage per tick, at 6 ticks per second. Steam cannot be blocked nor parried.
flashboil.desc: Landing Ice/fire attacks on burning/chilled enemies extinguishes the flame and generates steam.

flashwind.name: Flashwind
flashwind.additional_info: After using a Gale or Lightning dash, gain the Flashwind status effect for 3 seconds, allowing you to perform Flashwind dashes.
flashwind.desc: Anytime you proc Air Pressure or Overcharge, give yourself the ability to have enhanced dashes again for a few seconds.

flask_amplifier.name: Flask Amplifier
flask_amplifier.additional_info: Increases the healing gained from Etris Flasks by 15% additively, meaning Flasks will restore 65% health on use instead of 50%.

fleetfoot.name: Fleetfoot
fleetfoot.additional_info: After using a Lightning or Gale dash, all dashes within the next 3 seconds will become enhanced. These enhanced dashes have the same effectiveness as Lightning and Gale dashes.
fleetfoot.desc: Gain an initial speed boost when slide jumping.

float_like_a_butterfly.name: Float Like a Butterfly
float_like_a_butterfly.additional_info: 5s CD. Only accessible if True Strength is active. Deals 24 Oath + Slash damage (4 hits that deal 7 damage each).
float_like_a_butterfly.desc: While having True Strength active, cancel your air dash to enter a frenzy of slashes.

flow_state.name: Flow State
flow_state.additional_info: Activating Ankle Cutter, Mayhem, Relentless Hunt, or Rising Star within 2 seconds of activating Flow State will enhance these attacks. Flow State has a 10 second cooldown, but landing a Flow State-enhanced Silentheart ability will reset its cooldown. Flow State may affect the damage, wind-up, number of attacks, sound effect, or properties of Silentheart abilities.
flow_state.desc: Enter a moment of extreme focus in which you can change the windup of your special attacks with the correct timing.

flying_swiftkick.name: Flying Swiftkick
flying_swiftkick.desc: Hitting a Jus Karita critical attack while Swiftkick Prodigy is active will greatly slow your enemy, and consume your speed boost.

focused_hematoma.name: Focused Hematoma
focused_hematoma.desc: Decrease outside sources of blood loss by 25% but reduce the amount of temporary health you receive by 15%.

focused_perception.name: Focused Perception
focused_perception.desc: Massively increase the range of your Rhythm if you use it while Tranquil Circle is active.

focused_strikes.name: Focused Strikes
focused_strikes.desc: All criticals deal 15% more posture damage.

foolish_outburst.name: Foolish Outburst
foolish_outburst.additional_info: Steals 40% of the Tempo used. Every point in Intelligence below 50 will reduce the Tempo steal by 0.66%, capping at a minimum of 23.33% of the Tempo absorbed with 25 Intelligence.
foolish_outburst.desc: Blocking or parrying a vent will absorb the Tempo cost of the vent. A Tactician steadies the course of battle.

footwork_mastery.name: Footwork Mastery
footwork_mastery.additional_info: The speed boost lasts 15 seconds despite what the description states. 45 second cooldown.
footwork_mastery.desc: Landing a critical gives you an immense speed boost for 10 seconds.

force_your_way.name: Force Your Way
force_your_way.additional_info: You can now parry certain NPC attacks that are normally unparryable. On proc, your armor will be drained, with the amount of armor lost being based on the damage the attack would normally deal. This Talent does not work if you have no armor durability.
force_your_way.desc: You can parry unparryable attacks from giant monsters, at the cost of armor durability.

forced_fulfilment.name: Forced Fulfilment
forced_fulfilment.additional_info: The Metal Fakeout critical only works while you are in range of a target. Additionally, this critical applies Bleed and counts as a weapon attack, not a Mantra. The rod applies a 52.5% slow for 15 seconds.
forced_fulfilment.desc: Your Metal Greatsword now has Metal Fakeout as its critical attack. Landing a critical attack using your Metal Greatsword attaches a heavy rod onto your opponent, heavily slowing them.

formless.name: Formless
formless.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that costs 50 Ether with a 5 second cooldown. This tool allows you to teleport to your cursor's location, but you cannot teleport outside of the Tacet bubble. On teleport, Tacet will end early. The speed boost gained from using Tacet lasts 2.5 seconds.
formless.desc: Teleport to a location within your Tacet bubble. Receive a slight speed boost when activating Tacet.

fortify.name: Fortify
fortify.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that grants 15% damage reduction at the cost of reducing your movement speed by 36%.
fortify.desc: Slow down your movement in exchange for fortifying your defenses.

fortitude_unbounded.name: Fortitude Unbounded
fortitude_unbounded.additional_info: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Fortitude Attribute. The stat requirements to obtain this Talent will be increased to 77 or 78 if your Aspect has increased Fortitude on spawn, though this limitation will be removed if you have the Multifaceted Echo Unlock. The quest requirement for this Talent will be removed if you've obtained it previously on your account.
fortitude_unbounded.desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your fortitude to its fullest.

fragile_freeze.name: Fragile Freeze
fragile_freeze.additional_info: Encases them in ice, removing their ability to move, parry, block, or dodge for a short amount of time. Taking damage by any source (including damage over time effects) will end the freeze early. You can spam [F] to get out of Freeze faster.
fragile_freeze.desc: Your Light Attacks and Critical will now freeze chilled opponents on guardbreak.

freezing_wight.name: Freezing Wight
freezing_wight.additional_info: Applies Chill for 7 seconds or 1 Crystal on proc. Additionally, this changes the damage type of your Haunted Gale Ghosts and Specter Apparitions to Galebreathe + Frostdraw.
freezing_wight.desc: Your Haunted Gale now procs Chilled.

frenzied_dance.name: Frenzied Dance
frenzied_dance.desc: [Rapier] The more posture you currently have, the more chip and posture damage you deal.

fried_circuits.name: Fried Circuits
fried_circuits.additional_info: Targets affected by Sapped have the cooldowns of their Mantras increased.
fried_circuits.desc: Overloading an enemy applies Sapped for 5s.

friends_in_high_places.name: Friends in High Places
friends_in_high_places.additional_info: Whenever you are knocked by town guards from a faction in which you have good reputation, the town guards will scold you instead of gripping you, letting you live.
friends_in_high_places.desc: Your connections often let you off the hook when you're in trouble with the law. Nepotism sure does pay!

from_the_ashes.name: From The Ashes
from_the_ashes.desc: Using an Etris Flask when at 30% health or below now grants you a damage buff and resistance buff for 30 seconds.

frost_buster.name: Frost Buster
frost_buster.additional_info: On critical, create three moderately large ice patches in a linear path in front of yourself. These patches last 1 minute 30 seconds. Despite what the Talent description states, Greathammers do not proc Frost Buster but Greataxes do. Greatcannons do not proc Frost Buster either.
frost_buster.desc: Greatsword Criticals and Greathammer Criticals now leave a place Ice below the path they carve.

frostbite.name: Frostbite
frostbite.desc: Enemies can no longer heal when under the effect of your chill. PvE enemies also net you 5% more Heal Boost when they are chilled.

frostdraw_unbounded.name: Frostdraw Unbounded
frostdraw_unbounded.additional_info: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Frostdraw Attribute. This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
frostdraw_unbounded.desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Frostdraw to its fullest.

frostdrawer.name: Frostdrawer
frostdrawer.desc: Grants you the ability to command Ice as a Frostdrawer.

frostride.name: Frostride
frostride.additional_info: You can now walk on water by creating ice below your feet. This has no cooldown and does not cost Ether.
frostride.desc: Your footsteps echo the legend of Saint Jay, freezing the sea beneath.

frozen_anchor.name: Frozen Anchor
frozen_anchor.reqs: frozen_anchor := 100r LHT OR 100r MED OR 100r HVY, 100s ICE
frozen_anchor.additional_info: Bottom Freeze will be removed if the target takes damage from any source. This makes this Talent extremely ineffective on multihit criticals. The Chill applied from this Talent lasts 12 seconds. 10 second cooldown.
frozen_anchor.desc: Apply bottom freeze and chill to your opponent whenever you land a flourish, uppercut, or crit.

frozen_legs.name: Frozen Legs
frozen_legs.additional_info: Only procs from Chill procs on Mantras. Lasts for 0.75 seconds.
frozen_legs.desc: Your slow effect prevents your opponents from rolling.

frozen_pin_cushion.name: Frozen Pin-Cushion
frozen_pin_cushion.additional_info: Instantly detonates crystals if you have Crystallization Path.

frozen_web.name: Frozen Web
frozen_web.additional_info: Applies Chill for 7 seconds and Bottom Freeze. Has a 4 second cooldown.
frozen_web.desc: Landing a critical with a Static Link on your opponent applies Chilled.

fulgurite_formation.name: Fulgurite Formation
fulgurite_formation.additional_info: The lightning strikes deal 5 typeless damage with a 4 second cooldown. The double Crystal application buff does not stack with successive Fulgurite Formation procs. Procs Grounding Bolt.
fulgurite_formation.desc: When your Crystals explode, lightning strikes. When your Surge charges Overload on an enemy, your Crystals apply twice on them for 8s.

full_reset.name: Full Reset
full_reset.additional_info: Also works on non-humanoid monsters, resetting your Resonance cooldown after they die.
full_reset.desc: Knocking an enemy resets your resonance cooldowns. This effect has a 60 second cooldown.

ga_buidhe.name: Ga Buidhe
ga_buidhe.additional_info: Attacking your opponent's back now procs all Talents and effects that would normally proc when attacking with the tip of your weapon.
ga_buidhe.desc: Backstabs now count as the tip of your weapon.

ga_dearg.name: Ga Dearg
ga_dearg.additional_info: Hitting a bleeding enemy with the tip of your weapon will reapply the bleed.
ga_dearg.desc: Striking a bleeding enemy with the tip of your weapon extends the bleed.

gale_boots.name: Gale Boots
gale_boots.desc: Reduce the amount of fall damage you take by 50%.

gale_trap.name: Gale Trap
gale_trap.additional_info: Marks players knocked by you for 6s with "Gale Trap". If the user picks up a target they've marked, they will gain a 35% speed boost for 20 seconds. But if anyone else attempts to pick up the marked target, they will be ragdolled and flung upwards. This includes the user's allies. Gale Reflection activates upon getting hit by an enemy, granting damage reduction to the attack and placing a Gale Trap on them. The damage of the Gale Trap scales with the strength of the enemy you killed.
gale_trap.desc: Knocking a player places a wind trap, causing anyone to pick up that body to get sent flying. Gain a speed boost picking up the body yourself. Killing PvE opponents gives you Gale Reflection instead.

galebreathe_unbounded.name: Galebreathe Unbounded
galebreathe_unbounded.additional_info: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Galebreathe Attribute.
galebreathe_unbounded.desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Galebreathe to its fullest.

galebreather.name: Galebreather
galebreather.desc: Grants you the ability to command wind as a Galebreather.

gathering_electricity.name: Gathering Electricity
gathering_electricity.reqs: static_blade => gathering_electricity := 65s LTN, 25r STR OR 25r AGL
gathering_electricity.additional_info: Clears all Static Blade stacks on proc. You can still gain Static Blade stacks while Gathering Electricity is active. For 15 seconds, this increases the base damage on your weapon attacks, including criticals by 3.
gathering_electricity.desc: Reaching 5 Static Blade charges will now consume the stacks and apply a lightning buff to your blade. 60 second cooldown.

gathering_storm.name: Gathering Storm
gathering_storm.additional_info: All weapon damage is stored instead of being dealt initially, similar to the Poser's Ring. Upon reaching damage thresholds of stored damage, lightning orbs will appear above your character's head, with a cap of 8 orbs. Upon sheathing your weapon, the orbs will attack your opponent, dealing all of the stored damage at once.
gathering_storm.desc: Your damage is stored in a lightning orb. Sheathing your weapon will shoot the lightning orbs at the opponent. The orbs will do more damage based on how many orbs are being stored up.

ghost.name: Ghost
ghost.additional_info: The invisibility and I-frame duration is 1.2 seconds if you have 40 or higher Agility. Ghost's duration will be reduced by 0.0133 seconds per point in Agility under 40, capping at 0.866 seconds at 15 Agility. 20 second cooldown.
ghost.desc: Dodging a move will briefly make you invisible, ending early if you attack.

gilded_path_scrapsinger.name: Gilded Path: Scrapsinger
gilded_path_scrapsinger.additional_info: Your Ironsing abilities and status effects are now yellow.
gilded_path_scrapsinger.desc: Flourishing an enemy consumes any rods they have and siphons their armor to you per rod.

give_and_take.name: Give and Take
give_and_take.additional_info: This does not apply to self damage. Stacks multiplicatively with Loyalty.
give_and_take.desc: Deal less damage to comrades and receive less damage from comrades.

glacial_coasting.name: Glacial Coasting
glacial_coasting.desc: Sliding while Orbital Ice is active leaves trails of ice.

glacial_mobility.name: Glacial Mobility
glacial_mobility.additional_info: The Talent activates after you've slide jumped, and not during the slide jump, contrary to the Talent description.
glacial_mobility.desc: Cast while slide-jumping to perform a running attack with your ice sabers.

glass_path_crystallization.name: Glass Path: Crystallization
glass_path_crystallization.additional_info: Turns your Frostdraw pink. Applying chill or freeze applies red ice crystals on the enemy instead of slowing opponent. Stacking 5 ice crystals or guard breaking an opponent who has crystals makes them explode. Each crystal has 3 base damage with 5 Frostdraw scaling, increasing by 0.015 damage per Frostdraw investment for a maximum damage of 4.5 each at 100 Frostdraw. 1 second cooldown on explosion proc.
glass_path_crystallization.desc: Your ice abilities no longer grant a slow effect or the ability to freeze and instead cause ice crystals to grow on your opponent.

glide_mastery.name: Glide Mastery
glide_mastery.desc: Experience using the glider you crafted results in you being able to glide faster in the air. You've also trained to quickly pull it out in dire situations, resulting in you no longer taking fall damage.

going_nowhere.name: Going Nowhere
going_nowhere.desc: When enemies dodge your attacks, their momentum is killed and they're briefly prevented from sprinting.

golden_age.name: Golden Age
golden_age.desc: Your Iron Pull now detonates Crystals and overloads Surges.

golden_tongue.name: Golden Tongue
golden_tongue.additional_info: This can either restore 33% of your maximum Ether or grant 10% damage reduction with a visual effect similar to Reinforce. The buff given to each player is rolled independently. Golden Tongue's cooldown is dependent on your Charisma investment, gaining or losing 0.25 seconds for every point in Charisma below or above 40 respectively. Minimum cooldown of 45 seconds at 100 Charisma, maximum cooldown of 66 seconds at 15 Charisma.
golden_tongue.desc: Typing or using a gesture gives a random buff to you and those around you. (60 second cooldown)

good_luck_charm.name: Good Luck Charm
good_luck_charm.desc: Makes you feel a little better, probably.

gourmand.name: Gourmand
gourmand.additional_info: Increases hunger and thirst gain by 20%.
gourmand.desc: Your hunger and thirst gain from eating is increased.

graceful_steps.name: Graceful Steps
graceful_steps.additional_info: The speed boost has a very short duration; having a fast swingspeed weapon is recommended to capitalize off this Talent's effect. 5 second cooldown.
graceful_steps.desc: Your dancing steps now gives a faster speed boost.

grand_feast.name: Grand Feast
grand_feast.additional_info: Health gain is disabled in PvP combat. On proc, gain 40% tempo, 55% Ether, 3% blood, and 5% health.
grand_feast.desc: Regain tempo, ether, blood and health when gaining hunger from killing.

grand_skewer.name: Grand Skewer
grand_skewer.additional_info: Press [F] during Grand Javelin's windup to activate this effect. This does not work in Layer 1.
grand_skewer.desc: Your Grand Javelin now carries opponents through the air.

grand_support.name: Grand Support
grand_support.additional_info: Heals you for 2% of your maximum health, increased by 1% for every player buffed. Heals affected players by 3% of their maximum health.
grand_support.desc: Everyone you buff with Reinforce is healed lightly. You're healed slightly if you heal others.

grasp_of_eylis.name: Grasp of Eylis
grasp_of_eylis.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that can only be used in the Voidheart, teleporting you to your Bounty target. Choosing Stealth causes teleports you near, but far away from your target, hiding the bounty target. Choosing Ferocity teleports you close to your target, highlighting them through walls briefly. If Ferocity is chosen, your character will be enveloped in shadows, signifying that you have a bounty.
grasp_of_eylis.desc: You can temporarily teleport to locations near your bounty target, if one can be found. However, you must stay close, or be desynchronized.

grasp_on_reality.name: Grasp on Reality
grasp_on_reality.desc: Damage taken from insanity is reduced.

grotesque_resilience.name: Grotesque Resilience
grotesque_resilience.additional_info: Reduces burn damage by 50%. Reduces Flame Within's burn and bleed damage by 25%.
grotesque_resilience.desc: You take reduced damage from 'Damage over Time' effects.

grounding_bolt.name: Grounding Bolt
grounding_bolt.reqs: grounding_bolt := 90s LTN, 90r LHT OR 90r MED OR 90r HVY
grounding_bolt.additional_info: 10 second cooldown. Procs on lightning strikes caused from Scorched Peak, Fulgurite Formation, the Specialist Set equipment Talents, and Storm/Stormbreaker enchantments during the rain.
grounding_bolt.desc: Anytime you summon a lightning strike on your opponent, apply knockdown if it lands.

gruesome_harvest.name: Gruesome Harvest
gruesome_harvest.additional_info: Grants 15 flat temporary health on proc. Has a 2 second cooldown.
gruesome_harvest.desc: Landing Bloodrend mantras on opponents with over 70% blood poison will give you slight temporary health.

gunpowder_blast.name: Gunpowder Blast
gunpowder_blast.additional_info: Pistol blast shots deal 2 more posture damage if you have no bullets in your inventory.
gunpowder_blast.desc: Pistol shots without bullets do 2 extra posture. [Dual Guns]

gunslingers_fury.name: Gunslinger's Fury
gunslingers_fury.additional_info: If your main weapon is a Pistol or a Rifle, and you have an offhand Pistol equipped, your critical will be replaced with the Soulwrought Gun's special attack if used midair.
gunslingers_fury.desc: When having a side gun equipped with a gun or rifle, use a critical in the air to shoot a barrage of bullets towards your opponent.

hair_product.name: Hair Product
hair_product.additional_info: Gives a Talent tool that shows a popup menu and allows you to select either Flammable, Charming, or Revitalizing Hair Sprays. Your Hair Spray will change to the chosen effect.

hair_spray.name: Hair Spray
hair_spray.additional_info: Flammable applies Burn or causes an Eruption; parryable and blockable. Charming applies Charm for 15 seconds; parryable and blockable. Revitalizing heals 10% of the affected entity's health; unparryable and unblockable. 10 second cooldown.

hammerfall.name: Hammerfall
hammerfall.desc: [Clubs] Aerial attacks do 25% more posture damage when blocked.

hard_read.name: Hard Read
hard_read.desc: Hitting your opponent during a feint will cause them to be Dazed.

hard_stop.name: Hard Stop
hard_stop.desc: Landing a charged shot will knock your opponent back.

hardened_shell.name: Hardened Shell
hardened_shell.desc: Your Natural Armor grows sturdier, being able to take more hits before breaking.

harvester.name: Harvester
harvester.desc: Chance to receive two sets of ingredients when harvesting.

haste.name: Haste
haste.additional_info: Increases your movement speed by +3 studs per second. This does not count as a speed boost for Talent procs.
haste.desc: Gain a permanent +3 speed buff at all times.

haunted_gale.name: Haunted Gale
haunted_gale.additional_info: On proc, gain the Haunted status effect, spawning ghosts that attack your opponent every time you land a Mantra. Having Gale Wisp active increases the duration of Haunted by 3 seconds. If you have Apparitions, landing a Galebreathe Mantra while having the Haunted Gale status effect will create an Apparition instead while non-Galebreathe Mantras will summon Haunted Gale's Ghosts like normal.
haunted_gale.desc: Landing 3 Galebreathe Mantras without whiffing calls for a Haunted Phantom. The Phantom will attack alongside you for the next 8s before dissipating.

haunted_path_specter.name: Haunted Path: Specter
haunted_path_specter.additional_info: Turns your Galebreathe white. If Haunted Gale procs on non-Galebreathe Mantras or if you do not have the Apparitions Talent, then Haunted Gale's phantoms will still appear on proc.
haunted_path_specter.desc: Build up spectral energy by performing successful dodges and landing Wind mantras. Phantom winds from Haunted Gale no longer appear. You can no longer suffocate enemies.

heart_reverb.name: Heart Reverb
heart_reverb.additional_info: If someone performs an action within Rhythm's range, they will be highlighted red, even through walls. Rhythm will now stay active after uncrouching, only deactivating if done so manually or if you take damage. If an enemy dodges your attack, their health and posture percentages will be displayed in text next to their character briefly.
heart_reverb.desc: Those picked up by your Rhythm are marked for 8 seconds. Whenever an opponent dodges your attack, detect their rhythm and vigor. You can use Rhythm while standing.

heartfire_renewal.name: Heartfire Renewal
heartfire_renewal.desc: Regenerate Heartfire whenever you are burning. Upon revival with Phoenix Flames, restore half of your Heartfire gauge.

heartwing_beat.name: Heartwing Beat
heartwing_beat.additional_info: Your aerial attack is replaced with Heartwing Beat, a slashing attack that applies bleed and deals Wither damage. This attack has a base damage of 25.5, copying the scaling stat from your equipped weapon. You cannot proc Air Counter or Relentless Hunt on Heartwing Beat. 6 second cooldown.
heartwing_beat.desc: Your heart beats a new rhythm, as your aerial attack takes on a new manifestation.

hearty_ether.name: Hearty Ether
hearty_ether.desc: Devouring Eye steal procs now heal you based on the amount of ether stolen.

heavy_fatigue.name: Heavy Fatigue
heavy_fatigue.desc: [Greataxes] Hitting an enemy slowed by your Greataxe temporarily reduces how far they can roll and applies Sluggish to PvE enemies for a few seconds.

heavy_haul.name: Heavy Haul
heavy_haul.desc: Enemies who carry you move significantly slower. Take slightly less posture damage from large enemies. Takes one to know one.

heavy_hitter.name: Heavy Hitter
heavy_hitter.desc: [Heavy Weapons] Your posture damage is increased by 10%.

heavy_shoulders.name: Heavy Shoulders
heavy_shoulders.desc: If your opponent has 3 or more rods, their dodges are slower.

heavy_weapons_unbounded.name: Heavy Weapons Unbounded
heavy_weapons_unbounded.additional_info: Removes the 75 Attribute cap on Heavy Weapons.
heavy_weapons_unbounded.desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Heavy Weapons attribute to its fullest.

heir_of_lightning.name: Heir of Lightning
heir_of_lightning.additional_info: Increases the base duration of Lightning Cloak to 15 seconds.
heir_of_lightning.desc: At max orbs, Lightning Cloak is enhanced.

heliodar_wings.name: Heliodar Wings
heliodar_wings.additional_info: Pressing H will sprout your Heliodar Wings. Hold Space while flying to ascend, Q to speed up, or CTRL to descend. Flying consumes Heartfire Gauge. If you run out of Heartfire Gauge while flying, you will be set on fire, ending the flight early. Taking damage from any source will cause your flight to end early.

hellion_shift.name: Hellion Shift
hellion_shift.desc: The more insane you are the more iframes you gain on your dodge.

hells_partisan.name: Hell's Partisan
hells_partisan.additional_info: Deals 5 Flamecharm damage. Parryable, but not blockable or dodgeable due to hitstun.
hells_partisan.desc: After landing a flame dagger on an opponent, your next hit against them will impale with a divine spear from above.

hemolysis.name: Hemolysis
hemolysis.desc: Deal 20% more critical attack damage to opponents with over 25% blood poisoning.

hemolytic_transfusion.name: Hemolytic Transfusion
hemolytic_transfusion.desc: Guardbreaking an enemy with a Bloodrend mantra increases the amount of blood poison from the attack.

hemorrhaging_blow.name: Hemorrhaging Blow
hemorrhaging_blow.additional_info: The damage to healing conversion is 1:1, meaning 20 healing = 20 damage. Works on all non-passive healing. 55 second cooldown, starting once the guardbreak occurs.
hemorrhaging_blow.desc: Block breaking your opponent with a blood mantra turns your opponent's combat healing into damage for 8 seconds.

herbivore.name: Herbivore
herbivore.desc: You gain more nutrition from eating plants.

heretics_sacrifice.name: Heretic's Sacrifice
heretics_sacrifice.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that drains a significant amount of sanity to heal 20 raw health. If you are already at 0 Sanity, you will still be healed at no downside.
heretics_sacrifice.desc: A chant that heavily sacrifices your sanity to regain a bit of health.

heretics_sutra.name: Heretic's Sutra
heretics_sutra.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that drains the user's sanity on proc. If your sanity is above 80%, it will be set to 65% on use. If your sanity is below 80%, it will be reduced by 15% on use. Passively procs Shared Misery and Piercing Will for 15 seconds. The cooldown and windup of Heretic's Sutra scale on your Willpower investment, but the scaling is largely negligible.
heretics_sutra.desc: A chant that steers you into the state of Insanity for 20 seconds.

heros_assist.name: Hero's Assist
heros_assist.additional_info: Each Saint has a specific spawn requirement and ability when spawned. You can spawn heroes independent of your current Saint Stance. This passive ability works once per Saint Stance, requiring you to cycle to the next one to reactivate.
heros_assist.desc: Heroes come to your aid based on your current stance.

hex_bullet.name: Hex Bullet
hex_bullet.desc: Bullets that hit your opponents block shatter into dust on impact, unleashing a maddening smoke that increases your opponent's sanity.

hidden_tendril.name: Hidden Tendril
hidden_tendril.additional_info: Also procs on physical critical attacks, uppercuts, and flourishes.
hidden_tendril.desc: Landing any physical mantra places a Hidden Tendril on the opponent.

hip_shooter.name: Hip Shooter
hip_shooter.additional_info: 5 second cooldown. Requires ammunition in your inventory to be used.
hip_shooter.desc: When wielded with a Medium/Heavy weapon, your side gun can now fire a bullet projectile.

hook_line_and_sinker.name: Hook, Line, and Sinker
hook_line_and_sinker.additional_info: Slightly increases margin of failure before losing a fish.
hook_line_and_sinker.desc: Once something's caught your line, it's much harder to get loose.

hoplite.name: Hoplite
hoplite.desc: Posture damage is reduced by 15% when wielding a spear and standing still.

hot_potato.name: Hot Potato
hot_potato.desc: Gain a large boost of speed after throwing a bomb. Your bombs have a chance to detonate twice.

human_battery.name: Human Battery
human_battery.additional_info: Each Rod equates to 10 Ether. Works on Rods that weren't applied by you, but does not work on Rods applied to you.
human_battery.desc: When you are out of Ether, convert the Surge stacks of nearby enemies into Ether to pay the cost of your Mantras.

hungry_flames.name: Hungry Flames
hungry_flames.desc: When you have no Ether, consume Stomach and Water to instantly cast your next fire mantra [15 second CD].

hunters_reflexes.name: Hunter's Reflexes
hunters_reflexes.desc: You have a slightly larger dodge window.

hunting_trap.name: Hunting Trap
hunting_trap.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that places a bear trap on use. 60 second cooldown. Walking onto a bear trap deals high damage and renders you immobile for a few seconds. The bear trap cannot trigger again once it has been triggered. You can trigger your own bear trap.
hunting_trap.desc: Place down a trap that upon being stepped on will render your opponent unable to move for a bit.

hyperbody.name: Hyperbody
hyperbody.additional_info: Provides 35.5% damage reduction, scaling up with the amount of players buffed. Provides a 7.5 studs/s movement speed bonus, scaling down with the amount of players buffed. Hyperbody has a 30 second duration, but this duration will be reduced by 3s for every player buffed (including yourself). 2 minute cooldown.
hyperbody.desc: Apply a buff to your allies around you that increases your speed, defense, and regeneration. This effect becomes weaker the more allies you buff with it.

hypovolemic_focus.name: Hypovolemic Focus
hypovolemic_focus.additional_info: The opponent regains 20% less posture damage from parrying you.
hypovolemic_focus.desc: While you have temporary health, your opponent regains far less posture from parrying you.

ichor_imbuement.name: Ichor Imbuement
ichor_imbuement.additional_info: Buffs any Starkindred Mantra if your wings are not out on cast.
ichor_imbuement.desc: Using a Starkindred mantra while your wings are not out increases the damage they deal by 2 times.

ignition_rite.name: Ignition Rite
ignition_rite.desc: Landing fire attacks with the phoenix summoned regenerates Heartfire.

im_blue.name: I'm Blue
im_blue.additional_info: Increases the effectiveness of Blue Gems by 40% additively.
im_blue.desc: Improve the efficiency of your Blue Gems. Blue are the gems you use.

immolation.name: Immolation
immolation.additional_info: "Self-Inflicted flames" include Flame Within, Agitating Spark you spread and environmental burns created by you. "Apply fire damage" applies the burn status effect instead of adding Flamecharm damage. This applies burn regardless of Flamecharm path. Instead, all instances of Physical damage, and all attacks that have the slash (blood particle) fx on hit will proc Immolation, applying burn.
immolation.desc: Fire spells cost 70% less while on fire. If you hit someone while on fire, apply fire damage. You take 50% less damage from self-inflicted flames.

immortality.name: Immortality
immortality.additional_info: Grants one instance of knock prevention. Having this Talent disables the Viscosity Enchantment.
immortality.desc: The remnants of the helmet's Mind Veil stir into life when you would be made Unconscious soaking all damage for a brief duration. 30s CD. Viscosity is rejected.

impairing_blow.name: Impairing Blow
impairing_blow.desc: [Greataxes] Basic Attacks will slightly slow your enemy for 2 seconds. Running attacks will slow your enemy for 3 seconds. Gain +20% posture damage against enemies with speed boosts.

imperium_kata.name: Imperium Kata
imperium_kata.additional_info: Allows you to use the Imperium Kata fist style.
imperium_kata.desc: Wield an advanced form of the Legion's martial arts

impervious_slumber.name: Impervious Slumber
impervious_slumber.desc: Getting hit while Unconscious no longer resets your time Unconscious.

in_a_hurry.name: In a Hurry
in_a_hurry.additional_info: Reduces grip time by 0.5 seconds (16.67% faster).
in_a_hurry.desc: You grip faster with a movement speed boost.

incendiary_formula.name: Incendiary Formula
incendiary_formula.additional_info: Bombs apply burn on hit. Bombs will deal 20% more damage to burning targets, regardless of where the burn came from.
incendiary_formula.desc: Bombs will set your enemies on fire upon detonation, as well as launch with more force. Bombs will deal 20% increased damage to burning enemies.

inhale.name: Inhale
inhale.additional_info: Inhaling adds (Mantra level multiplied by 2)% damage to the next Galebreathe Mantra cast. Grants a speed boost for 3 seconds. Additionally grants the Maestro's Blade status effect, allowing your basic attacks to proc After Cut.
inhale.desc: Feinting a Wind spell stores its power in your lungs for 5 seconds, empowering the next wind spell cast in that time. All relevant modifications and upgrades from the inhaled wind mantras are applied to the empowered mantra.

inky_pearls.name: Inky Pearls
inky_pearls.additional_info: Turns your Vent black and makes it drain 47.5 Ether on hit. Additionally, your Vent can now proc certain Shadowcast Talents on hit like Sightless Still or Twisted Puppets' Shadowcast burn.
inky_pearls.desc: The ether you eject is coated with inky shadow. Your vent now steals a small amount of ether.

innate_agility.name: Innate Agility
innate_agility.desc: You hinge on your instincts to keep you alive, even in battle. Slightly increase your dodge frames.

instant_nucleation.name: Instant Nucleation
instant_nucleation.desc: Take less damage for a few seconds after you are guardbroken.

intelligence_unbounded.name: Intelligence Unbounded
intelligence_unbounded.additional_info: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Intelligence Attribute. The stat requirements to obtain this Talent will be increased to 77 or 78 if your Aspect has increased Intelligence on spawn, though this limitation will be removed if you have the Multifaceted Echo Unlock. The quest requirement for this Talent will be removed if you've obtained it previously on your account.
intelligence_unbounded.desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Intelligence to its fullest.

intrepid_flame.name: Intrepid Flame
intrepid_flame.desc: Flames wear off twice as fast on you.

intuitive_repairs.name: Intuitive Repairs
intuitive_repairs.additional_info: Iron Skin regenerates your armor and Natural Armor while its active.
intuitive_repairs.desc: Your 'Iron Skin' repairs armor while it's active.

iron_gut.name: Iron Gut
iron_gut.additional_info: Heavily reduces the chance that you vomit upon eating bad food. This does not work on Pufferfish.
iron_gut.desc: You have resistance against being poisoned by foods.

iron_stance.name: Iron Stance
iron_stance.additional_info: Grants immunity to one instance of ragdoll. If this procs, it will go on a 20 second cooldown.
iron_stance.desc: Be able to shrug off being ragdolled every so often.

ironclad_punishment.name: Ironclad Punishment
ironclad_punishment.additional_info: Gain +0.15% posture damage on Ironsing Mantras for every 1% armor durability your opponent has, capping at +15% if your opponent is at maximum armor.
ironclad_punishment.desc: Your Ironsing mantras deal more posture damage to enemies the more armor durability they have.

ironsing_unbounded.name: Ironsing Unbounded
ironsing_unbounded.additional_info: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Ironsing Attribute. This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
ironsing_unbounded.desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Ironsing to its fullest.

ironsinger.name: Ironsinger
ironsinger.additional_info: Ironsing mantras apply stacks of Metal Rods on targets. Pressing [X] will pull affected towards you, with the strength of the pull depending on the amount of Metal Rods present. You cannot apply more than 5 Metal Rods to one target, unless you have one of the Rending Needle Talents.
ironsinger.desc: Grants you the ability to command Metal as an Ironsinger. Press X to Pull on Metal Rods.

jackpot.name: Jackpot
jackpot.desc: Charmed enemies now have a chance to be hit critically, multiplying the damage.

jays_judgement_gavel.name: Jay's Judgement Gavel
jays_judgement_gavel.additional_info: Landing your critical on a frozen or bottom frozen enemy will deal extra damage and heal you.
jays_judgement_gavel.desc: Breaking a frozen enemy free with your Critical saps their lifeforce.

jesters_ruse.name: Jester's Ruse
jesters_ruse.additional_info: Visionshaper's Cheap Trick visual effect plays on proc. This can proc if an attack is blocked, dodged, or parried. When this happens, the visual effect will play, but nothing will happen.
jesters_ruse.desc: Anytime you take damage, there's a 10% chance it gets completely nullified. Anytime you deal damage, there's a 10% chance it also gets completely nullified.

jetstream_pursuit.name: Jetstream Pursuit
jetstream_pursuit.desc: Upon a successful flourish, teleport to the opponent when they stop moving. Receive a significant boost of momentum.

jolting_current.name: Jolting Current
