jolting_current.additional_info: While you and your opponent are in the water, landing any attack that would apply Shock or a Surge Rod will strike other waterborne targets in a 20 stud AoE from the initial target, dealing 50% of the attack's damage and applying Shock or a Surge Rod.
jolting_current.desc: Your lightning attacks in water strike others near them with lightning.

juicy_snack.name: Juicy Snack
juicy_snack.desc: Eliminating enemies returns their amount of blood poison as health to you.

jumper_cables.name: Jumper Cables
jumper_cables.additional_info: Whenever you would get knocked but have a tether active, steal HP from the target to survive the hit. This has a 4 second cooldown.
jumper_cables.desc: Being made Unconscious with an active tether allows you to steal health from a tethered target and not be made Unconscious.

jus_karita.name: Jus Karita
jus_karita.additional_info: Allows you to use the Jus Karita fist style.
jus_karita.desc: Adopt the kick-based fighting style of the Justicars.

just_a_taste.name: Just a Taste
just_a_taste.desc: First Bloodrend mantra you hit in combat has increased blood drain.

justicar_whistle.name: Justicar Whistle
justicar_whistle.additional_info: Upon using the provided Talent tool, a Justicar may respond to your call for aid, teleporting to your server to assist you with events and protect you in combat.

justicars_adaptation.name: Justicar's Adaptation
justicars_adaptation.additional_info:
Having the Justicar's Technique Talent allows you to have the Jus Karita running attack on any weapon, allowing you to proc Jus Karita and Fist exclusive Talents on any weapon via the running attack.

Having the Justicar's Preference Talent allows you to have the Jus Karita critical attack on any weapon, allowing you to proc the Jus Karita Talents on non-Jus Karita weapons.
justicars_adaptation.desc: Jus Karita running attacks and criticals can now proc Jus Karita talents even if you aren't currently using Jus Karita. Your Jus Karita running attacks can now also proc fist talents.

justicars_blessing.name: Justicar's Blessing
justicars_blessing.desc: Allies you mark with Justicar's Mark gain 15% more healing.

justicars_call.name: Justicar's Call
justicars_call.desc: Lend your aid to those in need.
justicars_call.additional_info: Upon using the provided Talent tool, a UI will pop up that shows a list of all Castaways who have used the Justicar Whistle tool. Upon selecting one, you'll teleport into their server, and you'll be tasked with protecting them against Voidwalkers and assisting them in events. Assisting Castaways with this tool is the main progression method of this Origin.

justicars_gift.name: Justicar's Gift
justicars_gift.desc: Your Justicar support mantras now heal your allies for 10 health instead of 5. Increase the duration of your Karita Aid to 15 seconds.

justicars_mark.name: Justicar's Mark
justicars_mark.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that allows you to apply the Justicar's Mark status effect on one of your allies. While this effect is active, the marked target gains 20% damage redirection, as 20% of the damage they would have taken is redirected to you instead. Additionally, you take 20% more damage.
justicars_mark.desc: Mark someone you wish to protect for a minute. While marked, you take 20% of the damage they receive but they take 20% less damage. Marking someone also cause you to take 20% more damage while they are marked.

justicars_preference.name: Justicar's Preference
justicars_preference.additional_info:
The Jus Karita critical will adopt your equipped weapon's scaling stat.

Having the Vanguard Style Talent will override this Talent, allowing you to use the Vanguard Style critical on any weapon instead of the default Jus Karita one.
justicars_preference.desc: Replace your critical with the Jus Karita critical attack.

justicars_prowess.name: Justicar's Prowess
justicars_prowess.additional_info: Gain +30% posture damage on weapon attacks against opponents using Way of Navae, Fang and Coil, Imperium Kata, Untrained Fist, or Legion Kata.
justicars_prowess.desc: Jus Karita gains +30% posture damage against other fist styles.

justicars_renewal.name: Justicar's Renewal
justicars_renewal.additional_info: Landing Jus Karita's critical attack will reset its cooldown. This has a 10 second cooldown. Also procs if Jus Karita's critical is blocked or parried.
justicars_renewal.desc: Hitting an opponent with your Jus Karita critical resets the cooldown. (Cooldown of 10 seconds).

justicars_technique.name: Justicar's Technique
justicars_technique.additional_info: Replaces your weapon's running attack animation with the Jus Karita one, and adds 0.5 range to your running attacks.
justicars_technique.desc: Replace your running light attack with the Jus Karita running light attack. With the Justicar's Training, your legs extend the range of this running attack by an extra 0.5.

karita_combo.name: Karita Combo
karita_combo.desc: Remove the endlag from your next running attack. [5 second CD] Landing a critical attack right after your running attack makes that critical attack have no cooldown and deal more damage. [10 second CD]

keen_recovery.name: Keen Recovery
keen_recovery.additional_info: If you have 55 or more Intelligence, this will recover double the feinted Mantra's Ether cost instead.
keen_recovery.desc: Landing a basic attack after feinting a mantra will restore the feinted mantra's ether cost.

kick_off.name: Kick Off
kick_off.additional_info: Falls are considered to be 10 studs shorter, reducing fall damage. Climb height is increased by 15% with a 3s CD. Slide jumping further increases climb height.
kick_off.desc: You easily brush off shorter falls, taking no damage. Your first wall jump will always send you higher than normal. Gain a speed boost after wall jumping over a wall.

kick_the_beat.name: Kick the Beat
kick_the_beat.desc: Dancer's Beat now works with Critical Attacks.

kickstart.name: Kickstart
kickstart.additional_info: Heals the person for 10% of their maximum health if you successfully resurrect them. Kickstart consumes 5% of your Ether on use, and then another 20% if the Kickstart was successful. Kickstart has a 3 second long animation, in which you cannot act. This can be used on players using Cap Artist. Despite the description stating "allies," this can be used on non-allies and humanoid NPCs.
kickstart.desc: Play the resurrector. Use your lightning to defibrillate your allies on the battlefield.

kindness.name: Kindness
kindness.desc: Whenever you heal another player, heal 5 health yourself. [3 second cooldown]

kjs_courage.name: Kj's Courage
kjs_courage.additional_info: Due to it rounding down, this Talent will only activate if you get at least 10 Knowledge in one instance.
kjs_courage.desc: Gain 10% more Knowledge from all sources, rounded down.

knack.name: Knack
knack.desc: Trees yield more Wood when felled. Your Repair speed is increased.

knifes_journey.name: Knife's Journey
knifes_journey.additional_info: In PvE, your Dagger attacks have a 15% chance to critically hit, dealing 5x damage. This does not proc "on critical attack" effects, and cannot proc on Moppet's critical attack.
knifes_journey.desc: [Dagger] Cancelling an enemy's Mantra windup with your Basic Attacks now deals 15% more damage

knights_rally.name: Knight's Rally
knights_rally.desc: When using a shield, you ready your block more quickly after taking a hit.

know_when_to_run.name: Know When To Run
know_when_to_run.additional_info: Increases the price of using the Magic Coffin by 50% in exchange for adding the entire Depths lootpool to it.
know_when_to_run.desc: Your magic coffin has a higher chance to draw depths loot, but the price is increased.

knuckle_guard.name: Knuckle Guard
knuckle_guard.additional_info: Knuckle Guard's duration will be reduced by 0.1s for every point of Fortitude and Strength below its requirements, having a minimum possible duration of 10.4 seconds with 30 Fortitude and 4 Strength.
knuckle_guard.desc: Hitting Dazed enemies grants you 10% posture resistance for 15s.

laced_traps.name: Laced Traps
laced_traps.additional_info: Landing a Caltrop slows down your opponent and disables their ability to jump for 1.1 seconds. This effect refreshes if the victim gets hit by another Caltrop.
laced_traps.desc: People hit by your 'Caltrops' cannot jump and are slowed for a small duration, while also applying Sluggish to PvE enemies for a few seconds.

lackluster_guard.name: Lackluster Guard
lackluster_guard.desc: You aren't used to having to block, resulting in weaker posture.

laminated_armor.name: Laminated Armor
laminated_armor.additional_info: Reduces damage taken and dealt by a flat 2 (3 in Vow of Iron). This is applied after regular resistances, allowing you to potentially fully nullify damage taken.
laminated_armor.desc: Reduces all incoming damage by 2/3 (applied after damage multipliers).

lancers_impale.name: Lancer's Impale
lancers_impale.desc: [Spears] Hitting an enemy after a perfect dodge makes your next attack deal 30% bleed damage. If that attack would already bleed, it adds +10% chip damage instead.

landshark.name: Landshark
landshark.additional_info: The lifesteal only works in PvE.
landshark.desc: Killing a Megalodaunt will grant lifesteal on your attacks for 30 seconds.

largent.name: Largent
largent.desc: Your diplomatic skills extend into your ability to barter. Gain 300 extra notes per chest when turning in a sack.

last_resort.name: Last Resort
last_resort.desc: Deal +5% more damage when your health is below 25%.

last_second_negotiations.name: Last Second Negotiations
last_second_negotiations.desc: Most enemies will hesitate a moment longer to execute you.

lasting_charisma.name: Lasting Charisma
lasting_charisma.additional_info: This adds 10 seconds to Charismatic Charm's Charm duration, but this will be reduced by 0.16s for every point of Charisma below 55, capping at 15.8 seconds at 30 Charisma.
lasting_charisma.desc: Enemies charmed by your mantras are charmed longer.

lasting_sorrow.name: Lasting Sorrow
lasting_sorrow.desc: Shadows last longer on your opponent.

lasting_trauma.name: Lasting Trauma
lasting_trauma.additional_info: This applies the Fearful status effect for 19 seconds. Wrath gems have a 10 second cooldown, meaning you can potentially disable your opponent's ability to use their critical indefinitely.
lasting_trauma.desc: Anytime you land a Wrath Gem, your opponent becomes fearful, being unable to use their critical for a few seconds after you land it.

leg_shot.name: Leg Shot
leg_shot.desc: [Rifles] Landing your critical slows your enemy for a bit while making PvE enemies Sluggish, and also disables any speed boosts they get for the next 10 seconds.

legendary.name: Legendary
legendary.desc: Parrying and landing hits with your weapon gives you ether back.

legion_kata.name: Legion Kata
legion_kata.additional_info: Allows you to use the Legion Kata fist style.
legion_kata.desc: Gain the ability to use the Legion's martial arts.

lethal_depressant.name: Lethal Depressant
lethal_depressant.desc: Assassinating an opponent decreases the damage they deal by 25% for the next 30 seconds.

lethal_dose.name: Lethal Dose
lethal_dose.additional_info: Doubles the duration of the Hidden Blade poison effect, from 8 seconds to 16.
lethal_dose.desc: The poison from your hidden blade lasts twice as long.

life_leech.name: Life Leech
life_leech.additional_info: The healing gained is based on summon damage dealt. This works on the following summons: monsters from the Parasol's Blight enchantment, The Weaving Web's critical attack, Illusory Servants, Illusory Counter, Lightning Clones, and Flame Sentinel.
life_leech.desc: Your summons now heal you each time they deal damage.

light_weapons_unbounded.name: Light Weapons Unbounded
light_weapons_unbounded.additional_info: Removes the 75 Attribute cap on Light Weapons.
light_weapons_unbounded.desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Light Weapons attribute to its fullest.

lights_out.name: Lights Out
lights_out.desc: Assassinations now give you 30% PEN and blind the target for 5s. Those you carry are now blindfolded.

lightspeed_reflexes.name: Lightspeed Reflexes
lightspeed_reflexes.desc: Feinting gives a very brief auto-parry window.

lightweight.name: Lightweight
lightweight.additional_info: Grants a +25% movement speed buff. This is not a speed boost, meaning it won't proc any speed boost-reliant Talents.
lightweight.desc: Move faster when your armor runs out of durability.

link_conduction.name: Link Conduction
link_conduction.additional_info: Each active Link reduces the Ether cost of your Thundercall Mantras by 30%.
link_conduction.desc: While you have active tethers your lightning mantras cost less ether.

lithe_step.name: Lithe Step
lithe_step.additional_info: Provides a brief speed boost on proc. 3s CD, reduced to 1s if in True Strength.
lithe_step.desc: When Sprinting, roll-cancel and instantly vanish and surge with unmatched speed.

lock_n_load.name: Lock n Load
lock_n_load.desc: [1H Guns] The first bullet in your gun does more damage when fully loaded. This damage buff scales with the number of bullets up to 15%.

lone_wolf.name: Lone Wolf
lone_wolf.desc: Despite the loyalty of your allies, you recognize that you sometimes need to hunt alone. Deal more damage to targets who are only combat tagged by you.

looter.name: Looter
looter.additional_info: This affects: turning in Artifacts or the Strange Egg at a banker, turning in Sacks to Mercille, handing in pure ore to a Blacksmith, and trading in Explosive Crates to Scope.
looter.desc: Get extra loot from items you turn in for rewards.

lords_tithe.name: Lord's Tithe
lords_tithe.additional_info: Steals Ether (or health in PvE) in pulses.
lords_tithe.desc: Everyone you Reinforce is drained of their Ether while Reinforced. Drain scales with your Shadowcast. Drain health from PvE opponents as well.

lose_your_mind.name: Lose Your Mind
lose_your_mind.additional_info: Starting at 70% Sanity, gain a damage buff that scales non-linearly on your current Sanity percentage.
lose_your_mind.desc: Deal more damage the more insane you are. Grants +15% damage at maximum insanity.

lowstride.name: Lowstride
lowstride.desc: When crouching, your stealth and roll distance are increased. The speed penalty you receive from crouching is much smaller. You now draw and sheathe your weapon silently.

loyalty.name: Loyalty
loyalty.additional_info: Allies take 35% less damage from you and deal 35% less damage to you. This stacks multiplicatively with Give and Take.
loyalty.desc: Your bond with your allies is strong enough to reduce damage between you.

luminous_flash.name: Luminous Flash
luminous_flash.additional_info: During Absolute Radiance, your M1 attacks have a chance to proc Luminous Flash, applying the damage modifier hardcap as a damage buff.
luminous_flash.desc: After dealing a certain amount of damage in Absolute Radiance, gain a chance to empower your strikes with pure light.

magic_coffin.name: Magic Coffin
magic_coffin.additional_info: Activating your Coffin takes 50 Notes. This Note cost will increase by 50 per Power, costing 1,000 Notes at Power 20. When used, the Coffin acts like a loot box, randomly rolling an item to give you. There is a 1% chance to grant the Skull, giving you high tier loot. This chance is increased by 1% per level, up to 20% at power 20. There is a 5-10% chance to roll a blank, doubling the chest of the next box. This can stack. Coffin activation uses your Resonance keybind. You can use any weapon or equipment item without meeting their attribute requirements.
magic_coffin.desc: A jack of all trades, all attribute requirements are ignored. Activate your Coffin with C.

magical_resolve.name: Magical Resolve
magical_resolve.desc: Being hit increases Ether regen for a short duration, the strength of the regen scales off your Willpower.

maiming_claws.name: Maiming Claws
maiming_claws.additional_info: While their posture is paused, your opponent cannot restore posture by parrying, spitting, passive posture restoration, or through Steady Nerves. All other forms of posture restoration ignore this effect entirely. Maiming Claws' duration will be shortened if you do not meet its requirements. Maiming Claws cannot be refreshed if Down Comes the Claw is currently active.
maiming_claws.desc: Down Comes the Claw now disables your opponent's posture regeneration for 6s on proc.

malevolent_sapper.name: Malevolent Sapper
malevolent_sapper.desc: The more blood poisoning your opponent has, the more ether your shadow mantras steal from your opponent.

manipulator.name: Manipulator
manipulator.additional_info: 10 second cooldown. This is inherently weaker on multihit criticals due to it only proccing once then going on cooldown. Unnecessary Theatrics or Overcharm can be used to reapply the Charm after Manipulator removes it on the same hit.
manipulator.desc: Deal 20% more critical attack damage to charmed enemies, but the effect is removed on impact.

mantra_permanence.name: Mantra Permanence
mantra_permanence.desc: Knocking an enemy with a mantra refunds the cost of the mantra.

mark_mastery.name: Mark Mastery
mark_mastery.additional_info: Reduces the additional damage you take from marking an ally from 20% to 5%.
mark_mastery.desc: Reduce the amount of extra damage you receive while your ally is marked with the Justicar's Mark from 20% to 5%.

mark_of_jurik.name: Mark of Jurik
mark_of_jurik.additional_info: Gain a tool that lowers the sanity drain of nearby players. Also buffs affected players' HP regen and slightly buffs their food & thirst replenishment from consuming food and their blood regen. 4m CD. These buffs last 1 minute, the HP regen is 15% of their total HP over that one minute period, healing 0.25% HP per second. Also buffs non allies. Does not require you to be resting at a campfire.
mark_of_jurik.desc: Mark of Jurik, the Moonseye. A beacon of calm, those in your presence are resistant to insanity.

mark_of_ku.name: Mark of Ku
mark_of_ku.additional_info: Gain a tool that buffs the blood regen of nearby players. Also buffs the affected players' HP regen and slightly buffs their sanity and their food & thirst replenishment from consuming food. 3m 30s CD. These buffs last 1 minute, the HP regen is 15% of their total HP over that one minute period, healing 0.25% HP per second. Also buffs non allies. Can only be used while you are resting on a campfire.
mark_of_ku.desc: Mark of Ku, the Mother. Improves the rest of those in your presence.

mark_of_nemit.name: Mark of Nemit
mark_of_nemit.additional_info: Gain a tool that buffs the food and thirst replenishment of nearby players. Also buffs the affected players' HP regen and slightly buffs their blood regen and sanity. 3m 30s CD. These buffs last 1 minute, the HP regen is 15% of their total HP over that one minute period, healing 0.25% HP per second. Also buffs non allies. Can only be used while you are resting on a campfire.
mark_of_nemit.desc: Mark of Nemit, the First Beast. Food consumed in your presence is more nourishing.

mark_of_the_lone_warrior.name: Mark of the Lone Warrior
mark_of_the_lone_warrior.additional_info: Gain an experience gain multiplier if nobody else has combat tagged the enemy. Gain a 5% damage buff against enemies who have combat tagged you, or enemies you've combat tagged if the opponent has less than or an equal amount of combat tags as you.
mark_of_the_lone_warrior.desc: Progress much faster when progressing alone. Gain a damage boost when facing threats alone and also when outnumbered.

marked_descent.name: Marked Descent
marked_descent.additional_info: Targets the enemy who hit your marked ally, not the marked ally themselves.
marked_descent.desc: When your Justicar's Mark target takes damage, they are revealed. Using your Karita Divebomb will target them.

martial_brutality.name: Martial Brutality
martial_brutality.additional_info: Increases your posture damage by 0.1% per 1% health missing, up to a maximum of +10% posture damage against someone at 0% health.
martial_brutality.desc: The less health your opponent has, the more posture you deal to them.

martyr.name: Martyr
martyr.additional_info: Martyrdom grants a +20% damage and damage reduction buff to your allies. Enemies who knock you restore only half of the posture and health they would normally obtain (50% -> 25%).
martyr.desc: When you're knocked Unconscious, enemies gain less health and posture, and allies around you are granted Martyrdom for 20s

mass_effect.name: Mass Effect
mass_effect.additional_info: Increases the posture damage bonus of Might Gems by 2.25% additively, for every Might Gem you have equipped on your Mantras.
mass_effect.desc: For every Might Gem you have equipped on your mantras, slightly increase each Might Gem's power.

master_bloodrender.name: Master Bloodrender
master_bloodrender.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
master_bloodrender.desc: You can now obtain 3-star Bloodrender mantras. Your maximum blood capacity is 25% more than a normal individual. You regen blood at a quicker pace.

master_chef.name: Master Chef
master_chef.additional_info: Increases the duration of food buffs by 30%. Increases the healing gained from using Fondant Splitter's critical.
master_chef.desc: Buffs applied by food you cook now have their buff effects amplified by +30%.

master_craftsman.name: Master Craftsman
master_craftsman.additional_info: You can craft items that normally require a Crafting Station from your inventory.
master_craftsman.desc: Your skills alone substitute the need for a Craft Station.

master_flamecharmer.name: Master Flamecharmer
master_flamecharmer.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
master_flamecharmer.desc: You can now obtain 3-Star Leveled Flamecharmer Mantras.

master_frostdrawer.name: Master Frostdrawer
master_frostdrawer.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
master_frostdrawer.desc: You can now obtain 3-Star Leveled Frostdraw Mantras.

master_galebreather.name: Master Galebreather
master_galebreather.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
master_galebreather.desc: You can now obtain 3-Star Leveled Galebreathe mantras.

master_ironsinger.name: Master Ironsinger
master_ironsinger.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
master_ironsinger.desc: You can now obtain 3-star Ironsinger mantras.

master_shadowcaster.name: Master Shadowcaster
master_shadowcaster.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
master_shadowcaster.desc: You can now obtain 3-star Leveled Shadowcaster Mantras.

master_thief.name: Master Thief
master_thief.desc: Gain more notes when mugging a player.

master_thundercaller.name: Master Thundercaller
master_thundercaller.additional_info: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
master_thundercaller.desc: You can now obtain 3-star Thundercaller mantras.

masterwork.name: Masterwork
masterwork.desc: Successful hits from Artisan's Blades will proc metal rods and deal 50% more damage.

matador.name: Matador
matador.desc: Deal +20% more damage to human enemies with hyperarmor.

maudet.name: Maudet
maudet.additional_info: Gain 3 free investment points to invest every time you level up. This stacks with Autodidact. Your starting reputation with all factions is higher.
maudet.desc: Your understanding of your destiny is such that learning new things often comes naturally to you. People appreciate your diplomatic ways of speaking.

max_ammo.name: Max Ammo
max_ammo.desc: Landing the cannonball of your critical attack removes your critical attack's cooldown.

mayhem.name: Mayhem
mayhem.additional_info: 16s CD per weapon type, 6s CD if feinted. Movesets and damage differ depending on weapon type. Gains the ability to autogrip if it is enhanced by Flow State.
mayhem.desc: Initiate a special dash attack by pressing M1 during the start of your dodge.

medium_weapons_unbounded.name: Medium Weapons Unbounded
medium_weapons_unbounded.additional_info: Removes the 75 Attribute cap on Medium Weapons.
medium_weapons_unbounded.desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Medium Weapons attribute to its fullest.

merc_blade.name: Merc Blade
merc_blade.desc: For every 10% stealth you have, deal 1 extra damage on all sources of damage.

mercenary_blade.name: Mercenary Blade
mercenary_blade.desc: For every 10% stealth you have, deal 1 extra damage on all sources of damage.

merchants_accord.name: Merchant's Accord
merchants_accord.additional_info: This Talent does NOT allow you to use the Antiquarian in the First Layer if you are not Deepbound or Ignition Delver.
merchants_accord.desc: Merchants and Antiquarians will do business with you no matter how poor your reputation is.

merciless_blade.name: Merciless Blade
merciless_blade.additional_info: Increases your execution speed by 25%, down to 2.25 seconds from 3 seconds.
merciless_blade.desc: You can now execute enemies much faster.

metal_absorption.name: Metal Absorption
metal_absorption.additional_info: Iron Hug will steal 10% of your opponent's current armor durability and siphon it back to yourself.
metal_absorption.desc: Your 'Iron Hug' also absorbs armor from the enemy.

metal_eater.name: Metal Eater
metal_eater.additional_info: Consumes 30% of your maximum armor on proc, regardless of the Ether cost of the Mantra.
metal_eater.desc: When you have no ether, consume Armor durability to cast your Ironsing mantras.

metal_shackles.name: Metal Shackles
metal_shackles.desc: Guardbreaking an opponent prevents them from receiving speed boost for 5 seconds, while PvE opponents will be Sluggish for 12 seconds.

metal_thief.name: Metal Thief
metal_thief.additional_info: Steals 2% of your opponent's current armor durability per rod.
metal_thief.desc: Pulling an opponent absorbs a portion of their current Armor durability.

meteor_impact.name: Meteor Impact
meteor_impact.additional_info: Deals 10 flat Flamecharm damage on top of your weapon's scaled damage. Procs by light attacking after using certain Mantras that end with both the user and the victim suspended in the air.
meteor_impact.desc: Aerial moves you land will follow up into a devastating slam. This is also possible when you yourself gets hit by an aerial move.

million_ton_piercer.name: Million Ton Piercer
million_ton_piercer.additional_info: Removes both the melee and Mantra PEN cap.
million_ton_piercer.desc: Gain 5% extra PEN and remove the cap on your PEN. Go beyond your limits.

mindspark.name: Mindspark
mindspark.additional_info: Your burn damage is increased based on how low your Sanity is.
mindspark.desc: The damage of your flames scale with how insane you are.

mirage_clone.name: Mirage Clone
mirage_clone.additional_info: 20 second cooldown. Causes an Eruption instead if you have Eruption path.
mirage_clone.desc: Successfully dodging leaves behind a heat mirage clone that sets enemies that swung at you on fire.

mist_mobility.name: Mist Mobility
mist_mobility.additional_info: Despite what the description states, this actually procs when you activate Flashboil, and not Boiling Point.
mist_mobility.desc: Anytime you proc Boiling Point, increase the speed at which you reload your Vapormaw Carbine and increase your Critical Attack's fire rate.

mocking_favor.name: Mocking Favor
mocking_favor.additional_info: Grants a random buff or affliction from a set list whenever you spit or use an emote.
mocking_favor.desc: When taunting, Aelita or Tillian appears, bestowing upon you a random boon of affliction. (30s cooldown)

molt.name: Molt
molt.additional_info: The duration of Chill, Suffocation, and all potion effects is reduced.
molt.desc: Ailments and blessings alike fade away more quickly.

momentum.name: Momentum
momentum.desc: Speed boosts now give you a bit of extra chip based on how fast the speed boosts are making you.

monster_slayer.name: Monster Slayer
monster_slayer.desc: Deal 25% more damage to giant enemies.

moths_to_a_flame.name: Moths to a Flame
moths_to_a_flame.additional_info: Puppets will now home in on targets who are burning with either of Twisted Puppets' burn types. When a Puppet gets close to a burning target it speeds up.
moths_to_a_flame.desc: You summon a puppet of black flames that homes onto enemies with black flames.

mothwing_defense.name: Mothwing Defense
mothwing_defense.desc: Further refining how sharp your antennae, you can now immediately recognize a sneak attack and brace yourself for it. Reduce all backhit damage by 50%.

mothwing_dust.name: Mothwing Dust
mothwing_dust.additional_info: Upon being hit at the start of combat, cover your opponent in Mothwing Dust, applying a red highlight on your opponent for 10 seconds. This highlight can be seen through walls.
mothwing_dust.desc: You release Mothwing Dust when others are the first to strike, granting you vision of your attacker. Your antennae improve your peripheral senses, narrowing the angle at which you can be backstabbed.

moving_fortress.name: Moving Fortress
moving_fortress.additional_info: Increases your movement speed while blocking by 5%, from -25% movement speed to -20%.
moving_fortress.desc: Blocking no longer slows you down as much.

mudskipper_gripper.name: Mudskipper Gripper
mudskipper_gripper.desc: When executing an opponent with your critical attack, summon mudskippers to aid you in battle.

muffled_screams.name: Muffled Screams
muffled_screams.additional_info: NPCs have a shortened aggro range from gripping allies in proximity. Defiant Until The End and Last Second Negotiations affect your grip speed less.
muffled_screams.desc: You quieten the cries of help of those you execute, reducing the distance at which their allies will hear it and come to assist, and reducing the effectiveness of Talents that slow your executions.

murmur_ardour.name: Murmur: Ardour
murmur_ardour.additional_info: Drains Ether while active, with the Ether drain scaling inversely with your level and being entirely negated at Power 20. Ardour automatically deactivates if you run out of Ether. Increases the posture damage of M1s and critical attacks with the M1 tag by 20%. Reduces incoming posture damage by 15%. Additionally applies a +15% damage buff to M1s and critical with the M1 tag that guard break.
murmur_ardour.desc: An application of your Soul Murmur that enables one to channel the murmur into raw strength. Press H.

murmur_rhythm.name: Murmur: Rhythm
murmur_rhythm.additional_info: Pings all nearby Monsters, NPCÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â€žÂ¢s, and Players, through walls while gray-scaling your screen. Red = Low Health, Yellow = Moderate Health, Grey = Healthy.
murmur_rhythm.desc: An application of your Soul Murmur that enables the user to perceive the subtle murmur emanating from all things. Press G while crouched.

murmur_tacet.name: Murmur: Tacet
murmur_tacet.additional_info: On use, a sphere around your character will be created. To everyone outside of the sphere, you are invisible. The size of the Tacet sphere scales inversely on your level and your stealth stat, becoming smaller the higher your level and the more stealth you have. In PvE you become effectively invisible to enemies at almost any range. Tacet will deactivate if you: stop crouching for 3 seconds, sprint for 1.5 seconds, use any attack, get hit, or use Soulbreaker's Formless ability. Tacet will be disabled during Hell Mode, Diluvian, and Depths Trials.
murmur_tacet.desc: An application of your Soul Murmur that enables the user to suppress their own murmur. Press T while crouched.

mythic_stability.name: Mythic Stability
mythic_stability.desc: Players and regular mobs cannot instantly execute you while you're on your feet. Protects you from one instance of instant execution when Unconscious.

nanjis_training.name: Nanji's Training
nanjis_training.desc: Nanji shows you a better way to properly block attacks using a weapon, granting you 1 Posture.

narcissist.name: Narcissist
narcissist.additional_info: Overcharms yourself for 4 seconds. Charms yourself for 8 seconds, halved to 4 seconds if you have Disbelief.
narcissist.desc: Charming an already Charmed opponent Overcharms you briefly. Guess you really were always that great.

natural_healing.name: Natural Healing
natural_healing.additional_info: "Plants" refers to any plant-based food item.
natural_healing.desc: Every time you eat plants, heal 2% of your health.

navaes_conviction.name: Navae's Conviction
navaes_conviction.desc: All Navaen related combat weapons are empowered.

navaes_guidance.name: Navae's Guidance
navaes_guidance.additional_info: Receive a compass, displayed at the top of your screen, which points East. Right clicking on the map will place a waypoint or change the location of a pre-existing one. Waymarkers can be seen both in the physical world and on the map. The passive hunger loss is reduced.
navaes_guidance.desc: Navae's star guides your path, showing you the way forward. Right-clicking on maps sets a Waymarker which can be followed. You are less prone to starvation.

navaes_technique.name: Navae's Technique
navaes_technique.desc: A passed down technique from generations ago to refine your Ether control. Reduce how much ether it takes to cast mantras by 30%.

neural_overload.name: Neural Overload
neural_overload.desc: You can input up to 4 copies of each Mantra ingredient instead of being limited to 3.

neuroplasticity.name: Neuroplasticity
neuroplasticity.reqs: neuroplasticity := 35r INT OR 35r WLL OR 35r CHA
neuroplasticity.additional_info: The reduced cost on Mantra modifiers does not apply retroactively to previously modified Mantras until you rejoin.
neuroplasticity.desc: Your mind is a pliable, flexible substance. The Ether cost of additional modifications to your Mantras is now reduced by 10%.

night_night.name: Night Night
night_night.desc: Uppercut attacks blind opponents for 15 seconds.

night_terror.name: Night Terror
night_terror.reqs: night_terror := 100r LHT OR 100r MED OR 100r HVY, 100s SDW
night_terror.additional_info: Also procs on weapon criticals. Despite its description, this Talent immediately applies the Fear status for 1 second with no cooldown (they are not required to run away from you).
night_terror.desc: Your light attacks now proc Fear the Dark.

nightchild.name: Nightchild
nightchild.additional_info: Multiplies all stealth gained by 1.2x. Gain +20% Stealth on spawn.
nightchild.desc: Relying on your instincts, you are naturally more stealthy. You are more nimble on wooden surfaces.

no_interruptions.name: No Interruptions
no_interruptions.additional_info: Grants extremely high damage reduction and true hyperarmor against attacks that are coming from opponents from far away. This requires you to be combat tagged by at least two people. Self-combat tags do not count, but NPC combat tags do (you will still need to be combat tagged by at least one player for this to activate).
no_interruptions.desc: When combat tagged by 2 or more players, render any ranged attack a lot less effective.

no_limits.name: No Limits
no_limits.additional_info: Increases the cap for Bloodless Gem healing to 30. You will need a scaled damage value of 100 to hit the 30 healing cap.
no_limits.desc: Increase the cap on Bloodless Gem healing.

no_survivors.name: No Survivors
no_survivors.additional_info: Reduces grip time by 0.5 seconds (16.67% faster).
no_survivors.desc: Your allies and yourself execute faster when affected by Overcharm.

none_left_behind.name: None Left Behind
none_left_behind.desc: You can now shadestep to pick up Unconscious humanoids far away from you.

not_a_scratch.name: Not a Scratch
not_a_scratch.additional_info: Your clothing no longer gets blood splotches and you no longer play low health animations at low health. Your outfit no longer tears when your armor durability is low. Rhythm users can no longer see your health. If you have less than 100 Willpower, your character has a chance to scream in agony upon taking damage.
not_a_scratch.desc: You don't show any signs of damage

null_recovery.name: Null Recovery
null_recovery.desc: Sacrifice 20% of your hunger bar to recover 10% of your health back.

nullifying_clarity.name: Nullifying Clarity
nullifying_clarity.additional_info: Procs on Burn, Chill, Shock, Fear, Winded, and Suffocation. Only works on M1s.
nullifying_clarity.desc: Deal 10% more damage to enemies with elemental status effects, but remove the status on hit.

oath_arcwarder.name: Oath: Arcwarder
oath_arcwarder.desc: You vow to be a shield for your comrades, to wear your regalia with pride and serve the greater collective. From each according to their ability, to each according to their needs.

oath_bladeharper.name: Oath: Bladeharper
oath_bladeharper.reqs: oath_bladeharper := LHT + MED + HVY = 90r OR 75r MED, 25r AGL OR 25r STR
oath_bladeharper.desc: You vow to carry your blades as an instrument, to lend yourself to any cause it guides you to. Collapse the infinite number of possibilities ahead of you into just one. The blade keeps you as much as you keep it.

oath_blightsurger.name: Oath: Blightsurger
oath_blightsurger.reqs: oath_blightsurger := STR + FTD + AGL = 80r, 40r WND OR 40r LTN
oath_blightsurger.desc: Fists and storm. Wield sacred lightning, tear through foes and leave them withered.

oath_blindseer.name: Oath: Blindseer
oath_blindseer.additional_info: You can now see while blinded, but the world gains a blue hue.
oath_blindseer.desc: You vow to not let the horrors of the world pierce your tightly fastened blindfold. Everything is simply as we choose to perceive it.

oath_chainwarden.name: Oath: Chainwarden
oath_chainwarden.desc: You vow to be the chain that binds the wicked and drags them back where they belong. There are those in this world who should not be free.

oath_contractor.name: Oath: Contractor
oath_contractor.desc: Your heart is forever now eternally tied to Zi'eer, the 4th Prophet of the Ministry. You swear to serve under his will, no matter the cost.

oath_dawnwalker.name: Oath: Dawnwalker
oath_dawnwalker.desc: You vow to forever reach towards the brilliant Light. There is no shadow that your radiance cannot expunge.

oath_fadetrimmer.name: Oath: Fadetrimmer
oath_fadetrimmer.desc: You vow to forever hone your precision with the scissors. There will never be another fringe incident again.

oath_jetstriker.name: Oath: Jetstriker
oath_jetstriker.additional_info: Gain Momentum by sprinting. At maximum Momentum, your Jetstriker Mantras deal 20% more damage.
oath_jetstriker.desc: You vow to flow with the Song itself, drifting across where the trails may take you. If the Song permeates everything, then let it be your conduit, and you its master.

oath_linkstrider.name: Oath: Linkstrider
oath_linkstrider.desc: You vow to give up your own life for the sake of others. Stepping out of the fray, you become a foundation of your allies' strength.

oath_oathless.name: Oath: Oathless
oath_oathless.additional_info: Notably, the Oath Armor given by this Talent is affected by PEN and will be nullified if you run out of armor durability. Additionally, due to how resistances work, Oath attacks that have dual damage typings will ignore your Oath armor.
oath_oathless.desc: You vow to never be bound to any Oath; to live your life free of restraint. If free will is an illusion, why not make it a convincing one?

oath_saintsworn.name: Oath: Saintsworn
oath_saintsworn.reqs: oath_saintsworn := 15s FLM, 15s ICE, 15s WND, 15s LTN, 15s SDW
oath_saintsworn.additional_info: While the Saintsblade is equipped, your Saintsworn Talents will be activated and you can utilize the Blade of Saints Mantra. By using the Saintsblade's critical attack, you can cycle between the Saint Stances. Each Saint Stance is attributed to one of the Attunements, potentially changing the effects of your Saintsworn Talents and altering your Blade of Saints Mantra.
oath_saintsworn.desc: A vow to the fallen heroes. Press L to swap to Saintsblade.

oath_saltchemist.name: Oath: Saltchemist
oath_saltchemist.desc: You vow to dedicate body and mind to the furthering of the Material Arts. Your body is a conduit through which true knowledge shall be siphoned. Knowledge is power, and you shall be its vessel.

oath_silentheart.name: Oath: Silentheart
oath_silentheart.reqs: oath_silentheart := 25s STR, LHT + MED + HVY = 75r, 25r AGL OR 25r CHA
oath_silentheart.additional_info: If you have any Mantras, they will be unusable and will be entirely invisible. The weapon requirement reduction effect only reduces weapon stat requirements, and not attribute requirements. Additionally, it stacks with Khan's Versatile. Silentheart abilities can proc the Enchantment of your equipped weapon with a 30 second cooldown.
oath_silentheart.desc: You vow to reject the Words of the Song, denying yourself of mantras in pursuit of your own path to true strength, no matter the cost. You can wield weapons with 25 points below their usual requirements.

oath_soulbreaker.name: Oath: Soulbreaker
oath_soulbreaker.additional_info: Your Ardour gains a new visual effect.
oath_soulbreaker.desc: The sum of your fragments is greater than the whole. Though your very being is splintered and threatening to drift apart, every shard of you Vows to remain One. Your Oath is a solvent that joins all of your distinct selves into the gestalt you.

oath_starkindred.name: Oath: Starkindred
oath_starkindred.desc: You vow to feel the knowledge of all that is, all at once. Your heart beats with the world itself, as the Stars above watch over you.

oath_visionshaper.name: Oath: Visionshaper
oath_visionshaper.desc: You vow to only see that which you wish to see. Reality itself is malleable, pliable to your deft hands.

observation.name: Observation
observation.additional_info: Cancelling your roll quickly will grant dodge frames equals to the length of a regular roll. Basically giving extra 0.1s dodge frames.
observation.desc: Dodge frames are larger if you cancel your roll immediately.

off_your_game.name: Off Your Game
off_your_game.desc: You now slow Taunted enemies when you hit them.

offensive_recovery.name: Offensive Recovery
offensive_recovery.additional_info: If all of your equipped Mantras have a Might Gem equipped, hitting your opponent's block with Mantras will restore your posture.
offensive_recovery.desc: If all your mantras have Might Gems equipped, lose posture any time you hit opponents block with a mantra.

officers_slash.name: Officer's Slash
officers_slash.desc: You now gain an additional critical attack with Authority armory weaponry while your regular critical attack is on cooldown.

officers_training.name: Officer's Training
officers_training.desc: While using a Sword or Rapier, take 30% less posture damage from criticals.

oh_the_irony.name: Oh The Irony
oh_the_irony.desc: Opponents affected by 'Taunt' receive double iron rods for the duration.

old_habits_die_hard.name: Old Habits Die Hard
old_habits_die_hard.desc: Blocking an attack with your lingering block frames after failing a parry will cause the attack to deal 15% less posture damage.

omen.name: Omen
omen.desc: Your Shadow Travel now has no windup and always requires health to teleport.

one_with_flame.name: One With Flame
one_with_flame.desc: When equipping a Worshipper Longsword and Worshipper Shield, you take 25% less damage while on fire and every mantra you use sets enemies on fire.
one_with_flame.additional_info: These effects only apply while you are burning. Also turns your Medium Weapon Mantras orange and adds Flamecharm scaling to your Belief while active.

open_wound.name: Open Wound
open_wound.desc: Guardbreaking enemies leaves enemies more susceptible to blood loss from Bloodrend mantras.

oppressive_force.name: Oppressive Force
oppressive_force.additional_info: The first hit deals your regular M1 damage and posture damage, the second hit deals 80% of your weapon's scaled damage with 7 posture damage. The damage and posture damage of the second hit cannot be buffed. The second hit does not count as a weapon attack, and therefore it does not benefit from any of your weapon's stats and cannot proc Talent effects.
oppressive_force.desc: When using a weapon found in the Merit Armory, gain a unique two-hit flourish that does not knock back opponents and dazes them.

orb_discharge.name: Orb Discharge
orb_discharge.desc: If an extra orb is available, you can consume it to vent if you don't have enough tempo.

orbital_ice.name: Orbital Ice
orbital_ice.additional_info: 90 second cooldown. Durability of Orbital Ice is equal to "Frostdraw investment +10".
orbital_ice.desc: When landing a parry while standing on ice, automatically forms a gravitational ring of ice that absorbs 15% of the physical damage you take. The ring breaks after sustaining a certain amount of damage. (Scales with Frostdraw)

osseous_surge.name: Osseous Surge
osseous_surge.additional_info: Press right click within a 10 second window after landing a flourish to stomp and send a wave of bones in the direction you're facing. This deals high damage and sends your opponent upwards.
osseous_surge.desc: Flourishing an enemy enhances your boots for 10 seconds, allowing you to spawn a wave of bones in the way you're facing. Right click to activate this.

overcharge.name: Overcharge
overcharge.additional_info: Lightning Dashes increase your dash distance travelled by 2.3x and the duration of i-frames from rolling, but will end early if you attack.
overcharge.desc: Your next dash after activating Static Blade is enhanced by lightning.

overdrive.name: Overdrive
overdrive.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that doubles the damage of your Mantras for 10 seconds. 3 minute cooldown.
overdrive.desc: Go beyond your limits. All mantras you cast deal twice as much damage for 10 seconds.

overflow.name: Overflow
overflow.desc: Double the amount of tempo you receive when landing light attacks.

overflowing_dam.name: Overflowing Dam
overflowing_dam.additional_info: For every point of Intelligence below 40, Overflowing Dam's damage bonus will be reduced by 0.125%, having a minimum damage buff of 6.875% at 15 Intelligence.
overflowing_dam.desc: Having full Ether for 2 seconds or more grants an aura to your attacks that grant them 10% more damage.

overwhelming_drain.name: Overwhelming Drain
overwhelming_drain.desc: If multiple enemies are hit by your Shadow Eruption, they are dazed.

overwhelming_might.name: Overwhelming Might
overwhelming_might.desc: Strong Left now guard breaks at level 5.

pace.name: Pace
pace.additional_info: Grants damage reduction based on the combined potency on all speed boosts you have. Landing attacks grants a speed boost.
pace.desc: Hitting opponents apply a speed boost. The faster you are the less damage you take.

pack_mule.name: Pack Mule
pack_mule.additional_info: Stacks with the Boon of the same name, increasing the maximum amount of food items you can carry in one stack from 10 to 20.
pack_mule.desc: The max quantity for food you can hold is increased by 5.

padded_armor.name: Padded Armor
padded_armor.additional_info: The 3% Blunt Armor is multiplicative with other sources of Blunt resistance.
padded_armor.desc: While your armor is broken (or if you have no armor), you take 5% less damage.

paired_soul.name: Paired Soul
paired_soul.additional_info: Katana deals 25% more damage. Alloyed Katana, Shattered Katana, and Purple Cloud deal 5% more damage. This is a damage modifier.
paired_soul.desc: Wielding a katana with this outfit grants extra damage.

panacea.name: Panacea
panacea.desc: Hitting an enemy with a Bloodrend mantra stops their blood poison from decaying for 7 seconds.

pardon_me.name: Pardon Me
pardon_me.additional_info: Guards will not aggro onto you if you perform a crime in their territory if you have neutral or higher reputation with the faction.
pardon_me.desc: Crimes you commit in allied territories are often ignored. Who's asking?

parting_gift.name: Parting Gift
parting_gift.additional_info: On proc, all dual gun M1s within the next 5 seconds have projectiles.
parting_gift.desc: After you land a flourish, gain the ability to shoot bullets for 5 seconds. [Dual Gun]

perfect_flash.name: Perfect Flash
perfect_flash.desc: Having over 95% health causes your mantras to do +25% damage. This damage bonus will scale down to 10% if your enemies are far away.

peripheral_vision.name: Peripheral Vision
peripheral_vision.desc: Your glare now ignores if your opponent is facing you.

perpetual_distillery.name: Perpetual Distillery
perpetual_distillery.additional_info: Upon using the Distillery's Talent tool, you're given three empty spaces where you input your potions. You're able to switch the mode from "Throw" to "Drink", and vice versa. Each potion in the Distillery will be given as a Talent tool, using the potion on use. Potions in the Distillery go on cooldown when used. Drink potions place other drink slots on a cooldown if they share buffs.
perpetual_distillery.desc: Your very body has become a distillery for your alchemy. Gain 3 Autobrew slots that will automatically produce 3 concoctions of your choice.

perpetual_wrath.name: Perpetual Wrath
perpetual_wrath.additional_info: Enchaining targets and hitting Chained targets with Restrain will add 1 stack of Perpetual Wrath. Each stack of Perpetual Wrath increases Restrain's (Mantra) damage by 8, capping out at 4 stacks for +32 damage.
perpetual_wrath.desc: Unleash the true power of Restrain. Each successive hit will increase its damage. stacking up to the base damage.

perseverance.name: Perseverance
perseverance.additional_info: This can stack with other Talents to reduce knock time even further. (Ex. Defiance)
perseverance.desc: Reduces the duration you're Ragdolled and Unconscious for by 25%.

phantom.name: Phantom
phantom.additional_info: Your weapon attacks that bypass block apply shaky block.
phantom.desc: For the next 5 seconds, your next basic attack bypasses block after landing a crit. [45 second CD]

phantom_edge.name: Phantom Edge
phantom_edge.desc: Your weapon Basic Attacks have +0.25 range.

phantom_step.name: Phantom Step
phantom_step.additional_info: Additionally grants a speed boost for the full duration. While active, your Spectral Gauge will be passively drained.
phantom_step.desc: Press X to begin running at high speeds and your regular dashes transform into gale dashes. (Must have at least 10% Spectral Gauge)

phoenix_flames.name: Phoenix Flames
phoenix_flames.additional_info: Healing scales on your Flamecharm investment; heals 25% health at 0 Flamecharm and scales up to 50% health at 75 Flamecharm, gaining 0.33% healing per point in Flamecharm. If you used Flame Within while knocked to proc Phoenix Flames, then the healing received will be halved.
phoenix_flames.desc: Any time you would burn to death, you instead rise again with 50% of your health restored. Has a 60 second cooldown.

phoenix_impact.name: Phoenix Impact
phoenix_impact.additional_info: Heals 4% max HP and restores 20 ether.
phoenix_impact.desc: If you Meteor Slam an opponent whilst on fire, restore some HP and Ether.

pickpocket.name: Pickpocket
pickpocket.additional_info: You can only pickpocket Unconscious targets. Gain +0.0002% PvE damage for every 1 Note you have; grants +3% damage at 15,000 Notes.
pickpocket.desc: Gain the ability to pickpocket by pressing N. Deal a little more damage the more notes you have against PvE opponents as well.

pierce_through.name: Pierce Through
pierce_through.additional_info: The default spear critical attack no longer cancels if the first hit is parried. Additionally, parrying the first hit of this critical does not provide autoparry frames.
pierce_through.desc: Remove the autoparry frames the first hit of your base spear critical has.

piercing_blow.name: Piercing Blow
piercing_blow.additional_info: If you do not have 100 Strength, this Talent will instead halve your opponent's armor resistances multiplicatively, before PEN on proc.
piercing_blow.desc: Attacks that break an opponent's block ignore their Armor resistances.

piercing_metal.name: Piercing Metal
piercing_metal.additional_info: Each rod increases armor damage dealt through weapon attacks and Mantras by 5%. This does not affect armor drain effects such as the Metal enchantment.
piercing_metal.desc: Deal additional armor damage to enemies per metal rod affecting them.

piercing_shot.name: Piercing Shot
piercing_shot.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool, that on use, enhances your next critical attack used with any Rifle or Pistol. Enhanced critical attacks gain 100% chip damage and apply the Pierced Armor status effect to your opponent, increasing incoming PEN for a few seconds.
piercing_shot.desc: Activate to make your next critical attack with any gun have 100% chip and shatter your opponent's armor for a few seconds, making them take increased PEN from all sources.

piercing_will.name: Piercing Will
piercing_will.additional_info: Grants a 10% PEN bonus at full insanity despite what the description states. The bonus PEN is applied starting from 35% Sanity.
piercing_will.desc: When your sanity is below 35%, gain up to +15% PEN on your attacks. Starting at 5% PEN, the lower your sanity, the higher your PEN.

placebo_effect.name: Placebo Effect
placebo_effect.additional_info: Also procs potion sickness, causing allies to throw up upon usage if they've ingested a potion recently.
placebo_effect.desc: Drinking potions near allies will share the potion's effect with them.

pleekstys_faith.name: Pleeksty's Faith
pleekstys_faith.additional_info: Does not proc with flames produced by the user with Flame Within or Agitating Spark.
pleekstys_faith.desc: When on fire, automatically quench flames at the cost of some ether.

pleekstys_inheritance.name: Pleeksty's Inheritance
pleekstys_inheritance.additional_info: Makes your Flamecharm Mantras extremely loud.
pleekstys_inheritance.desc: You inherit the teachings of Amorus Pleeksty, augmenting your flamecharm mantras.

pleekstys_will.name: Pleeksty's Will
pleekstys_will.additional_info: Consuming Gale Stones, Heartstars, Dying Embers, Spark Glands, and Frigid Prisms gives significantly more Ether.
pleekstys_will.desc: You gain significantly more ether from consuming elemental ingredients.

pleetskys_wrath.name: Pleetsky's Wrath
pleetskys_wrath.additional_info: Spawns swords from the sky, similarly to First Light's critical attack.
pleetskys_wrath.desc: After dealing 500 damage with Flame Mantras, call forth a hail of fiery swords.

pocket_bombs.name: Pocket Bombs
pocket_bombs.additional_info: On proc, this consumes 1 Iron Bomb to drop 2 bombs at your feet. This has a 1 second cooldown, with the cooldown activating any time you take damage, even if the effect did not proc.
pocket_bombs.desc: You have a chance to activate a bomb in your inventory when damaged

pocket_sand.name: Pocket Sand
pocket_sand.desc: [Fist] Feinting into an uppercut blinds, applies Stagger to PvE enemies and also applies Dazed briefly. We're even now, right? 30s cooldown

poisoned_knife.name: Poisoned Knife
poisoned_knife.desc: Your Deepwound's anti heal now lasts 60 seconds on assassination instead of 20.

polished_armor.name: Polished Armor
polished_armor.additional_info: The damage reduction of Polished Armor is increased by 0.05% per Ironsing investment, granting 8.75% damage reduction at requirements.
polished_armor.desc: You receive 5% less damage when your Armor protects you from an attack and has over 90% durability. This 5% will scale up to 10% less damage at 100 MTL.

polite_awakening.name: Polite Awakening
polite_awakening.desc: Recover 15% of your max health after getting up from being downed. (Only Procs when below 20% HP)

possession.name: Possession
possession.additional_info: The chip damage buff only applies to Galebreathe Mantras.
possession.desc: After an apparition hits an enemy, receive 7.5% posture damage on all Galebreathe attacks for 8 seconds. If the apparition hits while you have Phantom Step active, receive a 7.55% chip damage buff for 6 seconds.

potion_quaffer.name: Potion Quaffer
potion_quaffer.additional_info: Drink potions 30% faster. Increases the effectiveness of Health Regeneration potions by 15%, Sanity Restoration and Ether Regeneration potions by 30%, and removes the -25% effectiveness Instant Health potions have.
potion_quaffer.desc: You're accustomed to drinking toxic fluids quickly. You'll get along famously with the other patrons at the tavern. Drinking potions slows less and grants superior regenerative effects to you.

praise_the_sun.name: Praise The Sun
praise_the_sun.desc: When standing in sunlight increase your natural health regen and reduce how long antiheal effects last on you.

preceding_chill.name: Preceding Chill
preceding_chill.additional_info: If the user has Crystallization, this Talent no longer freezes but instead causes crystals to explode.
preceding_chill.desc: Enemies hit during the last moments of your ice beam are frozen.

precise_swing.name: Precise Swing
precise_swing.additional_info: Procs even if your critical is parried or blocked. The Precise Swing status effect will be lost should your next M1 land or get parried. This is additive with all other sources of Chip Damage.
precise_swing.desc: After landing a critical your next basic attack will gain 25% chip past your opponent's block.

precision_crusher.name: Precision Crusher
precision_crusher.desc: Landing a charged shot will knock your opponent down instead of back.

precision_hitter.name: Precision Hitter
precision_hitter.desc: Your Basic Attack posture damage is increased by 15%.

pressure_break.name: Pressure Break
pressure_break.reqs: air_pressure => pressure_break := 65s WND, 30r AGL OR 30r STR
pressure_break.desc: Breaking an enemy's posture will cause them to take intense wind pressure, increasing the attack's damage by +25% and flinging the enemy backwards.

pressure_detonation.name: Pressure Detonation
pressure_detonation.additional_info: If the user has the Apparitions Talent, this can proc apparitions by inflicting suffocation.
pressure_detonation.desc: Block breaking an opponent with a Shadow mantra generates a small vacuum that suffocates those hit and steals their Tempo.

pressure_skewer.name: Pressure Skewer
pressure_skewer.additional_info: Increases blood bar damage by 50% and grants +25% Chip damage while active. These bonuses apply to M1s and criticals with the M1 tag.
pressure_skewer.desc: [Rapier] Flourishing an enemy causes your M1's to deal additional chip damage, blood loss and makes your hits deal 3 extra true damage until you take damage.

primal_rage.name: Primal Rage
primal_rage.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that can only be used when you are under 50% health. While buffed, your hits will showcase the health percentage of your opponent. Additionally, gain a 25% damage buff for the duration of the effect. 3 minute cooldown.
primal_rage.desc: If you are below 50%, unleash your rage and increase the amount of damage you deal for 25 seconds as well as being able to see enemy health when you hit them.

prime_ether_bullets.name: Prime Ether Bullets
prime_ether_bullets.additional_info: True Ether Bullets now procs in 2 hits instead of 3. Adds 1.2 Intelligence scaling to your Pistols.
prime_ether_bullets.desc: Your bullets take one less hit to proc elemental effects and now have slight intelligence scaling. [Dual Gun]

prince_of_the_wind.name: Prince of the Wind
prince_of_the_wind.desc: You are the one who the wind bends around. Your galebreathe is enhanced.

proficient_baiting.name: Proficient Baiting
proficient_baiting.additional_info: Reduces the likelihood of fishing up trash items such as Seaweed or Leather Boots.
proficient_baiting.desc: Casting your line excites ocean life, reducing the chances of fishing up trash.

propagandalist.name: Propagandalist
propagandalist.desc: Your Sing will now stir your allies into a frenzy, causing them to become Overcharmed for 15s, applying Charmed to enemies they hit with Basic Attacks.

protagonist_syndrome.name: Protagonist Syndrome
protagonist_syndrome.additional_info: Increases your Dawnwalker Mantra damage by 30% after being hit by Shadowcast damage. This cannot be self procced by using Shade Devour.
protagonist_syndrome.desc: The grasp of shadow is meaningless in the face of your blinding light. Your Dawnwalker mantras are empowered after getting hit by Shadowcast.

pugnacious.name: Pugnacious
pugnacious.additional_info: Gain various stacking buffs scaling on the amount of combat tags you have. Gain a further damage buff upon executing a player. On basic attack, gain +10% to the following stats: damage, posture damage, elemental damage resistance, physical damage resistance, chip damage, and speed boost per combat tag you have. The damage, posture damage, and chip damage effects ignore the modifier caps but cap at +30%. The resistance bonuses are multiplicative to other sources of their respective resistance types. The speed boost has no cap in effectiveness.
pugnacious.desc: Become stronger the more you are combat tagged. Gain even more strength whenever you grip a player.

punishing_blow.name: Punishing Blow
punishing_blow.additional_info: If you M1 your opponent during their M1 animation, they will be dazed for 1 second. Also procs if you land a critical with the M1 tag during their M1 animation.
punishing_blow.desc: [Heavy Weapons] Daze opponents for 1s and Stagger PvE enemies for 2s when you interrupt their Basic Attack / actions with your own.

punishing_riposte.name: Punishing Riposte
punishing_riposte.additional_info: After parrying a guard break, gain the Punishing Riposte status effect for 15 seconds, making your critical guaranteed guardbreak if it hits block.
punishing_riposte.desc: When parrying a guardbreak, enhance your critical for the next 4 seconds. If you land your crit on your opponent's block while it is enhanced, immediately guardbreak your opponent.

purge_shot.name: Purge Shot
purge_shot.additional_info: Landing Arc Beam removes all stacks of anti-heal from your opponent, dealing 5 true damage for every stack they had.
purge_shot.desc: Landing an arc beam while your opponent has anti heal stacks purges the stacks, with it dealing 5 true damage for every stack they had.

pursuit.name: Pursuit
pursuit.additional_info: Procs even if Revenge is blocked, parried, dodged, or vented. For every point in Agility below 90, Pursuit will gain +0.375 seconds to its cooldown, capping at 29.4 seconds with 65 Agility.
pursuit.desc: If you land your Revenge, clear the cooldown immediately. (25s cooldown)

pyreborne.name: Pyreborne
pyreborne.additional_info: Increases the base damage of all Flamecharm Mantras by 30%.
pyreborne.desc: Your Flamecharm mantras have all stats amplified.

quick_swap.name: Quick Swap
quick_swap.desc: Massively reduce your bullet swap cooldown. [Dual Gun]

quickdraw.name: Quickdraw
quickdraw.additional_info: Allows the user to instantly start attacking with their offhand gun after attacking with their main weapon.
quickdraw.desc: Allows you to fire your offhand gun right after swinging. [Not necessary on dual guns]

rage_amp.name: Rage Amp
rage_amp.desc: At 2 or more combat tags, your critical now applies anti-heal while also increases the size and damage of your critical. This scales with the amount of combat tags you have.

rain_of_static.name: Rain of Static
rain_of_static.additional_info: When casting Lightning Impact, hover above the ground and fire multiple projectiles. Afterward, you strike down normally.
rain_of_static.desc: After successfully casting lightning impact, strike down countless thunder at those below. In return your Lightning Impact will require more time to cast.

rapid_fire.name: Rapid Fire
rapid_fire.additional_info: The Rapid Fire status effect entirely removes your Pistol critical cooldown for its duration, allowing you to spam it. Procs on dodge, block, and hit.
rapid_fire.desc: [1H Guns] When you land a critical shot, gain Rapid Fire for 2s. 12s Cooldown.

rapid_reload.name: Rapid Reload
rapid_reload.additional_info: Reduces the total time taken to reload a pistol from empty by 0.1 seconds.
rapid_reload.desc: [1H Guns] You have 20% faster reload when reloading an empty pistol

rats_spirit.name: Rat's Spirit
rats_spirit.additional_info: Being combat tagged by 2 or more players will cause your critical attack to deal an additional 10 true damage per hit. This scales on how many combat tags you have, gaining +10 damage per.
rats_spirit.desc: Each hit of your critical will deal an extra 10 true damage per combat tag whenever you are combat tagged by 2 or more people.

ready_or_not.name: Ready or Not
ready_or_not.desc: The first attack to hit you while out of combat has its damage cut in half.

reality_shift.name: Reality Shift
reality_shift.additional_info: Your last used Mantra or critical attack will be stored in your clones when you summon them. Using the Reality Shift Talent tool or hotkey will perform the stored action.
reality_shift.desc: Command the closest conjured servant to attack their hallucinating target, either using a Critical Attack or a Mantra.

rebuke_in_stasis.name: Rebuke in Stasis
rebuke_in_stasis.additional_info: Your Punishment will apply bottom freeze to mobs if you land the counter hit.
rebuke_in_stasis.desc: Bottom freeze enemies nearby when countering with Punishment, freezes mobs affected when re-casted.

reclaimed_glass.name: Reclaimed Glass
reclaimed_glass.additional_info: The duration of this effect is refreshable by reproccing it.
reclaimed_glass.desc: Your Crystal Shrapnel explosions now grant you and any allies caught in them 10% Elemental Resistance for 10 seconds.

refine_and_reuse.name: Refine and Reuse
refine_and_reuse.desc: Consuming rods with Scrapsinger reduces incoming PEN against you for 14 seconds. Each rod reduces PEN by 5% multiplicatively.

reforged_alloy.name: Reforged Alloy
reforged_alloy.desc: Anytime you consume iron rods using Metal Pull or any Rending Needle technique, reduce the cooldown of your next critical based on the amount of rods consumed.

refreeze.name: Refreeze
refreeze.desc: Landing any sort of ability that causes bottom freeze reduces the cooldown of your Orbital Ice by 5 seconds.

reinforced_armor.name: Reinforced Armor
reinforced_armor.reqs: battle_tendency, braced_collapse, moving_fortress, perseverance => reinforced_armor := 90s FTD
reinforced_armor.additional_info: Loses 0.8% PEN resistance per point below 90 Fortitude, capping at 10% PEN resistance at 65 Fortitude.

relentless_barrage.name: Relentless Barrage
relentless_barrage.additional_info: Your Rapid Punches posture damage per hit scales on the amount of hits landed/blocked. At max Calamity Punch stacks, gain hyperarmor during Rapid Punches.
relentless_barrage.desc: Every swing from Rapid Punches deals more posture than the last. At max punch stacks enables hyperarmor during the barrage.

relentless_hunt.name: Relentless Hunt
relentless_hunt.additional_info: 20s CD per weapon type, 6s CD if feinted. Movesets differ depending on weapon type. The Light Weapon variant hits twice if it is enhanced by Flow State.
relentless_hunt.desc: M1 while doing an Aerial Attack to initiate a special gap closer attack.

rending_impact.name: Rending Impact
rending_impact.additional_info: Only procs on guardbreaks from weapon attacks. Applies knockdown for 1.2s.
rending_impact.desc: [Greataxes] Block breaking an enemy applies knockdown.

rending_needle_augmenter.name: Rending Needle: Augmenter
rending_needle_augmenter.reqs: rending_needle_augmenter := 90r LHT OR 90r MED OR 90r HVY, 90s MTL
rending_needle_augmenter.additional_info: Replaces your current weapon with the Metal Greatsword for 10 seconds when you Pull an enemy who has 5 Metal Rods on them. While Metal Greatsword is equipped, your Metal Armament damage is increased by 50%.
rending_needle_augmenter.desc: If an enemy has 5 or more rods, your Ironsing Pull will use their rods to form a powerful sword to attack with. This also makes your Metal Armament stronger while the weapon is equipped.

rending_needle_conductor.name: Rending Needle: Conductor
rending_needle_conductor.additional_info: Upon applying 5 Metal Rods to a target, the Rods will converge into a Conductor Rod. Conductor Rods cannot be pulled. If an enemy affected by a Conductor Rod casts a Mantra, they will lose 5% of their maximum armor, and if that Mantra was a non-Ironsing/Bloodrend elemental Mantra, they will be afflicted with their Attunement's status effect, causing the Rod to fall off. Conductor Rods last 30 seconds or until a non-Ironsing/Bloodrend elemental Mantra is cast.
rending_needle_conductor.desc: 5 metal rods will combine into a conductor rod. If an enemy uses a non-Ironsing elemental mantra, they're dealt with their element back in return.

rending_needle_impaler.name: Rending Needle: Impaler
rending_needle_impaler.additional_info: Increases the Metal Rod cap from 5 to 10. You can no longer use Metal Pull unless the target has at least 5 rods. Your Metal Pull now deals damage, with the damage scaling based on the amount of Rods applied. Impaler Rods individually have a base damage of 4, with 5 Ironsing scaling, gaining 0.02 damage per Ironsing investment. This will deal 5.5 damage per rod at 75 Ironsing and 6 damage per rod at 100 Ironsing.
rending_needle_impaler.desc: If an enemy is affected by 5 or more metal rods, your Ironsing Pull instead pulls out all of the rods for massive damage.

rending_needle_jailer.name: Rending Needle: Jailer
rending_needle_jailer.additional_info: Increases the Metal Rod cap from 5 to 10, and you can no longer use Metal Pull unless the target has at least 5 rods. Metal Pull now stuns targets for 1.08s, and an additional 0.104s for every additional rod after the fifth (to a maximum of 1.6s). A stunned target has 30% damage reduction.
rending_needle_jailer.desc: If an enemy has 5 or more rods, your Ironsing Pull will restrain them instead of pulling them.

repeated_blows.name: Repeated Blows
repeated_blows.additional_info: This has no cooldown, theoretically allowing you to infinitely reset the cooldown of your Strength Mantras.
repeated_blows.desc: Any strength mantra that has a Wrath Gem on it will reset its cooldown if you land a critical while a Wrath Gem is active.

repeated_propulsion.name: Repeated Propulsion
repeated_propulsion.desc: Reduce the cooldown of Dancing Steps and Graceful Steps to 1 second.

replenishing_knockout.name: Replenishing Knockout
replenishing_knockout.additional_info: Knocking enemies will replenish 1.5x more of your health and posture (50% -> 75%).
replenishing_knockout.desc: You gain more health and posture from downing enemies.

reshape_and_remold.name: Reshape and Remold
reshape_and_remold.reqs: artisans_blade, gilded_path_scrapsinger, masterwork, refine_and_reuse, songs_unforged => reshape_and_remold := 70s MTL
reshape_and_remold.additional_info: Increases the armor drain effect of your rods by 25%, from 2% drain to 2.5%.
reshape_and_remold.desc: Successful procs of Scrapsinger will increase the amount of armor damage your opponent takes. After hitting 10 stacks, the opponent will take +5% damage until the stacks drop below 10.

residual_fury.name: Residual Fury
residual_fury.desc: [In Berserk State] Landing your critical grants +50% PEN on Basic Attacks for 8s.

resolve_crusher.name: Resolve Crusher
resolve_crusher.additional_info: Resolve Crusher's "Electrified" effect is only applied after the 5th stack (not the 4th stated by the Talent). Each stack lasts for 5 seconds. Electrified lasts for 5 seconds. Damage debuff only applies against weapon attacks.
resolve_crusher.desc: Lightning moves now apply stacks of "Resolve Crusher". At 4 stacks, you apply "Electrified" to your opponent. Attacks from Electrified opponents are converted into lightning damage, but will deal 10% less damage to you.

retrograde.name: Retrograde
retrograde.additional_info: Gain a Talent tool that records your location, health, Ether, and posture on use. Upon using the tool again or waiting 5 seconds, you will be transferred back to your original location, restoring you back to the state and location you were at when this tool was initially used.
retrograde.desc: Your existence is... questionable. No one understands where you have come from. Your ability reflects this, activate to start your Retrograde timer. Activating the ability again will reverse your actions, with the cooldown scaling with the time.

reveal.name: Reveal
reveal.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that activates True Strength on use. While active, you will passively accumulate Wither. Reveal will automatically end if your health goes below 10%.
reveal.desc: Pour your heart out, and reveal your true strength.

reverse_leech.name: Reverse Leech
reverse_leech.additional_info: Behind You is procced by landing a basic attack behind your enemy after feinting a Mantra.
reverse_leech.desc: Anytime you proc Behind You, steal ether from your opponent too.

reverse_necrosis.name: Reverse Necrosis
reverse_necrosis.desc: Landing any mantra will now heal you based on how slow your opponent is.

righteous_crash.name: Righteous Crash
righteous_crash.desc: Slamming down your opponent in the air with a flourish or your upgraded Vanguard Jus Karita critical deals extra true damage based on high up in the air they were.

righteous_rage.name: Righteous Rage
righteous_rage.additional_info: Temporary Health does not count for this effect.
righteous_rage.desc: [In Berserk State] You deal increased damage the lower your health is.

righteous_violence.name: Righteous Violence
righteous_violence.desc: Landing a Critical Attack heals your marked ally. Landing a Jus Karita critical or Karita Swap heals your marked ally even more.

riot_breaker.name: Riot Breaker
riot_breaker.desc: You receive 15% less posture damage and deal 10% more posture damage when under attack by 3 or more enemies.

riot_shield.name: Riot Shield
riot_shield.additional_info: Grants 40% damage reduction to chip damage, does not reduce your opponent's chip % by 40.
riot_shield.desc: While you are fighting two or more opponents and are using a shield, reduce the total amount of chip damage you take by 40%.

rip_and_tear.name: Rip and Tear
rip_and_tear.desc: Regain health upon defeating an enemy.

rising_star.name: Rising Star
rising_star.additional_info: 12s CD per weapon type, 4s CD if feinted. Procs all "on Uppercut" Talents. Movesets differ depending on weapon type.
rising_star.desc: Press CTRL + M2 to activate a special uppercut attack.

risky_defense.name: Risky Defense
risky_defense.additional_info: Increases incoming posture damage from Mantras by 50%. Decreases incoming posture damage from weapon attacks by 25%.
risky_defense.desc: Decrease how much posture damage you take from physical attacks by 25%, but take 50% more posture damage from mantras.

risky_moves.name: Risky Moves
risky_moves.additional_info: Attacking will cancel the effect early. 20 second cooldown.
risky_moves.desc: When you successfully dodge, you'll automatically dodge the next attack.

robber_baron.name: Robber Baron
robber_baron.additional_info: Lose 25% of your non-Soulbound/Enchanted items on death instead of 50%. You no longer lose Notes on death.
robber_baron.desc: You hold onto more items when defeated.

rock_blaster.name: Rock Blaster
rock_blaster.desc: Doubles your ore yields when mining.

rogue_assassin.name: Rogue Assassin
rogue_assassin.desc: Your assassinations now deal an extra 50 true damage (200 in PvE).

rosens_technique.name: Rosen's Technique
rosens_technique.additional_info: Reduces the cooldown of Tactical Reload by 45 seconds; from 90 seconds to 45.
rosens_technique.desc: If you use Tactical Reload, Rosen's Peacemaker has 45 seconds less off its cooldown.

royal_charge.name: Royal Charge
royal_charge.additional_info: Running attacks with Club weapons grant Temporary Health. 20 second cooldown.
royal_charge.desc: When landing a running attack while using a club to gain a bit of temp health.

ruinous_recovery.name: Ruinous Recovery
ruinous_recovery.desc: Enemies recover 15% less Posture when parrying. Guardbreaking an enemy by parrying them deals massive damage, and can be done against even the strongest of foes.

rule_through_fear.name: Rule Through Fear
rule_through_fear.desc: Executing an enemy applies Overcharm to nearby allies and yourself.

rush_hour.name: Rush Hour
rush_hour.additional_info: Use the Rush Hour tool to gain the Rush Hour status effect, granting a 30% speed boost, a 15% damage buff, and an increase to blood damage. This passively drains the user's health and blood while active. Recover 5% blood whenever you land an attack.
rush_hour.desc: Stab yourself to become stronger, faster, and deal increased blood bar damage.

rush_of_ancients.name: Rush of Ancients
rush_of_ancients.additional_info: Extends your dash distance and makes you invisible for a very brief duration when you dash.
rush_of_ancients.desc: Dashing at maximum sprint momentum makes you one with the wind itself.

sable_winds.name: Sable Winds
sable_winds.additional_info: Inhale bonuses now apply to Shadowcast Mantras as well.
sable_winds.desc: You can now Inhale Shadowcast mantras. Aftercut effects now drain a small amount of ether based on the damage they deal.

sacred_aura.name: Sacred Aura
sacred_aura.desc: Landing your Sacred Hammer critical attack applies an aura of protection around you, reducing the damage you take by a flat 2.5, multiplying based on how many combat tags you currently have on you.

sacrificial_boon.name: Sacrificial Boon
sacrificial_boon.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that consumes 5 KnowledgeSprite on use to grant the user a random buff within a set pool. This has a 0.5 second cooldown, potentially allowing you to stack the buffs. Potential buffs are: 20% damage buff, hyperarmor for 10 seconds, instantly heal 50 health, thirst restoration, stomach restoration, or a speed boost for 10 seconds.
sacrificial_boon.desc: Sacrifice 5 knowledge to activate Blessing, giving you a random blessing from Navae.

sadistic_split.name: Sadistic Split
sadistic_split.desc: Guardbreaking your opponent now heals you. The amount of this heal is based on how much insanity your character currently has.

safety_dance.name: Safety Dance
safety_dance.desc: Your base dodge frames are increased by 0.05s.

safety_first.name: Safety First
safety_first.desc: At the start of fights, gain 25% damage resistance for 30 seconds.

saint_jay.name: Saint Jay
saint_jay.additional_info: You can only steal non-passive healing. On Crystal Path, applying a Crystal will proc Saint Jay for 2 seconds. You cannot steal healing that you apply.
saint_jay.desc: When a Chilled enemy receives a heal, it's nullified and 60% of the healing is redirected to you. While this is active and they are on ice your rate of healing is increased, raise your PvE Heal Boost to 10% as well.

saints_negation.name: Saint's Negation
saints_negation.additional_info: Allows you to fully negate the damage of one attack that has a damage type that corresponds with your current Saint Stance. Can only proc once per full cycle, meaning you'll have to fully cycle through all of the Stances before you can proc it again.
saints_negation.desc: Once per stance cycle you can fully block an attack that matches your Saint Stance.

saints_overload.name: Saint's Overload
