saints_overload.additional_info: Increases your Attunement investment scaling by 15% and the effects of your Mantra modifiers by 10% for a few seconds after performing a full rotation of Saint stances. You'll need to fully cycle through all of the Stances before you can proc this effect again.
saints_overload.desc: After a full rotation of stances your elemental scaling is increased by 15% and Mantra Modifiers increased by 10%.

saints_synergy.name: Saint's Synergy
saints_synergy.additional_info: 15% of the investment scaling from your highest Attuned stat is added to your other Attuned Mantras, granting them slight dual scaling.
saints_synergy.desc: 15% of your highest element scaling is applied to other elemental damage.

sanguine_siphon.name: Sanguine Siphon
sanguine_siphon.additional_info: Grants a 20% damage buff to the next Mantra cast.
sanguine_siphon.desc: Landing a critical attack while in a blood pool will consume that pool and empower your next blood mantra.

savior.name: Savior
savior.additional_info: Interrupt an execution attempt to proc this Talent, granting a speed boost for 15 seconds.
savior.desc: After saving a player from being gripped gain a short speed boost for a short duration.

scales_of_the_edenkite.name: Scales of the Edenkite
scales_of_the_edenkite.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that lasts 5 seconds with a 3 minute cooldown. The deaggro effect only works in PvE, and is extremely ineffective, as most enemies will immediately reaggro. The deaggro effect does not work against bosses or in Depths Trials.
scales_of_the_edenkite.desc: In order to resolve conflict in Lumen, you need to be able to handle any situation thrown at you. Activate your Scales to reduce all damage taken by 80% and de-aggro enemies briefly.

scammer.name: Scammer
scammer.desc: If your opponent tries to parry the fake hit of your critical attack, your critical attack will inflict a stronger daze upon your opponent.

scaredy_cat.name: Scaredy Cat
scaredy_cat.desc: When enemies initiate a fight first, gain a speed boost.

scholars_intuition.name: Scholar's Intuition
scholars_intuition.desc: INT, WILL, and CHA Training Gear is 50% more effective.

scholars_mark.name: Scholar's Mark
scholars_mark.additional_info: You can now use Capra Marks to buff yourself.
scholars_mark.desc: You now are able to inflict yourself with a Mark. The duration of this scales with how many people you inflict with the effect as well.

scorchblood.name: Scorchblood
scorchblood.additional_info: Deals 16.5 damage in an AoE on proc.
scorchblood.desc: Guardbreaking your opponent using a bloodrend mantra causes a blood explosion, setting your opponent on fire and poisoning their blood.

scorched_peak.name: Scorched Peak
scorched_peak.additional_info: Deals 10 Thundercall damage on hit. "On fire" refers to the Burn status effect. This can proc Grounding Bolt.
scorched_peak.desc: Blockbreaking an enemy on fire or with a fire mantra causes them to be struck by lightning.

scorching_decay.name: Scorching Decay
scorching_decay.reqs: emperor_flame => scorching_decay := 100r LHT OR 100r MED OR 100r HVY, 100s FLM
scorching_decay.additional_info: Increases the Wither applied from Emperor Flame from 25 to 75.
scorching_decay.desc: The wither dealt from your Emperor's Flame is massively increased.

scornful_scowl.name: Scornful Scowl
scornful_scowl.desc: Your Glare stuns enemies for much longer.

seaborne.name: Seaborne
seaborne.additional_info: Ship purchase price is reduced by 20%, ships turn 20% faster, and have 10% more health. Repairing a ship with a Repair Hammer takes less time.
seaborne.desc: You have a keen understanding of ships and their maintenance.

seamasters_guile.name: Seamaster's Guile
seamasters_guile.additional_info: Your boat will take 25% less damage if the person piloting it has this Talent.
seamasters_guile.desc: While you're at the helm of a ship, it takes 25% less damage

second_interrogation.name: Second Interrogation
second_interrogation.additional_info: Does not stack with Resolve Crusher's damage reduction, instead it replaces it with this, more potent, effect. Only applies against weapon attacks.
second_interrogation.desc: Electrified attacks do 50% less damage and posture damage to you.

serpents_dance.name: Serpent's Dance
serpents_dance.additional_info: This critical deals 1x of your weapon's scaled damage. This critical can only be used on Cestus that do not have a unique critical.
serpents_dance.desc: Unleash the power of Fang and Coil to unlock a devastating Running Critical Attack, feint to cancel momentum.

shadow_overflow.name: Shadow Overflow
shadow_overflow.additional_info: Has a 4 second cooldown. Deals 5 Shadowcast damage on proc.
shadow_overflow.desc: Extra ether stolen with mantras are exerted as dark energy, damaging and absorbing ether from those nearby.

shadow_travel.name: Shadow Travel
shadow_travel.additional_info: Deals 0.25 self damage per stud teleported. This can kill you if you don't have enough health to survive the teleport. If your teleport distance is less than 300 studs, you will not take self damage. Drains 100 Ether on use, with each stud travelled increasing this Ether cost by 0.2. The maximum distance you can travel is based on your Ether.
shadow_travel.desc: Teleport to a location in exchange for Ether cost. Certain ranges will require a health sacrifice. Be careful as this technique can prove lethal to the user.

shadowcast_unbounded.name: Shadowcast Unbounded
shadowcast_unbounded.additional_info: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Shadowcast Attribute. This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
shadowcast_unbounded.desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Shadowcast to its fullest.

shadowcaster.name: Shadowcaster
shadowcaster.desc: Grants you the ability to command shadows as a Shadowcaster.

shared_mimicry.name: Shared Mimicry
shared_mimicry.additional_info: Your clones will also Vent when you Vent. This can trigger even if you do not have Tempo or if you press G while in an animation.
shared_mimicry.desc: The servants you have conjured will imitate your actions when you Swing/Block/Parry/Jump.

shared_misery.name: Shared Misery
shared_misery.additional_info: If you are actively losing sanity or have used Heretic's Sutra in the past 15 seconds, remove 3% of the target's maximum sanity, scaled down if you have less than 85 Willpower.
shared_misery.desc: Using a Basic Attack/Critical Attack on an enemy while losing sanity causes them to lose sanity.

sharing_is_caring.name: Sharing is Caring
sharing_is_caring.desc: Your 'Charm' on opponents also slightly increases your blood drain against them.

sharpened_dagger.name: Sharpened Dagger
sharpened_dagger.additional_info: This applies to attacks used against your opponent's back, not assassinations.
sharpened_dagger.desc: All backstabs deal 1 extra true damage (4 extra damage if done to PvE).

shatter.name: Shatter
shatter.additional_info: Landing a critical attack removes all speed debuffs your opponent has, dealing 5 Frostdraw damage per debuff.
shatter.desc: Landing a critical shatters your opponent, ridding them of their speed debuffs for 5 frost damage per debuff.

shattering_left.name: Shattering Left
shattering_left.additional_info: Turns your Strong Left and Wind-Up enhanced attacks into guaranteed guardbreaks against blocking NPCs.
shattering_left.desc: Your Strong Left and Wind-up punches will always guard break mobs.

sheltering_grasp.name: Sheltering Grasp
sheltering_grasp.additional_info: Halves the blood cost of the Mantra.
sheltering_grasp.desc: Blood mantras cast within blood pools have a reduced blood cost.

shield_breaker.name: Shield Breaker
shield_breaker.desc: Blunt damage now fully ignores the posture bonus from shields.

shock_trooper_specialist.name: Shock Trooper Specialist
shock_trooper_specialist.additional_info: Upon meeting a damage threshold, create a Stormcall Strike. The Storm Strikes deal 40 Thundercall damage and can proc Grounding Bolt. Additionally, your Electro Carve, Grand Javelin, and Thunder Kick become green, and your Astral Wind, Champion's Whirlthrow, and Gale Lunge become yellow. All of the aforementioned Mantras have their base damage increased by 15%.
shock_trooper_specialist.desc: Empower the mantras taught to you by your Legion Specialist Captain. You also now conjure a storm strike on your opponent by landing Gale and Thundercall mantras.

shocking_finish.name: Shocking Finish
shocking_finish.desc: Following a flourish up with a lightning beam causes it to be casted instantly.

shocking_reverb.name: Shocking Reverb
shocking_reverb.additional_info: You need to reach a threshold of 150 scaled damage with Thundercall Mantras without being hit to proc this Talent. The damage buildup to reach the threshold is unaffected by resistances and damage modifiers. Also negates damage from critical attacks and Silentheart abilities. 2 minute cooldown.
shocking_reverb.desc: Landing enough lightning mantras without getting hit grants you a defensive lightning cloak for 15 seconds, letting you negate damage from light attacks and ironsing.

showstopper.name: Showstopper
showstopper.desc: When an enemy would roll through one of your physical attacks, stomp the ground, dazing anyone nearby. Removes speed buffs from target upon landing.

sightless_still.name: Sightless Still
sightless_still.desc: The more a person is affected by your Shadowcast the more you obscure their vision. Block breaking an opponent obscures their vision even more and applies Ether Sunder to PvE

silencers_blade.name: Silencer's Blade
silencers_blade.additional_info: Landing M1 attacks or criticals with the M1 tag on suffocated targets applies a new stack of suffocation that lasts 5 seconds. Grants a 22.5% speed boost for 3 seconds on proc.
silencers_blade.desc: Meleeing a 'Suffocated' opponent will extend the duration of the Suffocation and grant a speed boost.

silencers_song.name: Silencer's Song
silencers_song.reqs: silencers_blade => silencers_song := 100r LHT OR 100r MED OR 100r HVY, 100s WND
silencers_song.additional_info: Landing any Mantra on a suffocated target creates a new stack of suffocation that lasts 5 seconds. Additionally, you gain a 22.5% speed boost for 3 seconds.
silencers_song.desc: Silencer's Blade now procs on your mantras.

silent_cascade.name: Silent Cascade
silent_cascade.additional_info: Landing 8 weapon attacks or Silentheart abilities grants the Silent Cascade status effect, allowing you to use the Silent Cascade attack. This effect lasts 30 seconds or until you use Silent Cascade. Deals 7.5 Oath damage per hit (6).
silent_cascade.desc: Landing physical attacks on an opponent charges up your Silent Cascade, a devastating barrage that can be released with CTRL + M2.

simmerbloom.name: Simmerbloom
simmerbloom.additional_info: Basic attacks with Pleeksty's Inferno now apply burn with no cooldown.
simmerbloom.desc: Basic Attacks on Pleeksty's Inferno are now granted flames.

simple_buff.name: Simple Buff
simple_buff.additional_info: Grants a 7.5% (15% in Vow of Iron) damage buff to M1s.
simple_buff.desc: Your light attacks deal 7.5/15% more damage. Pretty simple.

sin_stacker.name: Sin Stacker
sin_stacker.additional_info: Each stack of All the Dead Gods anti-heal increases the duration of subsequent All the Dead Gods anti-heal stacks by 1 second. For example, your first hit will apply anti-heal for 8 seconds, and your next hit will apply 9 seconds of anti-heal, and so on. Each stack of anti-heal has an independent duration, decaying independently of each other.
sin_stacker.desc: Your All The Dead Gods' duration is now based on how many stacks of antiheal you already have on your opponent, increase your PvE Heal Boost to 10% as well.

singularity.name: Singularity
singularity.desc: Enemies will briefly hang in place when hit by a shadow move.

skillful_recovery.name: Skillful Recovery
skillful_recovery.desc: Recover more posture in all situations.

sky_aid.name: Sky Aid
sky_aid.desc: Take 80% less damage while in the air.

sleight_of_hands.name: Sleight of Hands
sleight_of_hands.desc: [1H Guns] When you flourish an opponent you instantly load a bullet.

slick.name: Slick
slick.desc: Coat of the infamous thief Emiya Konga. Improves the user's sliding abilities. This effect stacks with Konga's Clutch Ring.

slider_style.name: Slider Style
slider_style.desc: Raise the cap of how fast you are able to slide. Your Jus Karita fighting style gains a new sliding crit. Its power stems from how fast you are sliding when using the critical attack.

sloped_plate.name: Sloped Plate
sloped_plate.desc: Reduces the amount of damage you take when guardbroken by 10.

smell_of_blood.name: Smell of Blood
smell_of_blood.additional_info: Your opponent's blood (or blood hemorrhaging in PvE) percentage is shown as a red number, and their blood poison percentage is shown as a pink number.
smell_of_blood.desc: When people touch a blood pool, briefly see their blood (or blood hemorrhage amount for PvE) and blood poison. This effect also occurs whenever you blockbreak your opponent.

smoldering_touch.name: Smoldering Touch
smoldering_touch.desc: Guardbreaking your opponent sets them on fire.

snake_oil.name: Snake Oil
snake_oil.additional_info: Increases the sell price of items by 40%.
snake_oil.desc: Okay, the amount you're charging people for your items is getting downright criminal. But I'm just a Talent description, I can't stop you.

soar.name: Soar
soar.additional_info: This allows you to retain your full momentum during your weapon critical. This Talent will be disabled if you equip a Motif onto the Withered Gale Pale.
soar.desc: Retain full walkspeed while using your crit.

soaring_storm.name: Soaring Storm
soaring_storm.additional_info: Proc condition is removed and damage is increased if in True Strength. Applies to all forms of uppercuts, including Mantras and certain weapon criticals. Deals 24 Oath + Slash damage (6 hits that deal 4 damage each), this is increased to 39 damage (6 hits that deal 6.5 damage each) if you are in True Strength.
soaring_storm.desc: Empower your uppercuts with the way of the blade, after Lithe Stepping, flourishing, or landing an Oath ability.

soaring_swiftkick.name: Soaring Swiftkick
soaring_swiftkick.desc: Flying Swiftkick no longer consumes your speed boost and instead gives you more speed.

solborn.name: Solborn
solborn.additional_info: Spawns a small orange, stationary, Phoenix near you. The size of the Phoenix will increase based on the user's level. This Phoenix can be used like a campfire to rest and heal yourself.
solborn.desc: Harness your Heartfire to command the Phoenix bound to your soul.

songs_unforged.name: Songs Unforged
songs_unforged.desc: Your weapon criticals will now activate scrapsinger.

sorcerers_skill.name: Sorcerer's Skill
sorcerers_skill.additional_info: This restores 5 Tempo after using your Vent instead of decreasing the Vent cost.
sorcerers_skill.desc: Decrease the amount of tempo it takes to vent by 5.

sorcerers_supply.name: Sorcerer's Supply
sorcerers_supply.additional_info: Increases your Tempo by 10 in Pathfinder or 30 in Vow of Iron.
sorcerers_supply.desc: Increase the amount of Tempo you have by 10/30.

sorcerers_surge.name: Sorcerer's Surge
sorcerers_surge.desc: Your vent's cooldown is reduced by 2.5 seconds.

soul_infusion.name: Soul Infusion
soul_infusion.additional_info: Increases your execution speed by 40%, down to 1.8 seconds from 3 seconds. Upon successfully performing an execution, use Ardour Scream for free. Your Ardour Scream range is buffed, sfx is changed, and minimum Ether cost required to cast Ardour Scream is reduced from 100% Ether to 40%.
soul_infusion.desc: Infuse Ardour into your executions. If your execute is interrupted, the opponent remains down for a longer amount of time. Your Ardour Screams are projected further.

soul_rip.name: Soul Rip
soul_rip.additional_info: Grants a 50% weapon damage buff, ?% defense, infinite Ether, and a speed boost for the buff duration. Once the buff wears off, one of your legs will break, removing your ability to sprint for 30 seconds.
soul_rip.desc: Kill a player to gain 2 runes. Activate a rune when using this talent, and gain immense physical power, defense, and infinite ether for 25 seconds. Beware its strenuous downside.

soul_veil.name: Soul Veil
soul_veil.additional_info: Each successful attack with the Soulthorn builds up stacks of Soul Veil, increasing your weapon damage by 7.5%. This caps at a 30% damage buff. If you take damage while Soul Veil is active, the opponent who hit you will steal your Soul Veil stacks until you hit them back. This can prove fatal.
soul_veil.desc: Soulthorn now directly siphons the song of your enemies. Accumulating stacks and increasing your power. Perfect plays are encouraged.

sovereign_state.name: Sovereign State
sovereign_state.additional_info: Landing Galebreathe Mantras, Thundercall Mantras, weapon attacks, and Blightsurger Mantras gives Blight Meter. Press [X] while having at least 30% Blight Meter to enter the Sovereign State. Your weapon is replaced with Sovereign Bangle and the Wither applied on Blightsurger Mantras is increased while in Sovereign State.
sovereign_state.desc: Landing physical hits builds your Blight Meter. At full gauge, enter a Blight State that changes your critical and empowers Blightsurge abilities.

sovereigns_counter.name: Sovereign's Counter
sovereigns_counter.additional_info: Punishment has its reflected damage output increased by 12.5% additively, meaning at level 5 you can reflect 112.5% of someone's damage on top of the base damage. If the Authority Commander Outfit is equipped, the longevity of the attack window on your Punishment is increased by 3x; from 20 seconds to a full minute. Prediction's active frames are increased slightly. Curse of the Unbidden has its posture restoration increased by 10%, restoring 40% of your posture. Payback has its active counter frames increased by 0.7 seconds.
sovereigns_counter.desc: Improve the efficiency of every counter you use. This effect becomes stronger for Punishment if you have the Riot Breaker talent.

sow_and_mend.name: Sow and Mend
sow_and_mend.additional_info: Gives 25 flat Temporary Health on use. 30 second cooldown.
sow_and_mend.desc: Sacrifice 35% of your blood for temporary health.

spark_of_theros.name: Spark of Theros
spark_of_theros.additional_info: Turns your Thundercall white and changes your Shock to Blightshock, applying Wither to affected targets.
spark_of_theros.desc: Your Thundercall is imbued with the spark of Theros, altering its appearance and properties.

speed_demon.name: Speed Demon
speed_demon.additional_info: Speed Demon's bleed deals 2.5% of your weapon's scaled damage every 0.3s, three times. This totals to 7.5% of your weapon's scaled over a 0.9 second period. Bleed deals typeless damage.
speed_demon.desc: Your attacks now inflict a reduced-strength bleed while you have a speed boost. 1s cooldown.

speed_emission.name: Speed Emission
speed_emission.desc: Gain a slight speed boost after landing a vent

spell_shout.name: Spell Shout
spell_shout.additional_info: The player will say the name of the Mantra they cast in a chat bubble. e.g. casting Fire Blade will make the player say "Fire Blade!" Renaming a Mantra will Spell Shout the new Mantra name.
spell_shout.desc: You will now shout your mantra name upon cast

spike_traps.name: Spike Traps
spike_traps.additional_info: Spikes activate upon being stepped on.
spike_traps.desc: Press F during the wind up of your Ice Spikes to create traps around you instead of spawning a spike in the normal spot.

spinal_shatter.name: Spinal Shatter
spinal_shatter.desc: Landing the Crescent Cleaver critical attack causes your opponent to be unable to sprint for 8 seconds. [10 second CD]

spinal_splinter.name: Spinal Splinter
spinal_splinter.additional_info: If your critical attack hits your opponent's back, it will gain an secondary damage instance that deals 25 true damage.
spinal_splinter.desc: Landing a backstab with your critical deals 15 extra true damage.

spine_cutter.name: Spine Cutter
spine_cutter.additional_info: The second slash has no PEN. Procs on certain physical Mantras and criticals with the M1 tag. Has a 5 second cooldown.
spine_cutter.desc: Hitting an enemy in the back after a roll cancel will initiate a second slash that deals your weapon's raw damage.

spinning_swordsman.name: Spinning Swordsman
spinning_swordsman.desc: Running attacks do +15% extra damage when you have a speed boost.

spotter.name: Spotter
spotter.additional_info: Using Callout while in Rhythm will showcase the health value of the target to your allies.
spotter.desc: Marking enemies while in Rhythm will now indicate their health status to your allies.

stack_the_deck.name: Stack the Deck
stack_the_deck.desc: Charmed enemies will grant you even more damage multipliers on your Taunt counter.

star_duster.name: Star Duster
star_duster.desc: You take 30% less damage from airborne enemies.

stasis_strike.name: Stasis Strike
stasis_strike.reqs: glass_path_crystallization => stasis_strike := 90r LHT OR 90r MED OR 90r HVY, 90s ICE
stasis_strike.additional_info: Stasis Strike increases the damage of your crystal explosions by 1.67x when your opponent is bottom frozen.
stasis_strike.desc: Your crystal explosions deal more damage whenever your opponent is also bottom frozen.

static_ace.name: Static Ace
static_ace.additional_info: Heavily reduces the windup of Lightning Stream.
static_ace.desc: Using Lightning Stream with an active tether link targets your closest active link.

static_allure.name: Static Allure
static_allure.additional_info: Instantly procs when you create a new Static Link. The extra Link duration only applies to the Static Link that procced the magnetization effect.
static_allure.desc: Having two active tethers will cause the previous tethered enemy to get magnetized to your newest tethered enemy, also increases the duration of tethers by 15 seconds.

static_beatdown.name: Static Beatdown
static_beatdown.additional_info: Shaky block duration scales on your Thundercall investment, increasing by +0.004s for every point in Thundercall.
static_beatdown.desc: The metal the cestus is made from allows electricity to be conducted easily through it, allowing you to further extend how long your opponents are stuck in shaky block based on your total Thundercall investment.

static_blade.name: Static Blade
static_blade.additional_info: Grants stacks when you '''get parried''', not when you parry attacks. Also grants stacks when you hit blocks or block attacks. Each stack lasts for 15 seconds and refresh upon gaining another, including when you're at max stacks. Each stack grants an ~2.35% speed boost, totaling to ~11.75% speed at max stacks.
static_blade.desc: Hitting blocks, blocking or parrying hits will now generate an electric charge in your blade, granting a small speed buff. Charges can stack up to 5 times.

static_fakeout.name: Static Fakeout
static_fakeout.desc: Roll cancelling immediately after a parry will cause you to teleport behind your opponent.

static_flash_clone.name: Static Flash Clone
static_flash_clone.desc: When using lightning clones you instead disappear leaving behind a static clone for a short duration.

static_link.name: Static Link
static_link.additional_info: Lasts 15 seconds. The links are non-refreshable, meaning you will need to wait until after the duration ends to reapply them.
static_link.desc: Flourishing or uppercutting an enemy creates a static link between you and your enemy.

stature_break.name: Stature Break
stature_break.additional_info: While their posture is paused, your opponent cannot restore posture by parrying, spitting, passive posture restoration, or through Steady Nerves. All other forms of posture restoration ignore this effect entirely.
stature_break.desc: Landing a backstab of any kind disables posture for 8 seconds.

stay_of_execution.name: Stay of Execution
stay_of_execution.desc: Increases the time taken to execute you by 20%. Saving others from being executed grants you both 10 TempHP (20s CD)

steady_footing.name: Steady Footing
steady_footing.additional_info: Knockback is reduced by 20%. Ice's slide distance effect is removed.
steady_footing.desc: You're much more resistant to being pushed around.

steady_mind.name: Steady Mind
steady_mind.additional_info: You can spend more time in the Depths before gaining Afflictions.
steady_mind.desc: Despite the finality of your mind and body succumbing to the effects of the depths, you manage to ward it off for a little longer.

steady_nerves.name: Steady Nerves
steady_nerves.additional_info: Restore 2 flat posture on a successful dodge.
steady_nerves.desc: You dance from toe to toe - successful dodges restore posture.

steampunk_soldier.name: Steampunk Soldier
steampunk_soldier.desc: Increase the size of your steam which you activate Flashboil. Flashboil's cooldown is also reduced.

steel_grip.name: Steel Grip
steel_grip.desc: When you are blockbroken, negate it and set your posture to 80%.

steel_scales.name: Steel Scales
steel_scales.additional_info: The 3% Slash Armor is multiplicative with other sources of Slash resistance.
steel_scales.desc: You take an additional 5% less damage when your armor is broken.

steel_tread.name: Steel Tread
steel_tread.desc: Gain a bit of knockback resistance as well as damage resistance against attacks that ragdoll you.

steelvessel.name: Steelvessel
steelvessel.additional_info: Take posture damage instead of health damage. Upon being guardbroken, take a large amount of damage to your healthbar. Your healing and posture restoration from parrying attacks is reduced.
steelvessel.desc: Landed attacks deal posture damage but when guard broken take massive damage. Posture gain on parry is reduced.

stifled_jump.name: Stifled Jump
stifled_jump.additional_info: The daze effect lasts for 1 second.
stifled_jump.desc: Suffocating now applies Dazed if enemies jump. Suffocated PvE enemies now also get Sluggish when they are suffocated.

stock_bash.name: Stock Bash
stock_bash.desc: [Rifles] Your running attacks now apply a brief amount of daze and Stagger PvE enemies.

storm_link.name: Storm Link
storm_link.additional_info: Adds a secondary instance of damage to your Galebreathe Mantras if they hit a Static Linked target. This deals 10% of your attack's scaled damage as Thundercall damage.
storm_link.desc: While you have a Static Link on someone, your Wind mantras that hit them are imbued with flashes of Lightning.

storm_return.name: Storm Return
storm_return.additional_info: Being under the effects of Amped or Lightning Cloak will proc this effect.
storm_return.desc: Being under lightning/wind status effect causes your Basic Attacks and Criticals to do 10% more damage. (Amplified with Lightning Cloak)

stormcall.name: Stormcall
stormcall.additional_info: Your Stormcall Shocks from other Specialist Equipment Talents apply the Stormcall Shock status effect. If your opponent attempts to cast a Mantra while affected, they will take 15 Galebreathe/Thundercall damage and they will gain the Shock and Winded status effect.
stormcall.desc: Anytime you land a storm strike apply stormcall shock on your opponent, damaging them if they try to use a mantra while its active.

stratos_step.name: Stratos Step
stratos_step.additional_info: Stratos Steps will only proc twice before going on a cooldown. Said cooldown applies to individual steps. Additionally, Stratos Step consumes Ether per step.
stratos_step.desc: Holding space while climbing will now let your perform Stratos Steps to get even higher.

stratoshock.name: Stratoshock
stratoshock.additional_info: All sources of Thundercall damage innately gains a 5% damage buff if it is raining. This Talent adds an additional 5%.
stratoshock.desc: Your lightning deals an additional +5% damage when in the rain.

strength_unbounded.name: Strength Unbounded
strength_unbounded.additional_info: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Strength Attribute. The stat requirements to obtain this Talent will be increased to 77 or 78 if your Aspect has increased Strength on spawn, though this limitation will be removed if you have the Multifaceted Echo Unlock. The quest requirement for this Talent will be removed if you've obtained it previously on your account.
strength_unbounded.desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Strength to its fullest.

string_trick.name: String Trick
string_trick.additional_info: Does not proc on non-humanoids. Deals a small amount of damage on proc.
string_trick.desc: Pulls together any two opponents you've attached Hidden Tendril to.

strong_hold.name: Strong Hold
strong_hold.desc: [Medium Weapons] When above half health and two-handing, posture damage taken is reduced by 5%.

strong_stern.name: Strong Stern
strong_stern.desc: The duration you are dazed from wall bangs is cut in half. Slightly reduce your guardbreak stun time from PvE enemies as well.

stronger_under_pressure.name: Stronger Under Pressure
stronger_under_pressure.additional_info: This applies a 5% slow per combat tag you have, lasting 1 second.
stronger_under_pressure.desc: Your mantras with might gem now slow down your opponents, scaling with how many combat tags you currently have.

subzero.name: Subzero
subzero.desc: Landing a running attack inflicts your opponent with a deep freeze. Additional light hits after the opponent thaws out will briefly slow them as well.

successive_prediction.name: Successive Prediction
successive_prediction.additional_info: Allows you to reflect the entirety of multi-hit moves.
successive_prediction.desc: Predicting an attack will briefly allow you to predict another.

successive_throw.name: Successive Throw
successive_throw.additional_info: There is a 1.5 second delay after your flourish before the dagger is thrown. This deals 5 Slash damage.
successive_throw.desc: [Dagger] When you successfully flourish an enemy, you throw out a dagger afterwards

suffocating_impact.name: Suffocating Impact
suffocating_impact.desc: When flourishing enemies into walls they are suffocated and winded for a short duration.

sulphur_surprise.name: Sulphur Surprise
sulphur_surprise.additional_info: Reduces the bomb throw cooldown from 5 seconds to 4 seconds. This only applies to the bomb thrown directly after this Talent procs, not on the bomb that procced this Talent. 20 second cooldown.
sulphur_surprise.desc: Your cooldown for throwing bombs will be shortened after your first bomb damages an enemy.

sunken_predator.name: Sunken Predator
sunken_predator.desc: Enemies you hit in the water or the depths have their speed buffs nullified and are slowed.

sunset_ricochet.name: Sunset Ricochet
sunset_ricochet.desc: Makes your bullets ricochet to a nearby enemy when hitting an opponent.

supernatural_sense.name: Supernatural Sense
supernatural_sense.desc: After dealing with literal ghosts, you feel emboldened.

surestep.name: Surestep
surestep.additional_info: Makes you immune to the ragdoll and movement speed debuff of the Wind from the Second Layer and Moon's Eyrie.
surestep.desc: Your boots secure your footing in all forms of terrain by digging into the ground with metal spikes.

surge_path_unstable_capacitor.name: Surge Path: Unstable Capacitor
surge_path_unstable_capacitor.additional_info: Turns your Thundercall abilities blurple. Shock is replaced with Surge Rods, a stacking status effect that Overloads upon applying five Rods and then landing an attack that would apply a sixth, consuming all of the Rods. Each Rod has an individual 30 second duration. Surge Overloads deal 2.5 Thundercall damage per Rod with 5 Thundercall scaling to Overloaded target, gaining 0.0125 damage per Thundercall investment, and 2 Thundercall damage per Rod in an AoE that does not hit the Overloaded target.
surge_path_unstable_capacitor.desc: Your lightning no longer applies Shock, instead apply Surge. At maximum stacks of Surge, your opponents will Overload, sending arcs of lightning in every direction.

survival_kit.name: Survival Kit
survival_kit.reqs: survival_kit := 20r CHA or 20r INT or 20r WLL
survival_kit.desc: You keep a well-stocked set of tools on your person at all times. Your flint never runs out of uses.

survivalist.name: Survivalist
survivalist.additional_info: Take less damage from Acid Rain.
survivalist.desc: Resist the effects of Weather Effects.

sweeping_edge.name: Sweeping Edge
sweeping_edge.desc: Your Master's Flourish is larger and can now proc flourish talents.

sweeten_the_deal.name: Sweeten the Deal
sweeten_the_deal.desc: Madness can now be applied to enemies at 80% health or lower.

swift_blade.name: Swift Blade
swift_blade.desc: Proccing Wind Gem now gives you 10% more light attack posture during its duration. Extend the duration of Wind Gems by 2 seconds.

swift_rebound.name: Swift Rebound
swift_rebound.desc: Move faster after successfully dodging an attack.

swift_strike.name: Swift Strike
swift_strike.additional_info: On proc, you gain the Swift Strike status effect indefinitely. This effect will be consumed when you use your critical. The teleport has a range limit. 20 second cooldown.
swift_strike.desc: Land a light attack behind your opponent to enhance your next critical, allowing you to teleport behind your opponent and strike them. This enhanced critical also procs assassination talents.

swiftfoot.name: Swiftfoot
swiftfoot.desc: Reduce all slows you receive by 10%.

swiftkick_master.name: Swiftkick Master
swiftkick_master.desc: Proccing Swiftkick Prodigy now extends its duration to 15 seconds.

swiftkick_prodigy.name: Swiftkick Prodigy
swiftkick_prodigy.additional_info: Your third M1 will grant a speed boost for a short duration.
swiftkick_prodigy.desc: Hitting successive Basic Attacks with Jus Karita will give a temporary speed buff.

switchblade.name: Switchblade
switchblade.additional_info: This also allows other light weapons to use Dagger Talents.
switchblade.desc: You can now utilize Dagger Talents when not wielding a dagger.

symbiotic_link.name: Symbiotic Link
symbiotic_link.additional_info: Blue Cords (Allies) gain a speed boost, 20% damage resistance, and a 5% damage increase. Red Cords (Enemies) gain a minor speed debuff. Allows you to passively see the health bars of your allies.
symbiotic_link.desc: Activate by pressing X while hovering over an ally or enemy. The Links are destroyed when you receive damage from a non-ally, you stray too far or you activate it again. Only one cord of each type may exist at once, links give a 3 second warning in break range, in the warning phase, they can't be broken.

tacet_minimization.name: Tacet Minimization
tacet_minimization.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that massively reduces the size of your Tacet bubble on use.
tacet_minimization.desc: Focus your Tacet even further, allowing the radius at which you get spotted to become smaller temporarily.

tactical_reload.name: Tactical Reload
tactical_reload.additional_info: Upon activating the Talent tool, your rifle will gain the ability to fire Bullets for 15 seconds. 90 second cooldown. Does not work on Rifle Spear.
tactical_reload.desc: [Rifles] Activate to make your rifle shoot bullets for 15 seconds.

tailor_made.name: Tailor Made
tailor_made.desc: These were specifically made for your kind. Etris Flasks now heal you 45% more than usual.

tainted_ground.name: Tainted Ground
tainted_ground.desc: Enemies who stand in blood pools will not decay blood poison and gain 15% more blood poisoning.

tap_dancer.name: Tap Dancer
tap_dancer.additional_info: Negate the extra half a second cooldown added to the roll following a roll-cancel.
tap_dancer.desc: Dodging immediately after a roll-cancel no longer puts your Dodge on a longer cooldown.

target_focus.name: Target Focus
target_focus.desc: Enemies you charm take more damage from your squadmates in your party.

target_switch.name: Target Switch
target_switch.additional_info: This effect is signalled by a yellow halo. Has a 4 second activation window with a 10 second duration.
target_switch.desc: Parrying an opponent then hitting someone else makes your next mantra free.

taste_the_rainbow.name: Taste The Rainbow
taste_the_rainbow.desc: Every time you shoot, switch your ammo type. [Dual Guns]

teachings_of_the_edenkite.name: Teachings of the Edenkite
teachings_of_the_edenkite.additional_info: Allows you to meditate, emitting a white aura and causing two white orbs to circle your head. Very heavily reduces your hunger and thirst consumption while you passively gain EXP and Attribute EXP and regenerate health at a mediocre rate, which is slightly reduced when in combat.

temperature_shock.name: Temperature Shock
temperature_shock.desc: Your fire mantras now detonate any stacked crystals.

tempest_evolution.name: Tempest Evolution
tempest_evolution.additional_info: Increases the slide jump variant of Wind Blade's damage by 20%. Additionally grants a 20% damage buff while you are airborne after landing the slide jump Wind Blade.
tempest_evolution.desc: Your slide-jumped Wind Blades are naturally stronger and if landed grant +20% damage in the air for a few seconds.

temple_guard.name: Temple Guard
temple_guard.additional_info: You will only gain the damage reduction if your critical attack gets interrupted.
temple_guard.desc: For the first 0.3s of your Critical Attack's windup, you take 90% less damage from any attacks that cancel your windup.

tempo_sap.name: Tempo Sap
tempo_sap.desc: Activate to make your dagger's light attacks steal tempo per hit for 20 seconds. [Dagger]

tenacity.name: Tenacity
tenacity.desc: Greatly shorten the amount of time you are guardbroken for.

termite.name: Termite
termite.additional_info: Allows user to eat Sticks, Bamboo, Beeswax, Coral, Spider Eggs, all Lotuses, and every Ore.
termite.desc: You can eat things most would consider inedible.

terrapod_tracer.name: Terrapod Tracer
terrapod_tracer.desc: Deal 0.5% of your opponent's health to opponents who heal off of you.
terrapod_tracer.additional_info: This only works while your opponent has Anti-Heal.

terrifying_paralysis.name: Terrifying Paralysis
terrifying_paralysis.desc: Your Hidden Blade disables opponents' ability to roll for 3 seconds.

the_eleventh_hour.name: The Eleventh Hour
the_eleventh_hour.additional_info: Lasts 30 seconds with a 90 second cooldown.
the_eleventh_hour.desc: When below 15% health your mantras require no ether to cast for 11 seconds.

the_final_act.name: The Final Act
the_final_act.desc: Landing a fire mantra immediately after flourishing an opponent will cause them to explode.

the_floor_is_lava.name: The Floor is Lava
the_floor_is_lava.additional_info: The duration and damage of the lava pools scale on your Flamecharm investment.
the_floor_is_lava.desc: Your Eruptions leave lethal pools of lava beneath them. Don't fall in.

the_path_unveiled.name: The Path, Unveiled
the_path_unveiled.additional_info: Increases Jus Karita damage by 10%, despite what the Talent description states.
the_path_unveiled.desc: Your Jus Karita attacks deal 15% more damage.

the_rich_get_richer.name: The Rich Get Richer
the_rich_get_richer.desc: Gain 15% more notes whenever you sell something.

thornmail.name: Thornmail
thornmail.desc: Getting flourished applies a metal rod on your attacker.

threefold_impact.name: Threefold Impact
threefold_impact.additional_info: Grants buffs to your Strong Left based on how many Calamity Punch stacks you have. At one stack, your Strong Left cooldown will be reduced. At two stacks, your Strong Left will additionally deal typeless damage. At three stacks, your Strong Left will also guard break and deal more damage.
threefold_impact.desc: Every stack built with Strong Left provides a buff. 1st successful attack will reduces cooldown, 2nd ignores armor, and 3rd increases damage & guardbreaks.

thresher_claws.name: Thresher Claws
thresher_claws.desc: All of your attacks have +5% more PEN. Your Basic Attacks and Criticals have an additional +5% PEN on top.

thresher_thrasher.name: Thresher Thrasher
thresher_thrasher.desc: Adapt to the ways of the thresher, increasing how long you are able to stay underground with Beast Burrow by 30%, and reducing its cooldown by 25%.

thundercall_unbounded.name: Thundercall Unbounded
thundercall_unbounded.additional_info: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Thundercall Attribute. This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.
thundercall_unbounded.desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Thundercall to its fullest.

thundercaller.name: Thundercaller
thundercaller.desc: Grants you the ability to command Lightning as a Thundercaller.

tidal_shock.name: Tidal Shock
tidal_shock.additional_info: Your Critical attacks will apply Daze on hit. For the next 4 seconds after landing your Critical attack, if you were to be hit by any Mantra, you'll automatically dodge the Mantra instead, voiding its damage. This can be used to void self damaging Mantras. 13 second cooldown.
tidal_shock.desc: Landing a successful Critical Attack will temporarily put you in a state where you dodge all mantras, as well as dazing your opponent.

tidekeeper.name: Tidekeeper
tidekeeper.desc: Losing 25% of your health within the span of 3 seconds grants a 15% damage buff, 20% defense buff, and prevents from being knocked for 10 seconds.

time_to_go.name: Time To Go
time_to_go.desc: Taking a life grants a speed boost for 10 seconds. Taking a player's life doubles the speed boost and the duration.

to_the_finish.name: To the Finish
to_the_finish.additional_info: For every point of Fortitude below 50, To the Finish loses 0.166% damage reduction, having a minimum value of 5.833% damage reduction at 25 Fortitude.
to_the_finish.desc: You take 10% less damage when below 30% health.

torture_mastery.name: Torture Mastery
torture_mastery.reqs: torture_mastery := 100s BLD, 100r LHT OR 100r MED OR 100r HVY
torture_mastery.additional_info: On proc, all chip damage you deal will be converted into healing. The conversion rate is 1:1.
torture_mastery.desc: Landing a critical on opponents applies 15 seconds of Torture Mastery. Heal any chip damage off players who have Torture Mastery on them. This duration is doubled if you have Rush Hour on.

total_silence.name: Total Silence
total_silence.desc: Massively reduce the sound of your footsteps and rolls.

tough_love.name: Tough Love
tough_love.additional_info: Charms for 2 seconds with a 1 second cooldown. Tough Love's damage buff affects all sources of Charm, not just Tough Love's. Tough Love's damage buff is affected by the damage modifier cap.
tough_love.desc: Deal 10% more damage to enemies Charmed by you. Mantras deal +5% instead. Being hit by someone the same Aspect or Oath as you applies Charmed briefly.

traditional_execution.name: Traditional Execution
traditional_execution.desc: Flourishing an opponent turns your next critical attack into the Katana critical attack. Also extends Dancing Steps Of War's effects by 0.5 seconds.

training_wheels.name: Training Wheels
training_wheels.desc: Increase the amount of parry frames you have by 20%.

treefelling_blow.name: Treefelling Blow
treefelling_blow.additional_info: Allows you to gain Wood when you destroy trees with Strong Left.
treefelling_blow.desc: You can collect lumber from the trees you fell with your fists. It's only natural.

true_drifter.name: True Drifter
true_drifter.additional_info: Anytime you would have gained 1 Cutting Pace stack, gain 2 instead. You can now consume Cutting Pace stacks to use Blinkstep without being at 90% or more Ether.
true_drifter.desc: You are a true drifter. Gain double the 'Cutting Pace' stacks and consume stacks to Blinkstep below 90% ether.

true_ether_bullets.name: True Ether Bullets
true_ether_bullets.reqs: true_ether_bullets := 20r LHT OR 20r MED OR 20r HVY, 30s INT
true_ether_bullets.additional_info: Landing 2 shots will make the 3rd shot deal elemental damage and apply the status effect correlating to your highest attunement. This Talent will not do anything if you do not have an attunement.
true_ether_bullets.desc: Using Ether Bullets applies elemental damage of your highest investment.

true_mirage_clone.name: True Mirage Clone
true_mirage_clone.desc: Successfully dodging leaves behind a heat mirage clone that sets enemies that swung at you on fire.

true_seraph_slash.name: True Seraph Slash
true_seraph_slash.additional_info: This deals 0.5x of your weapons scaled damage as typeless damage. Hits four times.
true_seraph_slash.desc: Landing the first hit of your critical attack enhances your next critical, giving you access to the Angels' spear smite ability.

true_shatter.name: True Shatter
true_shatter.additional_info: Deals 5 true damage per slow debuff.
true_shatter.desc: Landing a critical shatters your opponent, ridding them of their speed debuffs and dealing true damage scaling off how slow they were.

true_skulk.name: True Skulk
true_skulk.desc: Massively reduce the sounds of your mantra casts.

true_vantage.name: True Vantage
true_vantage.additional_info: Changes your Vent color to match the color of your Silentheart Tattoos.
true_vantage.desc: Successfully landing a Vent briefly gives you invisibility, along with giving a speed boost.

turning_of_the_wheel.name: Turning of the Wheel
turning_of_the_wheel.additional_info: Using an M1 after dodging a weapon attack will cause you to step back and then advance with faster swing speed.
turning_of_the_wheel.desc: After perfect dodging a swing or critical attack, step backwards and ramp up your swingspeed.

turtle_shell.name: Turtle Shell
turtle_shell.additional_info: If you have a shield equipped and your main weapon two-handed, your shield will be put on your back. This grants 12.5% damage reduction against attacks that hit your back and prevents your opponent from proccing Spine Cutter.
turtle_shell.desc: If your shield is on your back, take reduced backstab damage and negate Spine Cutter.

twelve_steps_ahead.name: Twelve Steps Ahead
twelve_steps_ahead.additional_info: This effect requires your opponent to be within 90 studs of you. For every point of Intelligence below 80, Prediction's maximum cooldown will be increased by 0.125 seconds, capping at 33.13 seconds with 55 Intelligence.
twelve_steps_ahead.desc: Landing Prediction will halve the cooldown to a minimum of 2s. Whiffing will double the cooldown to a maximum of 30s. This effect stacks for up to 30 seconds.

twin_drift.name: Twin Drift
twin_drift.additional_info: Performing a basic attack after a roll cancel will perform a second slash, then two light purple clones of yourself will attack the target.
twin_drift.desc: Hitting an enemy in the back after a roll cancel will bring upon twins who will follow up your assault.

two_left_feet.name: Two Left Feet
two_left_feet.desc: Posture breaking an opponent grants you +50% PEN for 3 seconds.

ultrakill.name: Ultrakill
ultrakill.desc: [1H Guns] When under the effects of Rapid Fire you reload 2X as fast.

umami.name: Umami
umami.additional_info: Has a 35% chance to proc with a 3 cooldown per proc attempt, going on cooldown even if it fails to proc. The hunger and thirst steal are NOT affected by damage modifiers or resistances, rather exclusively being based on scaled damage dealt. Procs on: The Long Tong of The Law, The Flippers of Fate, The Pastry Paster, and Fondant Splitter.
umami.desc: Feast on foes with mighty cutlery. Chef Weapons now steal opponents hunger.

unbreakable.name: Unbreakable
unbreakable.additional_info: Reduces the stun duration from being guardbroken from 1.05s to 0.7s.
unbreakable.desc: You have reduced stun duration when block broken.

under_the_radar.name: Under The Radar
under_the_radar.desc: The negative reputation threshold for a faction to put out posters of you is now higher.

underdog.name: Underdog
underdog.additional_info: Underdog grants a 2.5% damage buff at 20 Willpower, this is increased by 0.0375% damage per Willpower above 20, capping at 4% with 60 Willpower. Grants a 2.875% damage buff at requirements. "Higher HP" refers to current HP.
underdog.desc: You deal 2.5% more damage to those with higher HP than you, scaling up to 4% at 60 WLL. Additionally, you deal +10% more damage to physically larger foes.

undying_flame.name: Undying Flame
undying_flame.additional_info: Graceful Flame can be casted in the First Layer. It cannot be used in the Diluvian Mechanism or Depths Trials, however. Graceful Flame passively restores sanity and health to those around it.
undying_flame.desc: Your Graceful Flame burns brightly even underwater. Those that gather around it are soothed and regain sanity.

unfazed.name: Unfazed
unfazed.additional_info: You now shiver at tier 2 Insanity instead of Tier 1. You now scratch yourself at tier 3 Insanity instead of tier 2. You can no longer Panic.
unfazed.desc: You are more resilient to the side effects of going insane. You no longer Shiver and you Panic with less severity.

union_card.name: Union Card
union_card.additional_info: Gain increased EXP gain from Jobs and Dungeons, but reduced EXP gain from any other content.
union_card.desc: A card representing your membership in the Ignition Union. Entitles you to speedier experience gain from Dungeons and Jobs, though the fees will slightly reduce your experience gain outside of these.

union_hook.name: Union Hook
union_hook.desc: You can now make use of the Ignition Union hooks to ascend or descend.

union_pager.name: Union Pager
union_pager.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that acts as a remote-access Job Board, allowing you to pick up jobs from any location.
union_pager.desc: Check up on job listings remotely.

unmatched_dexterity.name: Unmatched Dexterity
unmatched_dexterity.additional_info: You can now swap weapons and equipment while in combat. Pressing [X] will swap your current weapon with a random weapon in your hotbar.
unmatched_dexterity.desc: Press [X] to Quick Swap between weapons within your toolbar.

unmended_eye.name: Unmended Eye
unmended_eye.desc: All mantras you land now apply anti heal.

unnecessary_theatrics.name: Unnecessary Theatrics
unnecessary_theatrics.additional_info: The charm proc has no cooldown, but the one-liners do. Instantly reapplies Charm after Manipulator removes it, on the same hit.
unnecessary_theatrics.desc: Deliver a one-liner on uppercuts, flourishes and critical attacks that charms your opponents briefly.

unseen_threat.name: Unseen Threat
unseen_threat.desc: You can assassinate those with weapons out provided you're not in combat yourself. Those you assassinate are slowed and unable to jump for 3s.

unstoppable_force.name: Unstoppable Force
unstoppable_force.desc: [Greathammer] You take 15% less posture damage when parried.

unswayed.name: Unswayed
unswayed.additional_info: The Taunt Mantra and Cornered Fool no longer work on you. Sing will still Charm you.
unswayed.desc: The effects of Taunt and Encore no longer work on you.

until_it_is_done.name: Until It Is Done
until_it_is_done.additional_info: Your Berserk has an indefinite duration, ending only when you use the tool again.
until_it_is_done.desc: Your Berserk State lasts until you willingly end it.

untouchable.name: Untouchable
untouchable.additional_info: Grants True Strength for 15 seconds on proc. Untouchable requires 10 'Untouchable Stacks'. Being hit by any non-self damage source will reset all Untouchable Stacks. Weapon attacks give 2 stacks each, and non-weapon attacks give 1 stack each.
untouchable.desc: By landing consecutive hits on your opponent without taking any damage, reveal your True Strength for a short duration.

unwavering_focus.name: Unwavering Focus
unwavering_focus.additional_info: Grants 0.3% posture resistance per point in Intelligence, capping at +21% at 70 Intelligence.
unwavering_focus.desc: When your mantras are parried, receive less posture (scales with intelligence).

unwavering_resolve.name: Unwavering Resolve
unwavering_resolve.additional_info: The posture reduction effect is reduced by 0.433% for every point in Strength below 40, having a minimum value of 22% posture reduction from being parried at 15 Strength.
unwavering_resolve.desc: Getting parried punishes your posture 33% less.

unyielding_frost.name: Unyielding Frost
unyielding_frost.additional_info: If you have less than 100 Frostdraw, your Chill duration (when applied through block) will be reduced down to 25% of its original duration instead.
unyielding_frost.desc: Your Chill can proc through block, with blocked Chilling proc lasting 80% of the duration.

unyielding_inferno.name: Unyielding Inferno
unyielding_inferno.additional_info: Negates the innate 10% damage debuff Flamecharm Mantras, First Light's critical, and Twisted Puppets' Puppets receive during the rain. Prevents your burn from being extinguished by the rain.
unyielding_inferno.desc: Your flames burn just as strong even in the fiercest of storms.

vacuum_punch.name: Vacuum Punch
vacuum_punch.additional_info: Gale Punch Mantra will now pull players towards the user during the windup of the Mantra. Increases Gale Punch's windup by 0.1s.
vacuum_punch.desc: Your Gale Punch pulls enemies in before you hit them.

vanguard_style.name: Vanguard Style
vanguard_style.additional_info: This new critical attack has 20 base damage, and adopts your current weapon's scaling stat.
vanguard_style.desc: When using the Jus Karita critical attack, turn it into a kick that brings your enemies up in the air. Landing the critical attack while your opponent is in the air brings them up and slightly stun them while upgrading your next critical.

vanguards_onslaught.name: Vanguard's Onslaught
vanguards_onslaught.desc: Landing a Vanguard Style Jus Karita critical attack makes you deal 20% more damage in the air for the next 5 seconds.

vanishing_wraith.name: Vanishing Wraith
vanishing_wraith.desc: Your 'Aerial Attacks' while in Phantom Step will now teleport you behind your target.

vasculitis.name: Vasculitis
vasculitis.additional_info: On proc, your opponent will be unable to use their Deep Gems for 8 seconds. Gem Enhancement increases the effectiveness of your Deep Gems in PvE.
vasculitis.desc: Hitting your opponent while they have over 20% blood poisoning disables their deep gems for a brief duration while giving you Gem Enhancement against PvE temporarily.

vengeful_pursuit.name: Vengeful Pursuit
vengeful_pursuit.additional_info: Base damage and scaling differ depending on weapon type. 8 second cooldown.
vengeful_pursuit.desc: Your running attacks that don't hit send out a special mid-range crescent projectile that slows on hit. Tracks onto those with their backs turned to you.

versatile.name: Versatile
versatile.additional_info: Reduces the attribute requirements of all equipment and weapon items by 3. This is applied to each requirement individually, meaning you can save upwards of 12 points.
versatile.desc: You learn how to use new pieces of equipment quicker than others. You can equip things at 3 points lower than the requirement.

verses_of_harmony.name: Verses of Harmony
verses_of_harmony.additional_info:
Gain access to the following Talents while in the respective Saint Stance. Upon swapping out of the Saint Stance, all granted Talents will be lost. Some of these Talents have an additional level requirement.
Flamecharm: Dancing Steps, Immolation, Agitating Spark
Frostdraw: Condensation Drip, Saint Jay, Frozen Legs, Fragile Freeze, Chilling Flourish
Galebreathe: Pressure Break, Wind Step, Air Pressure, Cyclone Blade, Inhale, A World Without Song
Shadowcast: Dark Rift, Lasting Sorrow, Dark God, Dark Hours, Shadow Overflow, Singularity
Thundercall: Static Fakeout, Stratoshock, Resolve Crusher, Static Blade, Gathering Electricity
verses_of_harmony.desc: Each elemental stance grants access to select talents from the corresponding attunement.

vessels_gamble.name: Vessel's Gamble
vessels_gamble.additional_info: Though this Talent is actively detrimental to the user, the Corrupted Vessel's Boots +20 Posture offsets the downside.
vessels_gamble.desc: When you get guardbroken you take 3 times the damage of the attack.

vigils_grace.name: Vigil's Grace
vigils_grace.additional_info: Stacks additively with Action Surge. Both this and Action Surge are applied before Lightning Cloak's swing speed multiplier.
vigils_grace.desc: Whenever you gain a speed boost, increase your swingspeed by 0.02.

vital_wound.name: Vital Wound
vital_wound.additional_info: Uppercutting your opponent applies the Vital Wound status effect, reducing their passive posture recovery by 40% for 30 seconds. This has no cooldown, but it cannot be refreshed or reapplied while it's active.
vital_wound.desc: Uppercutting your opponent punctures their lungs, slowing their rate of posture recovery for 30 seconds.

voice_of_the_mad_god.name: Voice of the Mad God
voice_of_the_mad_god.desc: Any time you apply charm it now applies "Madness" to enemies directly.

void_glutton.name: Void Glutton
void_glutton.additional_info: Gives 2 maximum health when you kill a player. You will also be slowed, with the slow being based on how much maximum health you've siphoned.
void_glutton.desc: Siphon some of your enemies ether when you kill them. This gets added onto your health permanently, however you are now slowed at all times. This slow increases the more health you have siphoned.

voideye.name: Voideye
voideye.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that teleports you back to the Voidheart on use. 1 minute cooldown.
voideye.desc: Voidmother's blessing, the method to travel back to the Voidheart.

voidwalker_contract.name: Voidwalker Contract
voidwalker_contract.additional_info: Gain increased EXP from bounties of all kinds, but gain reduced EXP from all other sources.
voidwalker_contract.desc: You progress much faster from completing bounties, and less from events. Gain access to the Voidheart, and factions have a negative outlook on you.

volcanic_glass.name: Volcanic Glass
volcanic_glass.desc: Detonating crystals causes an eruption soon after.

volt_draft.name: Volt Draft
volt_draft.additional_info: This has a proc window of 5 seconds after using Inhale. Storm Strikes from this Talent deal 0.125 * (Thundercall + Galebreathe investment) Thundercall damage, capping at 25 damage with 100 points invested in both Attunements. Can proc Grounding Bolt.
volt_draft.desc: Using Inhale will now also make your Basic Attacks apply a storm strike. [20 second CD]

volt_reflex.name: Volt Reflex
volt_reflex.additional_info: Increases the dodge window based on your Thundercall investment. Increases your dodge cooldown (for both dodge types) to 2.4 seconds.
volt_reflex.desc: Your dodge window is increased with the power of lightning, but also increase the cooldown of your dodges.

voltaic_conductor.name: Voltaic Conductor
voltaic_conductor.desc: Your Thundercall Mantras deal 30% chip damage against enemies with conductor rods.

vow_of_mastery.name: Vow of Mastery
vow_of_mastery.additional_info: Players who take the vow are considered allies with their master and others who take the vow. Commands Given: "Sleep", "Drop", "Run", "Eat", "Say (Text)", "Use", "Locate", and "Leech" at base. "Fight" and "Sacrifice" at 50 Charisma, "Return" at 60 Charisma, and "Explode" at 75 Charisma.
vow_of_mastery.desc: The Vow of Mastery grants the Master the power to command their Subject. To initiate a vow you must ask the other player if they'd like to make the vow. e.g. "wanna make a vow of mastery?"

warding_radiance.name: Warding Radiance
warding_radiance.additional_info: Allows you to proc Hell's Partisan on Flamecharm Mantras that aren't Fire Forge while you have the halo active. Lasts 60 seconds, but cannot be refreshed.
warding_radiance.desc: Every fire mantra builds up one halo stack. At 3 stacks a halo appears that allows you to slide further. Hell's Partisan is also triggered passively while this is active.

warriors_swing.name: Warrior's Swing
warriors_swing.desc: [Heavy Weapons] Reduces incoming damage by 20% if hit during Heavy swing hyperarmor.

water_off_a_ducks_back.name: Water off a Duck's Back
water_off_a_ducks_back.additional_info: Transfers Suffocation, Winded, Chill, Shock, Burn, and potion effects from yourself to your enemy on vent.
water_off_a_ducks_back.desc: Venting will shift any elemental status effects affecting you onto those hit by your vent.

way_of_navae.name: Way of Navae
way_of_navae.additional_info: Allows you to use the Way of Navae fist style.
way_of_navae.desc: Gain the ability to use fist combat against weapons. Including the ability to block weapons with your hands using Ether.

way_of_the_wind.name: Way of the Wind
way_of_the_wind.additional_info: On proc, a wind of gale will erupt from your legs, signifying that the effect is active.
way_of_the_wind.desc: Being in the air briefly increases the speed of your mantra casts. This effect only lasts while you're in the air.

weakening_venom.name: Weakening Venom
weakening_venom.desc: Assassinating an opponent decreases the damage they deal by 25% for the next 30 seconds.

weapons_training.name: Weapon's Training
weapons_training.desc: Training with different weapons taught you how to wield all of them more proficiently. Gain slightly extra weapon scaling on all weapons you use.

weather_resistant.name: Weather Resistant
weather_resistant.desc: Take 30% less damage when under less than ideal weather conditions.

whistleguard.name: Whistleguard
whistleguard.additional_info: The wind shield grants one (1) autoparry frame and has a cooldown of 10 seconds. The shield will be dispelled early if you get hit (proccing the shield), cast a Mantra, feint an attack, or use a critical attack.
whistleguard.desc: The favor of the winds is yours: landing three hits (five for light weapons) without taking damage against your opponent envelops you in a shield of wind.

wild_alchemy.name: Wild Alchemy
wild_alchemy.desc: You have a chance to brew 2 potions instead of 1.

will_o_wisp.name: Will o' Wisp
will_o_wisp.reqs: will_o_wisp := 25r ICE OR 25r FLM OR 25r WND OR 25r SDW OR 25r LTN OR 25r MTL OR 25r BLD
will_o_wisp.additional_info: Allows the player to have multiple Wisp Mantras active at once.
will_o_wisp.desc: Your mastery over the Wisps of the Song enables you to mediate the innate conflicts between your wisps, allowing any number of Wisps to be active at a time.

willpower_unbounded.name: Willpower Unbounded
willpower_unbounded.additional_info: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Willpower Attribute. The stat requirements to obtain this Talent will be increased to 77 or 78 if your Aspect has increased Willpower on spawn, though this limitation will be removed if you have the Multifaceted Echo Unlock. The quest requirement for this Talent will be removed if you've obtained it previously on your account.
willpower_unbounded.desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your willpower to its fullest.

wind_dancer.name: Wind Dancer
wind_dancer.additional_info: Grants a 10% speed boost for 8 seconds. 10 second cooldown.
wind_dancer.desc: Roll cancelling twice in quick succession will grant you a speed boost. One of your rolls must dodge a hit.

wind_step.name: Wind Step
wind_step.additional_info: Jump while airborne to double jump, leaving behind a wind pad that other players can also use. Alternatively, jumping while sliding down a slope will perform a Gale Leap that propels you forwards. While in combat, this ability cost Ether to use.
wind_step.desc: Create a step of wind below you when jumping in the air. Jumping while sliding down a slope or off a cliff launches you forwards.

windup_battery.name: Windup Battery
windup_battery.additional_info: Applies this bonus to non-Thundercall Mantras.
windup_battery.desc: Landing 3 Thundercall Mantras without whiffing reduces the windup of your next Mantra by 10%.

windwaker.name: Windwaker
windwaker.additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that can only be used while on a boat and out of combat. On use, the boat will gain a very large amount of additional speed for a short duration.
windwaker.desc: Call upon a gust of wind to propel your boat even faster.

winters_protection.name: Winter's Protection
winters_protection.additional_info: Increases the time it takes for the Second Layer's parasites to kill you. Negates weather-reliant damage buffs such as Frostdraw's increased damage when its snowing or Thundercall's increased damage when it's raining.
winters_protection.desc: Your tightly-bound winter gear negates elemental damage buffs from weather on damage against you. Also seems to provide some resistance to the Gale.

wisp_convergence.name: Wisp Convergence
wisp_convergence.additional_info: While Chorus of Souls is active, your weapon attacks will apply Burn, Chill, Shock, Winded, Shadow, Metal Rods, and Blood Poison. This Talent will not activate unless you have every Attunement's Wisp Mantra equipped and active. If one of your Wisps runs out, this Talent will deactivate until you recast the Wisp. This Talent will not work if you no longer have the Oathless Oath.
wisp_convergence.desc: When empowered by the Chorus, your Wisps now grant their elements to your strikes.

withering_soul.name: Withering Soul
withering_soul.additional_info: The Wither applied is based off your weapon's scaled damage.
withering_soul.desc: Your Basic Attacks proc 12.5% of their damage as Wither. Wielding the Deepspindle or Umbrite Witherblade will double the amount to 25%.

woodland_terrain.name: Woodland Terrain
woodland_terrain.desc: You move slightly faster on grass.

wormwarder.name: Wormwarder
wormwarder.additional_info: Makes you entirely immune to the Second Layer's Parasites, but at a cost of granting you a mobility debuff.
wormwarder.desc: Your lantern generates a shroud of static electricity around you that the flesh-burrowing parasites of the Eternal Gale detest. It's not exactly the lightest thing to lug around, though.

worshippers_tolerance.name: Worshipper's Tolerance
worshippers_tolerance.desc: Reduce the burn damage you take by 15%. While on fire, parrying an opponent's attack now sets them on fire [45 second CD].

wraith_path_twisted_puppets.name: Wraith Path: Twisted Puppets
wraith_path_twisted_puppets.additional_info: Your Flamecharm abilities and status effects are now black. Your regular burn is now much weaker, dealing 87.5% less damage, but it now spawns Puppets on a 4 second cooldown. Your Shadowcast abilities can now apply burn that deals 75% less damage than default burn. Both of these burn types drain 6.25 Ether from affected targets per tick. Puppets deal 20 Typeless damage and 10 posture damage. Increases the uptime of your Flame of Denial by 25%.
wraith_path_twisted_puppets.desc: Your Flamecharm mantras summon puppets of shadow and flame. Your flames are now black.

wyverns_claw.name: Wyvern's Claw
wyverns_claw.reqs: wyverns_claw := 25r LHT OR 25r MED OR 25r HVY, 15s STR
wyverns_claw.additional_info: Activates after not being in contact with a grounded surface for ~0.75 seconds.
wyverns_claw.desc: You deal 10% more damage while airborne. Mantras receive a 5% damage increase instead.

youll_need_to_get_past_me.name: You'll Need To Get Past Me
youll_need_to_get_past_me.additional_info: Spawns in an allied NPC to attack whoever hits you. This Talent can only proc if you are not in combat. The cooldown of this Talent scales on your Charisma investment, having a base cooldown of 69.286 seconds with each investment point into Charisma decreasing this by 0.143 seconds. At requirements, this Talent will have a 59 second cooldown, has a maximum cooldown of 62 seconds at 50 Charisma, and a minimum cooldown of 55 seconds at 100 Charisma.
youll_need_to_get_past_me.desc: When you're attacked, one of your many allies will leap into action to protect their boss.

adretian_aegis.name: Adretian Aegis
adretian_aegis.desc: A sturdy shield, traditionally crafted to suit the rank of it's holder.

adretian_axe.name: Adretian Axe
adretian_axe.desc: A bound axe in the typical Adretian fashion.

alloyed_adretian_axe.name: Alloyed Adretian Axe
alloyed_adretian_axe.desc: A bound axe in the typical Adretian fashion.

alloyed_canorian_axe.name: Alloyed Canorian Axe
alloyed_canorian_axe.desc: An axe much like the ones once wielded by the Canor Swornfangs, loyal protectors of the early Adretian Empire.

alloyed_cavalry_saber.name: Alloyed Cavalry Saber
alloyed_cavalry_saber.desc: To those of the current world, the notion of cavalry is farfetched. Still, the cavalry saber lives on as an effective blade for raiding.

alloyed_crescent_cleaver.name: Alloyed Crescent Cleaver
alloyed_crescent_cleaver.desc: Greatblades like these are often used by monster hunters, the serrated blade ensuring that even if their quarry flees, they need only follow the blood.

alloyed_dawnshot.name: Alloyed Dawnshot
alloyed_dawnshot.desc: With an almost flawless silver sheen that prevents corrosion from saltwater, the Dawnshot was purpose-built by Rosen for his lengthy travels at sea. Its short range is compensated for by the almost wrist-snapping kickback of four barrels. Although, with the Summer Company Cannon making most naval investments in their territories obsolete, this weapon has fallen out of production

alloyed_falchion.name: Alloyed Falchion
alloyed_falchion.desc: A single-edged sabre often wielded by conscripted Authority militiamen due to its relative ease of production.

alloyed_forge_greathammer.name: Alloyed Forge Greathammer
alloyed_forge_greathammer.desc: It is said that blacksmiths always keep one of these handy should someone ever stiff them on the bill.

alloyed_halberd.name: Alloyed Halberd
alloyed_halberd.desc: A standard issue halberd of the Authority, often seen in larger skirmishes.

alloyed_inheritor.name: Alloyed Inheritor
alloyed_inheritor.desc: The Blade Scholars of Markor, said to catalog the world itself, travel from land to land collecting information by force of their blades. Mastering the styles of combat from various stretches of the sea, they practice their art through the blade itself.

alloyed_katana.name: Alloyed Katana
alloyed_katana.desc: An exquisite blade of Etrean make, it's said to have put the early Kingdom of Etrea's name on the map.

alloyed_longspear.name: Alloyed Longspear
alloyed_longspear.desc: Beyond the safety of walls, these long spears are used by the Children of Navae to defend themselves out in the wilderness.

alloyed_messer.name: Alloyed Messer
alloyed_messer.desc: Considered by many to be an overgrown kitchen knife, the Messer is a favourite of rangers and beast hunters the world over.

alloyed_officer_saber.name: Alloyed Officer Saber
alloyed_officer_saber.desc: The characteristic saber of an Authority Officer. Typically used in Authority raids on disputed territories.

alloyed_scalesplitter.name: Alloyed Scalesplitter
alloyed_scalesplitter.desc: An ancient Etrean twinblade, recently repurposed and refurbished with alloys of the contemporary world, taken from the void's grasp and returned to life. Now this weapon, once worn by time and war, has been sharpened and restored, given another chance to taste glory once more. With its renewed form, it stands as a fusion of old-world craftsmanship and modern innovation, ready to carve its name into history again with you.

alloyed_shotel.name: Alloyed Shotel
alloyed_shotel.desc: A blade from Markor prized by warriors for its ability to effortlessly slip past the guards of foes.

alloyed_steel_maul.name: Alloyed Steel Maul
alloyed_steel_maul.desc: A sturdy maul perfect for knocking walls and people down alike.

alloyed_tanto.name: Alloyed Tanto
alloyed_tanto.desc: A dagger forged by a Etrean smith, the Tanto is said to bear the same durability as the Katana, but in a smaller profile

alloyed_trident_spear.name: Alloyed Trident Spear
alloyed_trident_spear.desc: A surprisingly effective weapon despite its previous use by fishermen.

alloyed_vigil_longsword.name: Alloyed Vigil Longsword
alloyed_vigil_longsword.desc: Despite the popularity of the Katana, the Vigil Longsword represents Etrea's need for more cost-efficient production processes in blades. Regarded as an equally fine blade, nonetheless.

alloyed_whaling_knife.name: Alloyed Whaling Knife
alloyed_whaling_knife.desc: The knife of one of the infamous Knives of Eylis, mercenaries and assassins feared and reviled the world over. Carries a unique critical that has a higher chance to do Critical Damage if you wield 'Knife's Journey'.

alloyed_zweihander.name: Alloyed Zweihander
alloyed_zweihander.desc: Popularised by the Canor Borderwatchers, the Zweihander is as fearsome as it is heavy.

apprentice_rapier.name: Apprentice Rapier
apprentice_rapier.desc: Although fragile in appearance, this beginner's blade has been the starting point for many Pathfinders beginning their journey.

avenger.name: Avenger
avenger.desc: A greatsword passed down by your ancestors.

battleaxe.name: Battleaxe
battleaxe.desc: A sturdy axe perfect for splitting bone.

bellmarrow_reave.name: Bellmarrow Reave
bellmarrow_reave.desc: Wrought from the hardened inner husks of Simforea's native Arkasids and bound with fragments of local flora, this twinblade bears the unmistakable mark of the resident Anansi Knell. Its paired edges are etched with frantic scrimshaw intricate patterns that seem to depict colliding oscillations, as if capturing sound itself in the act of tearing against its own reflection.

big_brother.name: Big Brother
big_brother.desc: A gift from High Inquisitor Merey. Far from a weapon of war, this dagger is a perfect tool for the stealthy wetwork missions of the Inquisition. Eyes and ears may watch and listen, but must never make a sound.

black_death.name: Black Death
black_death.reqs: black_death := 30r MED, 50r INT OR 50r WLL OR 50r CHA, 70r SDW
black_death.desc: Tool of the Ministry. Unlike its counterpart this pike cares not for the mess it intends to leave behind.

bloodbane.name: Bloodbane
bloodbane.desc: An heirloom of the Canor Borderwatchers, this bloodsoaked zweihander has been passed down by its leaders for generations. At times, you swear you can feel a heartbeat resounding from within.

bloodfouler.name: Bloodfouler
bloodfouler.desc: A deep crimson odachi, commissioned and forged for a prophet-in-training, then relinquished in later years. Marked by its maker's seal, a sinister vow seeps through its scarlet fibers. Its jagged edge cleaves through foes with unsettling ease, drinking deep of their blood to empower its wielder's divine purpose. When your fingers graze its serrated edge, horrors unlike any you've known flicker through your mind, small glimpses of something vast and unknowable. The visions vanish before you can grasp their meaning, leaving only the question.. are they echoes of the past, or omens of what's to come?

boltcrusher.name: Boltcrusher
boltcrusher.desc: A cutting-edge Deepdelver creation, uniquely modified from their renowned explosive picks, this boring tool is designed to quarry and demolish the deep's toughest materials - and those who can't uphold up their end of a deal. Infused with crackling Thundercall, this powerhouse channels booming lightning with every strike, reducing rock to rubble & foes to fragments. From depths to peaks across the land, the Union's tools ignite; a path is blown. Onwards we march, powered by a spark.

bronze_aspis.name: Bronze Aspis
bronze_aspis.desc: A round, wooden shield often accompanied by spear or shortblade.

broodalloy_cestus.name: Broodalloy Cestus
broodalloy_cestus.desc: You've done the unthinkable... merging nature and metal into a brutal instrument of destruction. The raw purple sheen of untreated pluripotent alloys twists through the craggy gnarled texture of the brute's skin, mirroring the crushing fists of Mudskipper Broodlords. Though not made from authentic materials, its added weight and durability are sure to leave no foe standing.

calamity_cinnabar.name: Calamity Cinnabar
calamity_cinnabar.desc: A blade said to have been forged from the remains of the Last Dead, the last fortunate souls at the end of the Canticlysm to be spared the Drowning.

canorian_axe.name: Canorian Axe
canorian_axe.desc: An axe much like the ones once wielded by the Canor Swornfangs, loyal protectors of the early Adretian Empire.

cavalry_saber.name: Cavalry Saber
cavalry_saber.desc: To those of the current world, the notion of cavalry is farfetched. Still, the cavalry saber lives on as an effective blade for raiding.

cerulean_thread.name: Cerulean Thread
cerulean_thread.desc: Weapon of a former student of the 4th Prophet who quickly moved up through the ranks of the Ministry due to their own ingenuity and modifications upon Zi'eer's puppet strings. Met their demise at the hands of the Maestro, posing as a Vigil Instructor in order to gather intel. Seeing through the disguise, the Maestro challenged the applicant instructor and forced them to reveal their hand. With no more tricks left up their sleeve, they fell before the Maestro's arsenal, their own handiwork joining the collection.

champions_dagger.name: Champion's Dagger
champions_dagger.desc: A blade heralded by those who have braved the challenges of 'The Golden Rat'. Befitting of a champion, its metal shines as bright as the spirit of the Golden Rat itself.

champions_sword.name: Champion's Sword
champions_sword.desc: A blade heralded by those who have braved the challenges of 'The Golden Rat'. Befitting of a champion, its metal shines as bright as the spirit of the Golden Rat itself.

chorus_of_agonies.name: Chorus of Agonies
chorus_of_agonies.desc: Towering over the trial like a monument, Enmity's presence draws the very air from your lungs, oppressive and unyielding, as if it too was full of scorn. Now in your grasp, the vile axe pulses with a dreadful rhythm, a heartbeat woven from the anguish of innumerable tortured souls. The air thickens under its weight, every inch of the weapon's twisted form resenting its own existence. The damned enforcers within wail for release, their mournful song clawing at your spirit. Yet, stood firm, you meet the abyss with defiance. The Chorus of Agonies envelops you.

coldpoint.name: Coldpoint
coldpoint.desc: Harvested from the upper crust of the Second Layer, this long icicle is kept forever frozen by a vow, and bears a Kyrsan ice brand on its hilt. Before Ethiron's arrival, such weapons were made as light training blades for Kyrsans -though in our hands, we need not show such restraint.

coral_cestus.name: Coral Cestus
coral_cestus.desc: Cestus fashioned from the remains of a Mudskipper Brute.

crescent_cleaver.name: Crescent Cleaver
crescent_cleaver.desc: Greatblades like these are often used by monster hunters, the serrated blade ensuring that even if their quarry flees, they need only follow the blood.

crucible_rapier.name: Crucible Rapier
crucible_rapier.desc: It is said that Celtor nobility once dueled with these regal arms, over their disputes now buried. While their home is now lost, their arms remain.

crypt_blade.name: Crypt Blade
crypt_blade.desc: A blade said to have been forged from the remains of the Last Dead, the last fortunate souls at the end of the Canticlysm to be spared the Drowning.

curved_blade_of_winds.name: Curved Blade of Winds
curved_blade_of_winds.desc: A prized blade supposedly forged during the Canticlysm by the first Galebreathers.

darkalloy_greatsword.name: Darkalloy Greatsword
darkalloy_greatsword.desc: Wrought from durable darksteel, these blades were popularised by the Ignition Union as tools against the Deep.

darksteel_cleaver.name: Darksteel Cleaver
darksteel_cleaver.desc: When faced with insurmountable odds, sometimes all you need is a Big Sword
